segment.source: You can select the translation table used to translate braille into text using the [Input table](#BrailleSettingsInputTable) setting in the Braille category of the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog.
segment.target: 您可以使用 [NVDA 设置](#NVDASettings)对话框中“盲文”类别的[输入表](#BrailleSettingsInputTable)将盲文翻译成文本。

segment.source: When uncontracted braille is being used, text is inserted as soon as it is entered.
segment.target: 若您使用的是非简写盲文，则在输入后会立即转为文本。

segment.source: When using contracted braille, text is inserted when you press space or enter at the end of a word.
segment.target: 若您使用的是简写盲文，则需要在输入一个字后按空格键或 Enter，才会转为文本。

segment.source: Note that translation can only reflect the braille word you are typing and cannot consider existing text.
segment.target: 值得注意的是，盲文转译仅可翻译您输入的盲文，而非现有的文本。

segment.source: For example, if you are using a braille code that begins numbers with a number sign and you press backspace to move to the end of a number, you will need to type the number sign again to enter additional numbers.
segment.target: 例如:如果您要使用盲文来打一个带头有数字符号"#"的数字，当您使用退格键倒退到这个数字的尾端，则您需要再打一次数字符号才可以将数字成功输入。

segment.source: Pressing dot 7 erases the last entered braille cell or character.
segment.target: 按第 7 点删除最后输入的盲文或字符。

segment.source: Dot 8 translates any braille input and presses the enter key.
segment.target: 按第 8 点或 Enter 翻译任何盲文输入。

segment.source: Pressing dot 7 + dot 8 translates any braille input, but without adding a space or pressing enter.
segment.target: 按第 7 与第 8 点转译任何盲文输入，但不加空格或 Enter。

segment.source: Inputting keyboard shortcuts
segment.target: 按下键盘快捷键

segment.source: NVDA supports inputting keyboard shortcuts and emulating keypresses using the braille display.
segment.target: NVDA 支持使用盲文点显器按下键盘上的快捷键和模拟按键。

segment.source: This emulation comes in two forms: assigning a Braille input directly to some key press and using the virtual modifier keys.
segment.target: 对于模拟按键有两种形式：将盲文键盘上的按键直接分配给某个按键和使用虚拟修饰键。

segment.source: Commonly-used keys, such as the arrow keys or pressing Alt to reach menus, can be mapped directly to Braille inputs.
segment.target: 常用的按键（例如`光标`键或按 `Alt` 进入菜单栏）可以直接映射到盲文键盘。

segment.source: The driver for each Braille display comes pre-equipped with some of these assignments.
segment.target: 每一款盲文点显器的驱动程序都预先设置了一些键盘映射方案。

segment.source: You can change these assignments or add new emulated keys from the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 您可以在[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)中修改这些键盘映射或者添加新的模拟按键。

segment.source: While this approach is useful for commonly-pressed or unique keys (such as Tab), you may not want to assign a unique set of keys to each keyboard shortcut.
segment.target: 虽然这种方法对于常用键或唯一键（例如 `Tab`）很有用，但您可能不会为每个键盘快捷键都分配一组模拟按键。

segment.source: To allow emulating keypresses where modifier keys are held down, NVDA provides commands to toggle the control, alt, shift, windows, and NVDA keys, along with commands for some combinations of those keys.
segment.target: 为了可以模拟修饰键，NVDA 提供了按下或放开 `Ctrl`、`Alt`、`Shift`、`Windows` 和 `NVDA`，以及这些键的个别组合的功能。

segment.source: To use these toggles, first press the command (or sequence of commands) for the modifier keys you want pressed.
segment.target: 要使用该功能，首先按下相应的修饰键（或修饰键组合）。

segment.source: Then input the character that's part of the keyboard shortcut you want to input.
segment.target: 然后键入您想要按下的字母。

segment.source: For example, to produce control+f, use the "Toggle control key" command and then type an f,
segment.target: 例如，要按 `Ctrl+F` ，请使用“模拟按下或放开 `Ctrl`”命令，然后键入 `F`，

segment.source: and to input control+alt+t, use either the "Toggle control key" and "Toggle alt key" commands, in either order, or the "Toggle control and alt keys" command, followed by typing a t.
segment.target: 要按 `Ctrl+Alt+T`，请按任意顺序执行“模拟按下或放开 `Ctrl`”、“模拟按下或放开 `Alt`”或“模拟按下或放开 `Ctrl+Alt`”然后键入字母“T”。

segment.source: If you accidentally toggle modifier keys, running the toggle command again will remove the modifier.
segment.target: 如果您不小心按下了修饰键，只需再按一次即可恢复。

segment.source: When typing in contracted Braille, using the modifier toggle keys will cause your input to be translated just as if you had pressed dots 7+8.
segment.target: 键入简写盲文时，使用模拟修饰键也会翻译您的盲文输入，就像按点 7+8 一样。

segment.source: In addition, the emulated keypress cannot reflect Braille typed before the modifier key was pressed.
segment.target: 另外，模拟按键无法处理按修饰键之前键入的盲文。

segment.source: This means that, to type alt+2 with a Braille code that uses a number sign, you must first toggle Alt and then type a number sign.
segment.target: 这意味着，要按下带有盲文数字符号的快捷键，如 `Alt+2`，您必须首先模拟按下 `Alt`，然后键入数字符号。

segment.source: Vision
segment.target: 视觉功能

segment.source: While NVDA is primarily aimed at blind or vision impaired people who primarily use speech and/or braille to operate a computer, it also provides built-in facilities to change the contents of the screen.
segment.target: 虽然 NVDA 主要针对使用语音或盲文操作计算机的盲人或视力受损用户，但其还提供内置功能来更改屏幕内容。

segment.source: Within NVDA, such a visual aid is called a vision enhancement provider.
segment.target: 在 NVDA 中，这类视觉辅助工具称为视觉增强提供程序。

segment.source: NVDA offers several built-in vision enhancement providers which are described below.
segment.target: NVDA 提供了多种内置视觉增强提供程序，如下所述。

segment.source: Additional vision enhancement providers can be provided in [NVDA add-ons](#AddonsManager).
segment.target: 其他视觉增强功能以[NVDA 插件](#AddonsManager)的形式提供.

segment.source: NVDA's vision settings can be changed in the [vision category](#VisionSettings) of the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog.
segment.target: 可在 [NVDA 设置](#NVDASettings)对话框的[视觉类别](#VisionSettings)中更改 NVDA 的视觉设置。

segment.source: Visual Highlight
segment.target: 高亮显示

segment.source: Visual Highlight can help to identify the [system focus](#SystemFocus), [navigator object](#ObjectNavigation) and [browse mode](#BrowseMode) positions.
segment.target: 该功能可以高亮显示[系统焦点](#SystemFocus)，[导航对象](#ObjectNavigation)以及[浏览模式光标](#BrowseMode)，从而方便低视力用户在屏幕上定位它们。

segment.source: These positions are highlighted with a coloured rectangle outline.
segment.target: 这些位置以彩色矩形轮廓突出显示。

segment.source: Solid blue highlights a combined navigator object and system focus location (e.g. because [the navigator object follows the system focus](#ReviewCursorFollowFocus)).
segment.target: 蓝色实线表示导航对象和系统焦点重合（通常是开启了[导航对象跟随系统焦点移动](#ReviewCursorFollowFocus)才会呈现这种视觉效果）。

segment.source: Dashed blue highlights just the system focus object.
segment.target: 蓝色虚线表示系统焦点。

segment.source: Solid pink highlights just the navigator object.
segment.target: 粉色实线表示导航对象。

segment.source: Solid yellow highlights the virtual caret used in browse mode (where there is no physical caret such as in web browsers).
segment.target: 黄色虚线表示浏览模式的虚拟光标（常见于浏览器等环境）。

segment.source: When Visual Highlight is enabled in the [vision category](#VisionSettings) of the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog, you can [change whether or not to highlight the focus, navigator object or browse mode caret](#VisionSettingsFocusHighlight).
segment.target: 在 [NVDA 设置对话框](#NVDASettings)的[视觉](#VisionSettings)类别下，您可以在启用[高亮显示](#VisionSettingsFocusHighlight)后更改是否高亮显示系统焦点、导航对象以及浏览模式光标。

segment.source: Screen Curtain
segment.target: 黑屏

segment.source: As a blind or vision impaired user, it is often not possible or necessary to see the contents of the screen.
segment.target: 作为盲人或视力受损的用户，通常不可能或没有必要观看屏幕内容。

segment.source: Furthermore, it might be hard to ensure that there isn't someone looking over your shoulder.
segment.target: 此外，也可能很难确保是否有人正在看着您的屏幕。

segment.source: For this situation, NVDA contains a feature called "Screen Curtain" which can be enabled to make the screen black.
segment.target: 对于这种情况，NVDA 包含一个称为“黑屏”的功能，可以启用该功能以将屏幕变黑。

segment.source: You can enable Screen Curtain in the [Privacy and Security category](#PrivacyAndSecuritySettings) of the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog.
segment.target: 您可在 [NVDA 设置](#NVDASettings)对话框的[隐私和安全](#PrivacyAndSecuritySettings)类别中开启黑屏。

segment.source: Name |Key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 按键 | 描述

segment.source: Toggles the state of the screen curtain |`NVDA+control+escape` |Enable to make the screen black or disable to show the contents of the screen. Pressed once, screen curtain is enabled until you restart NVDA. Pressed twice, screen curtain is enabled until you disable it.
segment.target: 切换黑屏状态的开关 | `NVDA+Ctrl+Esc` | 开启可使屏幕变黑，关闭则正常显示屏幕内容。按一次，临时开启黑屏，重启 NVDA 后将自动恢复。连按两次，开启黑屏，若想恢复屏幕显示，需手动关闭。

segment.source: When Screen Curtain is enabled, features that rely on what is literally on screen will not function.
segment.target: 如果启用黑屏，所有依靠屏幕显示内容而执行的动作均不可用。

segment.source: For example, you cannot [use OCR](#Win10Ocr).
segment.target: 如[执行 OCR](#Win10Ocr)。

segment.source: Some screenshot utilities also may not work.
segment.target: 某些截图工具也可能无法正常工作。

segment.source: Please note that while Windows Magnifier is running and inverted screen colors are being used, Screen Curtain cannot be enabled.
segment.target: 请注意，当启用 Windows 放大镜且使用“反色”功能时，无法启用黑屏。

segment.source: Content Recognition
segment.target: 图像内容识别

segment.source: When authors don't provide sufficient information for a screen reader user to determine the content of something, various tools can be used to attempt to recognize the content from an image.
segment.target: 当开发者没有为屏幕阅读器用户提供足够的信息来确认内容时，可以使用各种工具来尝试从图像中识别其内容。

segment.source: NVDA supports the optical character recognition (OCR) functionality built into Windows 10 and later to recognize text from images.
segment.target: NVDA 支持 Windows 10 及更高版本中内置的光学字符识别（OCR）功能，以识别图像中的文本。

segment.source: Additional content recognizers can be provided in NVDA add-ons.
segment.target: 还有一些 NVDA 插件也提供了类似的 OCR 功能。

segment.source: When you use a content recognition command, NVDA recognizes content from the current [navigator object](#ObjectNavigation).
segment.target: 当您使用内容识别指令时，NVDA 会从目前的[导航对象](#ObjectNavigation)识别内容。

segment.source: By default, the navigator object follows the system focus or browse mode cursor, so you can usually just move the focus or browse mode cursor where desired.
segment.target: 默认设置下，导航对象会跟随系统焦点或浏览模式光标，因此需要 OCR 时，通常您只需移动焦点或浏览模式光标即可。

segment.source: For example, if you move the browse mode cursor to a graphic, recognition will recognize content from the graphic by default.
segment.target: 例如，如果将浏览模式光标移动到图形上，在默认设置下，识别器会开始从图形中识别其内容。

segment.source: However, you may wish to use object navigation directly to, for example, recognize the content of an entire application window.
segment.target: 您可能希望直接使用对象导航。例如，识别整个应用程序窗口的内容。

segment.source: Once recognition is complete, the result will be presented in a document similar to browse mode, allowing you to read the information with cursor keys, etc.
segment.target: 一旦识别完成，结果会显示在一个类似于浏览模式的文档中，它允许使用光标键或其他键来阅读。

segment.source: Pressing enter or space will activate (normally click) the text at the cursor if possible.
segment.target: 按回车或空格键可激活（通常为单击）光标处的文本。

segment.source: Pressing escape dismisses the recognition result.
segment.target: 按 Esc 键退出识别结果文档。

segment.source: Pressing `NVDA+f5` refreshes the recognition result.
segment.target: 按 `NVDA+f5` 刷新识别结果。

segment.source: Windows OCR
segment.target: Windows OCR

segment.source: Windows 10 and later includes OCR for many languages.
segment.target: Windows 10 或更高版本的操作系统包含了支持多种语言的光学字符识别（OCR）功能。

segment.source: NVDA can use this to recognize text from images or inaccessible applications.
segment.target: NVDA 可以借助该技术来识别图像中或无障碍支持不佳的应用程序中的文本内容。

segment.source: You can set the language to use for text recognition in the [Windows OCR category](#Win10OcrSettings) of the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog.
segment.target: 您可在[NVDA 设置](#NVDASettings)对话框的[Windows OCR 类别](#Win10OcrSettings)中设置用于文本识别的语言。

segment.source: Additional languages can be installed by opening the Start menu, choosing Settings, selecting Time & Language -> Region & Language and then choosing Add a language.
segment.target: 您可以打开开始菜单，选择设置，选择时间和语言 - >地区和语言，然后选择添加语言来安装其他语言。

segment.source: When you want to monitor constantly changing content, such as when watching a video with subtitles, you can optionally enable automatic refresh of the recognized content.
segment.target: 当您想要监视不断变化的内容时，例如观看带字幕的视频，您可以启用定期刷新识别结果功能。

segment.source: This can also be done in the [Windows OCR category](#Win10OcrSettings) of the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog.
segment.target: 可以在 [NVDA 设置](#NVDASettings)的 [Windows OCR 类别](#Win10OcrSettings)中开关此选项。

segment.source: Windows OCR may be partially or fully incompatible with [NVDA vision enhancements](#Vision) or other external visual aids. You will need to disable these aids before proceeding to a recognition.
segment.target: Windows OCR 可能与[NVDA 视觉增强](#Vision)或其他辅助技术部分或完全不兼容。执行识别功能前您必须先关闭它们。

segment.source: To recognize the text in the current navigator object using Windows OCR, press NVDA+r.
segment.target: 按 NVDA+r 使用 Windows OCR 识别当前导航对象中的文本。

segment.source: Application Specific Features
segment.target: 特定应用程序的 NVDA 命令

segment.source: NVDA provides its own extra features for some applications to make certain tasks easier or to provide access to functionality which is not otherwise accessible to screen reader users.
segment.target: NVDA 为一些特定的应用程序提供了独有的额外特性，让您可以更加便捷更加高效的完成某些任务，还令某些其他屏幕阅读器用户无法访问的功能可用。

segment.source: Microsoft Word
segment.target: Microsoft Word

segment.source: Automatic Column and Row Header Reading
segment.target: 自动读出行列标题

segment.source: NVDA is able to automatically announce appropriate row and column headers when navigating around tables in Microsoft Word.
segment.target: NVDA 可在您使用 Microsoft Word 浏览表格时自动读出恰当的行列标题。

segment.source: This requires that the Report Table row / column headers option in NVDA's Document Formatting settings, found in the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog, be turned on.
segment.target: 这一特性要求启用 NVDA“文档格式”对话框的“朗读行列标题”选项。可在[NVDA 设置](#NVDASettings)对话框中找到。

segment.source: If you use [UIA to access Word documents](#MSWordUIA), which is default in recent versions of Word and Windows, the cells of the first row will automatically be considered as column headers; similarly, the cells of the first column will automatically be considered as row headers.
segment.target: 如果您使用 [UIA 访问 Word 文档](#MSWordUIA)（这是最近版本的 Word 和 Windows 中的默认设置），第一行的单元格将自动被视为列标题；同样，第一列的单元格也将自动被视为行标题。

segment.source: On the contrary, if you do not use [UIA to access Word documents](#MSWordUIA), you will have to indicate to NVDA which row or column contains the headers in any given table.
segment.target: 相反，如果您不使用 [UIA 访问 Word 文档](#MSWordUIA)，则必须向 NVDA 指出在给定的表格里，哪一行或哪一列包含正确的行列标题。

segment.source: After moving to the first cell in the column or row containing the headers, use one of the following commands:
segment.target: 在移动到包含标题的行或者列的第一个单元格后，可使用下面任一命令：

segment.source: Name |Key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 按键 | 描述

segment.source: Set column headers |`NVDA+shift+c` |Pressing this once tells NVDA this is the first header cell in the row that contains column headers, which should be automatically announced when moving between columns below this row. Pressing twice will clear the setting.
segment.target: 设置列标题 | NVDA+Shift+c | 按一次，告诉 NVDA，这是包含列标题的行的第一个标题单元，当在其下方的列之间切换时，自动读出那一行的列标题，连按两次清除设置。

segment.source: Set row headers |`NVDA+shift+r` |Pressing this once tells NVDA this is the first header cell in the column that contains row headers, which should be automatically announced when moving between rows after this column. Pressing twice will clear the setting.
segment.target: 设置行标题 | NVDA+Shift+r | 按一次，告诉 NVDA，这是包含行标题的列的第一个标题单元，当在其右方的行之间切换时，自动读出那一列的行标题，连按两次清除设置。

segment.source: These settings will be stored in the document as bookmarks compatible with other screen readers such as JAWS.
segment.target: 此设置将会以书签的形式存储在文档，能与其他屏幕阅读器如 JAWS 兼容。

segment.source: This means that users of other screen readers who open this document at a later date will automatically have the row and column headers already set.
segment.target: 这意味着，屏幕阅读器用户在后期打开这个文档时，使用其他屏幕阅读器也同样拥有设置好的行列标题。

segment.source: Browse Mode in Microsoft Word
segment.target: Microsoft Word 的浏览模式

segment.source: Similar to the web, Browse mode can be used in Microsoft Word to allow you to use features such as Quick navigation and the Elements List.
segment.target: 与网页相似，您可在 Microsoft Word 中使用浏览模式的特性，诸如快速导航、元素列表等。

segment.source: To toggle Browse mode on and off in Microsoft Word, press NVDA+space.
segment.target: 要想在 Microsoft Word 切换浏览模式的开关，可使用 NVDA+空格键。

segment.source: For further information about Browse mode and Quick Navigation, see the [Browse Mode section](#BrowseMode).
segment.target: 更多有关于浏览模式和快速导航的信息，请查看[浏览模式章节](#BrowseMode)

segment.source: The Elements List
segment.target: 元素列表

segment.source: While in Browse mode in Microsoft Word, you can access the Elements List by pressing NVDA+f7.
segment.target: 当处于 Microsoft Word 的浏览模式时，您可以通过按下“NVDA+F7”访问元素列表。

segment.source: The Elements List can list headings, links, annotations (which includes comments and track changes) and errors (currently limited to spelling errors).
segment.target: 元素列表可以列举标题、链接和批注（可能包含注解和修改跟踪记录）。

segment.source: Reporting Comments
segment.target: 读出批注

segment.source: To report any comments at the current caret position, press `NVDA+alt+c`.
segment.target: 按下 `NVDA+Alt+c` 可以查看系统光标所在处的任何批注。

segment.source: Pressing twice shows the information in a browsable message.
segment.target: 连按两次，可在浏览模式下显示该信息。

segment.source: All comments for the document, along with other tracked changes, can also be listed in the NVDA Elements List when selecting Annotations as the type.
segment.target: 文档的所有批注都可以在元素列表中进行查看，只要把类型选择为“标注”即可。

segment.source: Microsoft Excel
segment.target: Microsoft Excel

segment.source: Automatic Column and Row Header Reading
segment.target: 自动读出表格的行列标题

segment.source: NVDA is able to automatically announce appropriate row and column headers when navigating around Excel worksheets.
segment.target: NVDA 可在您浏览 Excel 工作表时自动读出恰当的行列标题。

segment.source: This firstly requires that the Report Table row / column headers option in NVDA's Document Formatting settings, found in the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog, be turned on.
segment.target: 这一特性首先要求在 “[NVDA 设置](#NVDASettings)”中的 NVDA“文档格式”对话框中启用“朗读行列标题”选项。

segment.source: Secondly, NVDA needs to know which row or column contains the headers.
segment.target: 其次，NVDA 需要知道，在给定的工作表里，哪一行或哪一列包含正确的行列标题。

segment.source: After moving to the first cell in the column or row containing the headers, use one of the following commands:
segment.target: 在移动到包含标题的行或者列的第一个单元后，可使用下面任一命令：

segment.source: Name |Key |Description
segment.target: 名称 |按键 | 描述

segment.source: Set column headers |`NVDA+shift+c` |Pressing this once tells NVDA this is the first header cell in the row that contains column headers, which should be automatically announced when moving between columns below this row. Pressing twice will clear the setting.
segment.target: 设置列标题 | NVDA+Shift+c | 按一次，告诉 NVDA，这是包含列标题的行的第一个标题单元，当在其下方的列之间切换时，自动读出那一行的列标题，连按两次清除设置。

segment.source: Set row headers |`NVDA+shift+r` |Pressing this once tells NVDA this is the first header cell in the column that contains row headers, which should be automatically announced when moving between rows after this column. Pressing twice will clear the setting.
segment.target: 设置行标题 | NVDA+Shift+r | 按一次，告诉 NVDA，这是包含行标题的列的第一个标题单元，当在其右方的行之间切换时，自动读出那一列的行标题，连按两次清除设置。

segment.source: These settings will be stored in the workbook as defined name ranges compatible with other screen readers such as JAWS.
segment.target: 此设置将会以定名为 ranges 的形式存储在文档当中，能与其他屏幕阅读器如 JAWS 兼容。

segment.source: This means that users of other screen readers who open this workbook at a later date will automatically have the row and column headers already set.
segment.target: 这意味着，屏幕阅读器用户在后期打开这个工作簿时，使用其他屏幕阅读器也同样拥有设置好的行列标题。

segment.source: The Elements List
segment.target: 元素列表

segment.source: Similar to the web, NVDA has an Elements List for Microsoft Excel that allows you to list and access several different types of information.
segment.target: 与网页相似，NVDA 也有为 Microsoft Excel 开发的元素列表，在此允许您列举和访问一些种类的信息。

segment.source: To access the Elements List in Excel, press NVDA+f7.
segment.target: 要想访问 Excel 的元素列表，请按下“NVDA+F7”。

segment.source: The various types of information available in the Elements List are:
segment.target: 可在元素列表下访问的信息种类有：

segment.source: Charts: This lists all charts in the active worksheet.
segment.target: 图表：这里列举了工作表的所有图表。

segment.source: Selecting a chart and pressing enter or the Move to button focuses the chart for navigating and reading with the arrow keys.
segment.target: 使用光标键选择一个图表后按下“回车键”或点击“移动到”按钮可聚焦到所选的图表。

segment.source: Notes: This lists all cells in the active worksheet containing notes.
segment.target: 注释：这里列举了所有包含注释的单元格。

segment.source: The cell address along with its note are shown for each cell.
segment.target: 单元格地址和其所属的注释都会被显示在这里。

segment.source: Pressing enter or the Move To button when on a listed note will move directly to that cell.
segment.target: 按下“回车键”或点击“移动到”按钮可以直接移动到所选注释的单元格内。

segment.source: Formulas: This lists all cells in the worksheet containing a formula.
segment.target: 公式：这里列举了工作表中所有包含公式的单元格。

segment.source: The cell address along with its formula are shown for each cell.
segment.target: 单元格地址和其所属的公式都会被显示在这里。

segment.source: Pressing enter or the Move To button on a listed formula will move directly to that cell.
segment.target: 按下“回车键”或点击“移动到”按钮可以直接移动到所选公式的单元格内。

segment.source: Sheets: This lists all sheets in the workbook.
segment.target: 表格：这里列举了工作表中所有的表格。

segment.source: Pressing f2 when on a listed sheet allows you to rename the sheet.
segment.target: 在所列表格中按下“F2”可重命名该表格。

segment.source: Pressing enter or the Move To button while on the listed sheet will switch to that sheet.
segment.target: 按下“回车键”或点击“移动到”按钮可以直接移动到所选的表格中。

segment.source: Form fields: This lists all form fields in the active worksheet.
segment.target: 表单：这里将列举所有工作表内所包含的表单。

segment.source: For each form field, the Elements List shows the alternative text of the field along with the addresses of the cells it covers.
segment.target: 对于每一个表单，元素列表将显示每一个地址所覆盖的单元格的替代文本。

segment.source: Selecting a form field and pressing enter or the Move to button moves to that field in browse mode.
segment.target: 选择一个表单项目之后按下“回车”或点击“移动到”按钮即可跳转到该表单项目。

segment.source: Reporting Notes
segment.target: 读出注释

segment.source: To report any notes for the currently focused cell, press `NVDA+alt+c`.
segment.target: 要想读出当前聚焦单元的所有注释，请按 `NVDA+Alt+C`。

segment.source: Pressing twice shows the information in a browsable message.
segment.target: 连按两次，可在浏览模式下显示该信息。

segment.source: In Microsoft 2016, 365 and newer, the classic comments in Microsoft Excel have been renamed to "notes".
segment.target: 在英文版 Microsoft 2016、365 和更高版本中，Microsoft Excel 中的注释“Comment”已重命名为“Notes”，与新的批注区分（中文版该术语保持不变）。

segment.source: All notes for the worksheet can also be listed in the NVDA Elements List after pressing NVDA+f7.
segment.target: 按 NVDA+F7 在元素列表中访问当前工作簿的所有注释。

segment.source: NVDA can also display a specific dialog for adding or editing a certain note.
segment.target: NVDA 还可以显示用于添加或编辑特定注释的特定对话框。

segment.source: NVDA overrides the native MS Excel notes editing region due to accessibility constraints, but the key stroke for displaying the dialog is inherited from MS Excel and therefore works also without NVDA running.
segment.target: 由于无障碍 API 的限制，NVDA 覆盖了 Excel 注释编辑区域，但是用于显示对话框的按键是 Excel 自带的，即使未运行 NVDA 也可以使用。

segment.source: To add or edit a certain note, in a focused cell, press shift+f2.
segment.target: 按 Shift+f2 在焦点单元格添加或编辑注释。

segment.source: This key stroke does not appear and cannot be changed in NVDA's input gesture dialog.
segment.target: 这个快捷键不在 NVDA 的按键与手势对话框里显示，因此不能修改。

segment.source: Note: it is possible to open the note editing region in MS Excel also from the context menu of any cell of the work sheet.
segment.target: 注意：也可以从工作表任何单元格的上下文菜单中，打开 Excel 自带的注释编辑区域。

segment.source: However, this will open the inaccessible note editing region and not the NVDA specific note editing dialog.
segment.target: 但是，这将打开 NVDA 无法朗读的注释编辑区域，而不是 NVDA 添加的注释编辑对话框。

segment.source: In Microsoft Office 2016, 365 and newer, a new style comment dialog has been added.
segment.target: 在 Microsoft Office 2016、365 和更高版本中，添加了批注对话框。

segment.source: This dialog is accessible and provides more features such as replying to comments, etc.
segment.target: 该对话框支持无障碍，并提供更多功能，例如回复他人批注等。

segment.source: It can also be opened from the context menu of a certain cell.
segment.target: 可以从某个单元格的上下文菜单中打开它。

segment.source: The comments added to the cells via the new style comment dialog are not related to "notes".
segment.target: 通过批注对话框添加到单元格中的批注与“注释”无关。

segment.source: Reading Protected Cells
segment.target: 读出受保护的单元格

segment.source: If a workbook has been protected, it may not be possible to move focus to particular cells that have been locked for editing.
segment.target: 如果工作簿已经被保护了起来，移动焦点到特定单元也许将变得不可能。

segment.source: To allow moving to locked cells, switch to Browse Mode by pressing NVDA+space, and then use standard Excel movement commands such as the arrow keys to move around all cells on the current worksheet.
segment.target: 要想允许锁定单元移动，可使用“NVDA+空格键”切换到浏览模式后，使用标准的 Excel 移动命令如光标键可在当前工作表的所有单元中移动。

segment.source: Form Fields
segment.target: 表单

segment.source: Excel worksheets can include form fields.
segment.target: Excel 工作簿可包含表单。

segment.source: You can access these using the Elements List or the f and shift+f form field single letter navigation keys.
segment.target: 您可以使用“元素列表”对话框查看它们，或使用字母 F 和 Shift+F 进行跳转。

segment.source: Once you move to a form field in browse mode, you can press enter or space to either activate it or switch to focus mode so you can interact with it, depending on the control.
segment.target: 当您使用浏览模式移动到某个表单项后，您可以使用“回车”键或“空格”键切换到焦点模式以便与之交互，方法取决于当前所在处的控件。

segment.source: For further information about Browse mode and single letter navigation, see the [Browse Mode section](#BrowseMode).
segment.target: 更多有关于浏览模式或单键导航使用方面的信息，请查阅[浏览模式](#BrowseMode)章节。

segment.source: Microsoft PowerPoint
segment.target: Microsoft PowerPoint

segment.source: Name |Key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 按键 | 描述

segment.source: Toggle speaker notes reading |control+shift+s |When in a running slide show, this command will toggle between the speaker notes for the slide and the content for the slide. This only affects what NVDA reads, not what is displayed on screen.
segment.target: 切换大纲朗读 | Ctrl+Shift+s | 当进行幻灯片播放时，此命令将在幻灯片或者幻灯片内容的大纲之间切换。此命令仅作用于 NVDA 所朗读的内容，而不能作用于显示的内容。

segment.source: foobar2000
segment.target: foobar2000

segment.source: Name |Key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 按键 | 描述

segment.source: Report remaining time |control+shift+r |Reports the remaining time of the currently playing track, if any.
segment.target: 读出剩余时间 | Ctrl+Shift+r | 如果正在播放音乐，读出当前播放曲目的剩余时间。

segment.source: Report elapsed time |control+shift+e |Reports the elapsed time of the currently playing track, if any.
segment.target: 读出已播放时间 | Ctrl+Shift+e | 如果正在播放音乐，读出当前曲目的已播放时间。

segment.source: Report track length |control+shift+t |Reports the length of the currently playing track, if any.
segment.target: 读出总时长 | Ctrl+Shift+t | 如果正在播放音乐，读出当前曲目的总时长。

segment.source: Note: The above shortcuts work only with the default formatting string for foobar's status line.
segment.target: 注意：以上快捷键仅适用于采用默认格式字串的 Foobar2000 状态栏下。

segment.source: Miranda IM
segment.target: Miranda IM

segment.source: Name |Key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 按键 | 描述

segment.source: Report recent message |NVDA+control+1-4 |Reports one of the recent messages, depending on the number pressed; e.g. NVDA+control+2 reads the second most recent message.
segment.target: 读出最近的消息 | NVDA+Ctrl+1-4 | 根据按下数字的不同读出最近的消息中的一条，例如 NVDA+Ctrl+2 读出第二条最近的消息。

segment.source: Poedit
segment.target: Poedit

segment.source: NVDA offers enhanced support for Poedit 3.5 or newer.
segment.target: NVDA 为 Poedit 3.5 及更高版本提供了增强支持。

segment.source: Name |Key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 按键 | 描述

segment.source: Report notes for translators |`control+shift+a` |Reports any notes for translators. If pressed twice, presents the notes in browse mode
segment.target: 读出翻译者注释 | `Ctrl+Shift+a` | 读出翻译者注释。连按两次，在浏览模式下显示该信息

segment.source: Report Comment |`control+shift+c` |Reports any comment in the comments window. If pressed twice, presents the comment in browse mode
segment.target: 读出注释 | `Ctrl+Shift+c` | 读出窗口内的注释。连按两次，在浏览模式下显示该信息

segment.source: Report Old Source Text |`control+shift+o` |Reports the old source text, if any. If pressed twice, presents the text in browse mode
segment.target: 读出先前的源文本 | `Ctrl+Shift+o` | 读出先前的源文本（如果有）。连按两次，在浏览模式下显示该信息

segment.source: Report Translation Warning |`control+shift+w` |Reports a translation warning, if any. If pressed twice, presents the warning in browse mode
segment.target: 读出翻译警告 | `Ctrl+Shift+w` | 读出翻译警告（如果有）。连按两次，在浏览模式下显示该信息

segment.source: Kindle for PC
segment.target: Kindle for PC

segment.source: NVDA supports reading and navigating books in Amazon Kindle for PC.
segment.target: NVDA 支持在亚马逊 Kindle for PC 上阅读和导航书籍。

segment.source: This functionality is only available in Kindle books designated with "Screen Reader: Supported" which you can check on the details page for the book.
segment.target: 此功能仅适用于使用“支持屏幕阅读器”的 Kindle 书籍，您可以在该书的详细信息页面上查看。

segment.source: Browse mode is used to read books.
segment.target: 浏览模式用于阅读书籍。

segment.source: It is enabled automatically when you open a book or focus the book area.
segment.target: 当您打开书本或聚焦书籍区域时，它会自动启用。

segment.source: The page will be turned automatically as appropriate when you move the cursor or use the say all command.
segment.target: 移动光标或使用全文朗读命令时，页面将根据需要自动旋转。

segment.source: You can manually turn to the next page with the pageDown key and turn to the previous page with the pageUp key.
segment.target: 您可以使用下翻页键手动转到下一页，使用上翻页键转到上一页。

segment.source: Single letter navigation is supported for links and graphics, but only within the current page.
segment.target: 链接和图形支持单键导航，但仅限于当前页面。

segment.source: Navigating by link also includes footnotes.
segment.target: 通过链接导航还包括脚注。

segment.source: NVDA provides early support for reading and interactive navigation of mathematical content for books with accessible math.
segment.target: NVDA 为具有数学内容无障碍支持的书籍提供数学内容的阅读和交互式导航的早期支持。

segment.source: Please see the [Reading Mathematical Content](#ReadingMath) section for further information.
segment.target: 有关详细信息，请查阅[阅读数学内容](#ReadingMath)部分。

segment.source: Text Selection
segment.target: 文本选择

segment.source: Kindle allows you to perform various functions on selected text, including obtaining a dictionary definition, adding notes and highlights, copying the text to the clipboard and searching the web.
segment.target: Kindle 允许您对所选文本执行各种功能，包括获取字典定义，添加注释和突出显示，将文本复制到剪贴板以及搜索 Web。

segment.source: To do this, first select text as you normally would in browse mode; e.g. by using shift and the cursor keys.
segment.target: 为此，首先像在浏览模式下一样选择文本；例如通过使用 Shift 和光标键。

segment.source: Once you have selected text, press the applications key or shift+f10 to show the available options for working with the selection.
segment.target: 选择文本后，按 Application 键或 Shift + F10 以显示使用选择的可用选项。

segment.source: If you do this with no text selected, options will be shown for the word at the cursor.
segment.target: 如果在未选择文本的情况下执行此操作，将在光标处显示单词的选项。

segment.source: User Notes
segment.target: 用户注释

segment.source: You can add a note regarding a word or passage of text.
segment.target: 您可以为单词或段落添加注释。

segment.source: To do this, first select the relevant text and access the selection options as described above.
segment.target: 要执行此操作，请首先选择相关文本并访问上述选择选项。

segment.source: Then, choose Add Note.
segment.target: 然后，选择添加注释。

segment.source: When reading in browse mode, NVDA refers to these notes as comments.
segment.target: 在浏览模式下阅读时，NVDA 将把这些笔记做为注释处理。

segment.source: To view, edit or delete a note:
segment.target: 查看，编辑或删除笔记的流程：

segment.source: Move the cursor to the text containing the note.
segment.target: 将光标移动到包含笔记的文本。

segment.source: Access the options for the selection as described above.
segment.target: 如上所述访问选择选项。

segment.source: Choose Edit Note.
segment.target: 选择编辑笔记。

segment.source: Azardi
segment.target: Azardi

segment.source: When in the table view of added books:
segment.target: 在添加书目的表格里面，可以使用这些快捷键：

segment.source: Name |Key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 按键 | 描述

segment.source: Enter |enter |Opens the selected book.
segment.target: 打开 | enter 键 | 打开所选的书籍。

segment.source: Context menu |applications |Opens the context menu for the selected book.
segment.target: 上下文菜单 | application 键 | 打开所选书籍的上下文菜单。

segment.source: Windows Console
segment.target: Windows 控制台

segment.source: NVDA provides support for the Windows command console used by Command Prompt, PowerShell, and the Windows Subsystem for Linux.
segment.target: NVDA 支持命令提示符，PowerShell 以及 Linux 子系统的 Windows 控制台。

segment.source: The console window is of fixed size, typically much smaller than the buffer that holds the output.
segment.target: 控制台的窗口大小是固定的，通常比保存输出的缓冲区小得多。

segment.source: As new text is written, the content scroll upwards and previous text is no longer visible.
segment.target: 写入新文本时，内容将向上滚动，并且之前的文本将不再可见。

segment.source: On Windows versions before Windows 11 22H2, text in the console that is not visibly displayed in the window is not accessible with NVDA's text review commands.
segment.target: 在 Windows 11 22H2 之前的版本中，NVDA 的文本查看命令无法访问未显示在窗口中的文本。

segment.source: Therefore, it is necessary to scroll the console window to read earlier text.
segment.target: 因此，必须滚动控制台窗口才能读取之前的文本。

segment.source: In newer versions of the console and in Windows Terminal, it is possible to review the entire text buffer freely without the need to scroll the window.
segment.target: 在较新版本的控制台和 Windows terminal 中，无需滚动窗口即可查看整个文本缓冲区。

segment.source: The following built-in Windows Console keyboard shortcuts may be useful when [reviewing text](#ReviewingText) with NVDA in older versions of Windows Console:
segment.target: 在旧版本 Windows 控制台中，以下 Windows 内置的快捷键可以和 NVDA 的[文本查看命令](#ReviewingText)配合使用:

segment.source: Name |Key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 按键 | 描述

segment.source: Scroll up |control+upArrow |Scrolls the console window up, so earlier text can be read.
segment.target: 向上滚动 | Ctrl+上光标 | 向上滚动控制台窗口以便查看前面的文本。

segment.source: Scroll down |control+downArrow |Scrolls the console window down, so later text can be read.
segment.target: 向下滚动 | Ctrl+下光标 | 向下滚动控制台窗口以便查看后面的文本。

segment.source: Scroll to start |control+home |Scrolls the console window to the beginning of the buffer.
segment.target: 滚动到开头 | Ctrl+行首键 | 将控制台窗口滚动到缓冲区的开头。

segment.source: Scroll to end |control+end |Scrolls the console window to the end of the buffer.
segment.target: 滚动到结尾 | Ctrl+行尾键 | 将控制台窗口滚动到缓冲区的末尾。

segment.source: Configuring NVDA
segment.target: 配置 NVDA

segment.source: Most configuration can be performed using dialog boxes accessed through the Preferences sub-menu of the NVDA menu.
segment.target: 大部分配置可以在 NVDA 菜单的选项子菜单下的对话框进行调整。

segment.source: Many of these settings can be found in the multi-page [NVDA Settings dialog](#NVDASettings).
segment.target: [NVDA 设置对话框](#NVDASettings)中有很多设置选项，这些选项被分成多个类别。

segment.source: In all dialog boxes, press the OK button to accept any changes you have made.
segment.target: 在所有对话框中，按确定按钮保存设置并关闭对话框。

segment.source: To cancel any changes, press the Cancel button or the escape key.
segment.target: 按取消按钮或者 ESC 键撤销更改并关闭对话框。

segment.source: For certain dialogs, you can press the Apply button to let the settings take effect immediately without closing the dialog.
segment.target: 某些对话框包含应用按钮，点击该按钮可在不关闭对话框的情况下应用设置。

segment.source: Most NVDA dialogs support context help.
segment.target: 大多数 NVDA 对话框支持上下文帮助。

segment.source: When in a dialog, pressing `f1` opens the User Guide at the paragraph related to the focused setting or the current dialog.
segment.target: 在对话框中，按 `f1` 键可打开与当前交点选项或当前对话框相关的用户指南对应章节。

segment.source: Some settings can also be changed using shortcut keys, which are listed where relevant in the sections below.
segment.target: 某些设置可以用快捷键更改，这些快捷键会在相应章节进行说明。

segment.source: NVDA Settings
segment.target: NVDA 设置对话框

segment.source: || Name | Desktop key | Laptop key | Description |
segment.target: || 名称 | 台式机键盘 | 笔记本键盘 | 描述 |

segment.source: NVDA provides many configuration parameters that can be changed using the settings dialog.
segment.target: NVDA 的许多配置参数位于设置对话框，在该对话框中可以方便地调整它们。

segment.source: To make it easier to find the kind of settings you want to change, the dialog displays a list of configuration categories to choose from.
segment.target: 为了易于使用，对话框中有一个包含配置类别的列表，使得所有设置项分门别类、井井有条。

segment.source: When you select a category, all of the settings related to it will be shown in the dialog.
segment.target: 选中一个类别，该类对应的设置项即显示在对话框中。

segment.source: To move between categories, use `tab` or `shift+tab` to reach the list of categories, and then use the up and down arrow keys to navigate the list.
segment.target: 若要在类别之间切换，请按 `Tab` 或者 `Shift+Tab` 切换到类别列表，然后使用上下光标键浏览。

segment.source: From anywhere in the dialog, you may also move forward one category by pressing `ctrl+tab`, or back one category by pressing `shift+ctrl+tab`.
segment.target: 在对话框中的任意位置，还可使用 `Ctrl+Tab` 切换到下一个类别，或使用 `Ctrl+Shift+Tab` 切换到上一个类别。

segment.source: Once you change one or more settings, the settings can be applied using the apply button, in which case the dialog will stay open, allowing you to change more settings or choose another category.
segment.target: 当修改一个或者多个设置后，使用“应用”按钮，立即应用设置，而对话框不会关闭，您可继续调整其他设置。

segment.source: If you want to save your settings and close the NVDA Settings dialog, you can use the OK button.
segment.target: 点击“确认”按钮，保存所有您作过的更改，并且关闭对话框。

segment.source: Some settings categories have dedicated shortcut keys.
segment.target: 有的类别具有特定的快捷键。

segment.source: If pressed, the shortcut key will open the NVDA Settings dialog directly to that particular category.
segment.target: 按下对应快捷键可以打开 NVDA 设置对话框，并显示对应类别的设置。

segment.source: By default, not all categories can be accessed with keyboard commands.
segment.target: 请注意：默认情况下并非所有选项都可以使用按键或手势进行访问。

segment.source: If you frequently access categories that do not have dedicated shortcut keys, you may wish to use the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures) to add a custom gesture such as a keyboard command or touch gesture for that category.
segment.target: 如果您经常访问的选项没有专门的快捷键，使用[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)可给该选项添加自定义手势或快捷键。

segment.source: The settings categories found in the NVDA Settings dialog will be outlined below.
segment.target: 下面列出 NVDA 设置对话框中的各个类别。

segment.source: General
segment.target: 常规

segment.source: Open General settings
segment.target: 打开常规设置

segment.source: Key: `NVDA+control+g`
segment.target: 按键：`NVDA+Ctrl+g`

segment.source: The General category of the NVDA Settings dialog sets NVDA's overall behaviour such as interface language and whether or not it should check for updates.
segment.target: 常规设置类别包含了界面语言是否检查更新等 NVDA 的全局设置。

segment.source: This category contains the following options:
segment.target: 该类别包含以下选项：

segment.source: Language
segment.target: 语言

segment.source: This is a combo box which allows you to select the language that NVDA's user interface and messages should be shown in.
segment.target: 一个可以允许您选择 NVDA 界面和消息显示时使用语言的组合框。

segment.source: There are many languages, however the default option is "User Default, Windows".
segment.target: 这里有很多语言，默认选项是“用户默认”。

segment.source: This option tells NVDA to use the language that Windows is currently set to.
segment.target: 此选项告诉 NVDA，使用 Windows 当前设置的语言。

segment.source: Please note that NVDA must be restarted when changing the language.
segment.target: 请注意，更改语言时，NVDA 必须先重新启动。

segment.source: When the confirmation dialog appears, select "restart now" or "restart later" if you wish to use the new language now or at a later time, respectively. If "restart later" is selected, the configuration must be saved (either manually or using the save on exit functionality).
segment.target: 出现确认对话框时，如果您希望现在或稍后使用新语言，请选择“立即重启”或“稍后重启”。如果选择“稍后重启”，则必须保存配置（手动保存或启用“退出时保存设置”功能）。

segment.source: Save configuration on exit
segment.target: 退出时保存设置

segment.source: This option is a checkbox that, when checked, tells NVDA to automatically save the current configuration when you exit NVDA.
segment.target: 此选项是一个复选框，告诉 NVDA 在您退出时自动地保存当前的配置。

segment.source: Show exit options when exiting NVDA
segment.target: 退出 NVDA 前显示退出选项

segment.source: This option is a checkbox that allows you to choose whether or not a dialog appears when you exit NVDA that asks what action you want to perform.
segment.target: 此选项是一个复选框，允许您选择在 NVDA 退出前是否弹出询问选择希望执行什么动作的对话框。

segment.source: When checked, a dialog will appear when you attempt to exit NVDA, offering the following possibilities:
segment.target: 选中后，当您退出 NVDA 时，将出现一个对话框，提供以下选项：

segment.source: exit
segment.target: 退出

segment.source: restart
segment.target: 重启

segment.source: restart with add-ons disabled and debug logging enabled
segment.target: 重启、禁用插件并启用调试日志记录

segment.source: restart with debug logging enabled
segment.target: 重启并启用调试日志记录

segment.source: install pending updates (if any).
segment.target: 安装之前推迟的更新（如有）。

segment.source: When unchecked, NVDA will exit immediately.
segment.target: 如果没有选中，NVDA 会立即退出。

segment.source: Play sounds when starting or exiting NVDA
segment.target: 启动或退出 NVDA 时播放声音

segment.source: This option is a checkbox that, when checked, tells NVDA to play sounds when it starts or exits.
segment.target: 此选项是一个复选框，如果被选中，告诉 NVDA 在启动或退出时播放声音。

segment.source: Start NVDA after I sign in
segment.target: 登录后启动 NVDA

segment.source: If this option is enabled, NVDA will start automatically as soon as you sign in to Windows.
segment.target: 如果此选项被选中，NVDA 将在您登录 Windows 后立即自动启动。

segment.source: This option is only available for installed copies of NVDA.
segment.target: 此选项仅可用于 NVDA 的安装版。

segment.source: Use NVDA during sign-in (requires administrator privileges)
segment.target: 在欢迎界面启用 NVDA（需要管理员权限）

segment.source: If you sign in to Windows by providing a user name and password, then enabling this option will make NVDA start automatically at the sign-in screen when Windows starts.
segment.target: 如果您通过使用密码和用户登录 Windows，此选项将使 NVDA 在 Windows 启动时自动运行。

segment.source: This option is only available for installed copies of NVDA.
segment.target: 此选项仅可用于 NVDA 的安装版。

segment.source: Use currently saved settings during sign-in and on secure screens (requires administrator privileges)
segment.target: 应用当前配置到欢迎界面和其他安全界面

segment.source: Pressing this button copies your currently saved NVDA user configuration to NVDA's system configuration directory, so that NVDA will use it during sign-in and when running on User Account Control (UAC) and other [secure screens](#SecureScreens).
segment.target: 按下此按钮，NVDA 会将您当前保存的用户配置拷贝到 NVDA 的系统配置目录，这将应用于 Windows 欢迎屏幕以及用户账户控制（UAC）和其他[安全界面](#SecureScreens)。

segment.source: To make sure that all your settings are transferred, make sure to save your configuration first with control+NVDA+c or Save configuration in the NVDA menu.
segment.target: 要确保您所有的配置都会被传送，请先使用“NVDA+Ctrl+c”或者 NVDA 菜单下的“保存设置”事先保存您的当前配置。

segment.source: This option is only available for installed copies of NVDA.
segment.target: 此选项仅可用于 NVDA 的安装版。

segment.source: Automatically check for updates to NVDA
segment.target: 自动检查更新

segment.source: If this is enabled, NVDA will automatically check for updated versions and inform you when an update is available.
segment.target: 如果此选项被启用，NVDA 将自动检查新版本的 NVDA，在新版本可用时向您作出通知。

segment.source: You can also manually check for updates by selecting Check for updates under Help in the NVDA menu.
segment.target: 您也可以通过点击“帮助”菜单下的“检查更新”手动获取更新。

segment.source: When manually or automatically checking for updates, it is necessary for NVDA to send some information to the update server in order to receive the correct update for your system.
segment.target: 为了检查更新，NVDA 需要向服务器发送您使用的系统的信息。

segment.source: The following information is always sent:
segment.target: 具体包括:

segment.source: Current NVDA version
segment.target: 当前 NVDA 版本

segment.source: Operating System version
segment.target: 操作系统版本

segment.source: Processor architecture
segment.target: 处理器架构

segment.source: Notify for pending updates on startup
segment.target: 启动时通知有待安装的更新

segment.source: If this is enabled, NVDA will inform you when there is a pending update on startup, offering you the possibility to install it.
segment.target: 如果此选项被启用且有待安装的更新，NVDA 启动时会提醒用户。

segment.source: You can also manually install the pending update from the Exit NVDA dialog (if enabled), from the NVDA menu, or when you perform a new check from the Help menu.
segment.target: 如果开启了退出对话框，可在该对话框手动安装，亦可在 NVDA 菜单或检查更新时安装。

segment.source: Update Mirror
segment.target: 更新镜像

segment.source: These controls allow you to specify an alternative URL to use to check for updates to NVDA.
segment.target: 通过这些控件，您可以指定用于检查 NVDA 更新的备用网址。

segment.source: This may be of use in locations where access to the NV Access NVDA update server is slow or unavailable.
segment.target: 在访问 NV Access 官方更新服务器较慢或不可用的地区，此功能可能非常有用。

segment.source: The read-only text box shows the current mirror URL.
segment.target: 只读文本框将显示当前的镜像网址。

segment.source: If no mirror is in use (i.e. the NV Access update server is being used), "No mirror" is displayed.
segment.target: 若未使用任何镜像（即正在使用 NV Access 官方更新服务器），则会显示“不使用镜像”。

segment.source: If you wish to change the update mirror, press the "Change..." button to open the [Set Update Mirror dialog](#SetURLDialog).
segment.target: 如需更改更新镜像，请按下“更改...”按钮以打开[设置更新镜像对话框](#SetURLDialog)

segment.source: Please note that when using an update mirror, the operator of the mirror has access to all [information sent with update checks](#GeneralSettingsCheckForUpdates).
segment.target: 请注意：当使用更新镜像时，镜像运营商将有权获取所有[随更新检查发送的信息](#GeneralSettingsCheckForUpdates)。

segment.source: Contact the operator of the update mirror for details of their data handling policies to ensure you are comfortable with the way your information will be handled before setting an update mirror.
segment.target: 在设置更新镜像前，建议您联系镜像运营商了解其数据处理政策，确保您能接受其信息处理方式。

segment.source: Prevent display from turning off during say all or reading with braille
segment.target: 在全文朗读或阅读盲文时禁止关闭显示器

segment.source: This check box, when enabled, ensures that the display stays on when reading with say all or with braille (e.g. when pressing scroll buttons).
segment.target: 启用此复选框，可确保在使用全文朗读或盲文阅读时（例如按下滚动按钮时）保持屏幕常亮。

segment.source: This avoids the situation where the screen unexpectedly locks during a say all.
segment.target: 这样可以避免在全文朗读过程中屏幕意外锁定的情况。

segment.source: This option is enabled by default.
segment.target: 该选项默认处于启用状态。

segment.source: Consider disabling this option if you are suffering from a shorter battery life.
segment.target: 若您发现电池续航时间显著缩短，可考虑禁用此选项。

segment.source: Speech Settings
segment.target: 语音

segment.source: Open Speech settings
segment.target: 打开语音设置

segment.source: Key: `NVDA+control+v`
segment.target: 按键：`NVDA+Ctrl+v`

segment.source: The Speech category in the NVDA Settings dialog contains options that lets you change the speech synthesizer as well as voice characteristics for the chosen synthesizer.
segment.target: 语音设置类别可用于选择 NVDA 用来输出语音的合成器，更改所选合成器的设置。

segment.source: For a quicker alternative way of controlling speech parameters from anywhere, please see the [Synth Settings Ring](#SynthSettingsRing) section.
segment.target: 如需随时使用快捷键切换语音参数，请查看[循环切换合成器设置](#SynthSettingsRing)章节。

segment.source: The Speech Settings category contains the following options:
segment.target: 该类别包含以下选项：

segment.source: Change synthesizer
segment.target: 修改按钮

segment.source: The first option in the Speech Settings category is the Change... button.
segment.target: 语音设置类别中的第一个选项是修改按钮。

segment.source: This button activates the [Select Synthesizer](#SelectSynthesizer) dialog, which allows you to select the active speech synthesizer.
segment.target: 点击该按钮，可以打开[选择语音合成器](#SelectSynthesizer)对话框，您可以在其中选择其他语音合成器。

segment.source: This dialog opens on top of the NVDA Settings dialog.
segment.target: 此对话框会出现在 NVDA 设置对话框上面。

segment.source: Saving or dismissing the settings in the Select Synthesizer dialog will return you to the NVDA Settings dialog.
segment.target: 在此对话框保存或取消设置后，会返回 NVDA 设置对话框。

segment.source: Voice
segment.target: 语音

segment.source: The Voice option is a combo box listing all the voices of the current synthesizer that you have installed.
segment.target: 这个组合框列举了当前合成器安装的所有语音。

segment.source: You can use the arrow keys to listen to all the various choices.
segment.target: 您可以使用光标键聆听所有的不同声音。

segment.source: Left and Up arrow take you up in the list, while right and down arrow move you down in the list.
segment.target: 左光标和上光标允许您向上查看列表，右光标和下光标则允许您向下查看列表。

segment.source: Variant
segment.target: 变声

segment.source: If you are using the Espeak NG synthesizer which is packaged with NVDA, this is a combo box that allows you to select the Variant the synthesizer should speak with.
segment.target: 如果您正在使用 NVDA 内置的 ESpeak NG，您可以使用此组合框来选择语音输出时采用的声音。

segment.source: ESpeak NG's Variants are rather like voices, as they provide slightly different attributes to the eSpeak NG voice.
segment.target: ESpeak NG 的“变声”跟“语音”很像，您可以使用此组合框来选择其他的声音变体。因为其提供了跟“语音”略有不同的一些属性。

segment.source: Some variants will sound like a male, some like a female, and some even like a frog.
segment.target: 有些声音听起来像女性，有些声音听起来像男性，有的听起来甚至像蛙鸣。

segment.source: If using a third-party synthesizer, you may also be able to change this value if your chosen voice supports it.
segment.target: 若使用第三方合成器，如果您选择的语音支持，您也可以调节此选项。

segment.source: Rate
segment.target: 速度

segment.source: This option allows you to change the rate of your voice.
segment.target: 此选项允许您更改语音的速度。

segment.source: This is a slider that goes from 0 to 100 - 0 being the slowest, 100 being the fastest.
segment.target: 这是一个从 0 到 100 的滑块，0 最慢，100 最快。

segment.source: Rate boost
segment.target: 语速加倍

segment.source: Enabling this option will significantly increase the speech rate, if supported by the current synthesizer.
segment.target: 如果当前合成器支持，启用此选项将大大提高语音速度。

segment.source: Pitch
segment.target: 音调

segment.source: This option allows you to change the pitch of the current voice.
segment.target: 此选项允许您更改当前语音的音调。

segment.source: It is a slider which goes from 0 to 100 - 0 being the lowest pitch and 100 being the highest.
segment.target: 这是一个从 0 到 100 的滑块，0 最低，100 最高。

segment.source: Volume
segment.target: 音量

segment.source: This option is a slider which goes from 0 to 100 - 0 being the lowest volume and 100 being the highest.
segment.target: 这是一个从 0 到 100 的滑块，0 音量最小，100 音量最大。

segment.source: Inflection
segment.target: 声调

segment.source: This option is a slider that lets you choose how much inflection (rise and fall in pitch) the synthesizer should use to speak with.
segment.target: 此选项是一个滑块，允许您选择合成器进行语音输出时使用的语调的变化（最高和最低音调之差的大小）。

segment.source: Use modern audio output system (WASAPI)
segment.target: 使用现代音频输出系统（WASAPI）

segment.source: This option enables audio output via the Windows Audio Session API (WASAPI).
segment.target: 此选项控制是否启用通过 Windows 音频会话 API (WASAPI) 输出音频的功能。

segment.source: This option only exists for Microsoft Speech API version 5 (SAPI 5) voices.
segment.target: 此选项仅适用于 Microsoft Speech API version 5（SAPI 5）语音。

segment.source: This may improve the responsiveness of some SAPI 5 voices.
segment.target: 这可能会提高某些 SAPI 5 语音的响应能力。

segment.source: However, some voices might not work with the current WASAPI implementation.
segment.target: 但当前的 WASAPI 实现可能不兼容某些语音。

segment.source: If you find that the voice you are using stops working, you may disable this option.
segment.target: 若您使用的语音出现异常，可禁用此选项。

segment.source: Note that the following features depend on WASAPI, and will be disabled if WASAPI is turned off:
segment.target: 请注意，以下功能依赖 WASAPI，关闭后将无法使用：

segment.source: Rate boost
segment.target: 语速加倍

segment.source: Leading silence trimming
segment.target: 去除语音开头的静音

segment.source: Keep audio device awake
segment.target: 保持音频设备唤醒

segment.source: Note that in Advanced settings, there is a similar [option for SAPI 4 voices](#UseWASAPIForSAPI4), not to be confused with this one.
segment.target: 请注意，在高级设置中有一个类似的[针对 SAPI 4 语音的选项](#UseWASAPIForSAPI4)，请勿与此选项混淆。

segment.source: Automatic Language switching
segment.target: 自动语言切换

segment.source: This checkbox allows you to toggle whether NVDA should switch speech synthesizer languages automatically if the text being read specifies its language.
segment.target: 此复选框允许您切换在朗读定义了自己语言的文档时是否自动切换合成器的语言。

segment.source: This option is enabled by default.
segment.target: 默认情况下此选项被启用。

segment.source: Automatic Dialect switching
segment.target: 自动方言切换

segment.source: This checkbox allows you to toggle whether or not dialect changes should be made, rather than just actual language changes.
segment.target: 此复选框允许您定义是否自动进行方言切换，而不仅是语言。

segment.source: For example, if reading in an English U.S. voice but a document specifies that some text is in English U.K., then the synthesizer will switch accents if this option is enabled.
segment.target: 例如，如果您正在使用一个美国英语的合成器语音进行阅读，而文档指定某些文字是英国英语的，如启用此选项，口音就会被改变。

segment.source: This option is disabled by default.
segment.target: 默认情况下此选项被禁用。

segment.source: Report language changes while reading
segment.target: 读出语言变化

segment.source: This checkbox allows you to toggle whether NVDA should report the detected language of the text being read, when the language changes from the default language.
segment.target: 此复选框用于控制当文本语言与默认语言不同时，NVDA 是否读出检测到的文本语言。

segment.source: The language configured to be used by default won't be reported.
segment.target: 已配置为默认使用的语言将不会被读出。

segment.source: This option is disabled by default.
segment.target: 默认情况下此选项被禁用。

segment.source: Report when switching to language is not supported by synthesizer
segment.target: 切换到合成器不支持的语言时提示

segment.source: This combo box is used to set how NVDA should report if the language of the text being read is not supported by the current synthesizer.
segment.target: 此组合框用于设置当前语音合成器不支持所读文本语言时，NVDA 应如何提示。

segment.source: If [Automatic Language switching](#SpeechSettingsLanguageSwitching) is disabled, this option won't take effect, and the combo box will be readonly.
segment.target: 若[自动语言切换](#SpeechSettingsLanguageSwitching)功能被禁用，此选项将不生效，且组合框会变为只读状态。

segment.source: Options |Speech, Beep, Off
segment.target: 选项 | 语音、提示音、关闭

segment.source: Default |Speech
segment.target: 默认 | 语音

segment.source: Punctuation/Symbol Level
segment.target: 标点符号级别

segment.source: Key: NVDA+p
segment.target: 按键: NVDA+p

segment.source: This allows you to choose the amount of punctuation and other symbols that should be spoken as words.
segment.target: 此选项允许您定义朗读时，标点和符号朗读的数量。

segment.source: For example, when set to all, all symbols will be spoken as words.
segment.target: 例如，设置成“全部符号”，朗读时所有标点都会被读出。

segment.source: This option applies to all synthesizers, not just the currently active synthesizer.
segment.target: 此选项应用于所有的合成器，而并不仅用于当前激活的合成器。

segment.source: Trust voice's language when processing characters and symbols
segment.target: 处理字符和标点时信任语音的语言

segment.source: On by default, this option tells NVDA if the current voice's language can be trusted when processing symbols and characters.
segment.target: 默认启用，该选项告诉 NVDA 在处理字符和标点时当前语音语言是否可信。

segment.source: If you find that NVDA is reading punctuation in the wrong language for a particular synthesizer or voice, you may wish to turn this off to force NVDA to use its global language setting instead.
segment.target: 如果您发现 NVDA 在使用特定的合成器或声音读出某标点时使用了错误的语言，您可能希望将其关闭并强制 NVDA 使用其自身的本地设置来代替语音语言。

segment.source: Unicode normalization
segment.target: Unicode 规范化

segment.source: When this option is enabled, unicode normalization is performed on the text that is spoken by NVDA.
segment.target: 启用此选项后，NVDA 会对朗读的文本进行 Unicode 规范化。

segment.source: This is beneficial when speaking characters that can be represented in several forms.
segment.target: 当发音的字符可以有多种表示形式时，这个选项非常有用。

segment.source: NVDA uses the NFKC (Normalization Form Compatibility Composition) algorithm, which provides the following benefits, among others:
segment.target: NVDA 使用 NFKC（Normalization Form Compatibility Composition）算法，该算法有以下优势：

segment.source: The bold and italic versions of characters that are part of the Unicode standard and are commonly used on social media are normalized to their most common compatible equivalent.
segment.target: 对属于 Unicode 标准的字符的粗体和斜体版本进行规范化，这些字符通常在社交媒体上使用，会被规范化为它们最常见的兼容等效形式。

segment.source: For example, the Latin letter "h" can also be presented as "𝐡" (bold), "ℎ" (italic), etc. but will always be spoken as "h" when normalization is enabled.
segment.target: 例如，拉丁字母“h”也可以表示为“𝐡”（粗体）、“ℎ”（斜体）等，但启用规范化后，这些字符总是会被发音为“h”。

segment.source: This aspect of normalization also aids in reading equations in the Microsoft Word equation editor.
segment.target: 使用 Unicode 规范化还有助于在 Microsoft Word 公式编辑器中读取公式。

segment.source: Normalization to composed characters.
segment.target: 规范化为组合字符。

segment.source: For example, the character "ü" (u with umlaut/diaeresis), a common character in languages like German and Turkish can be represented in two forms:
segment.target: 例如，字符“ü”（带分音符/变音符的 u），在德语和土耳其语等语言中是常见字符，可以有两种表示形式：

segment.source: One standalone Unicode character (ü)
segment.target: 一个独立的 Unicode 字符（ü）

segment.source: A decomposition into two characters (ü), namely the normal Latin letter u and a diaeresis modifier
segment.target: 分解为两个字符（ü），即普通的拉丁字母 u 和分音符修饰符

segment.source: Unicode normalization ensures that only one form will be used throughout all speech output, which is the single-character variant.
segment.target: Unicode 规范化确保在所有语音输出中只使用一种形式，即单个字符的变体。

segment.source: Decomposition of some ligatures, Including "ĳ" (ligature ij) to their two letter form ("ij").
segment.target: 对某些连字进行分解，例如将“ĳ”（连字 ij）分解为两个字母形式（“ij”）。

segment.source: Stable ordering of modifiers in composite characters, for example in ancient Hebrew.
segment.target: 稳定复合字符中修饰符的顺序，例如在古希伯来语中。

segment.source: To toggle Unicode normalization from anywhere, please assign a custom gesture using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 如需随时切换 Unicode 规范化，请在[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)为该功能分配自定义手势。

segment.source: Options |Default (Enabled), Enabled, Disabled
segment.target: 选项 | 默认（已启用）、已启用、已禁用

segment.source: Default |Enabled
segment.target: 默认 | 已启用

segment.source: Report "Normalized" when navigating by character
segment.target: 按字符导航时提示规范化

segment.source: This setting is a checkbox that, when checked, tells NVDA to explicitly report that a character is normalized when spoken as an individual character such as when spelling.
segment.target: 此设置是一个复选框，勾选后，NVDA 在单独朗读字符（如拼写时）会明确提示字符已规范化。

segment.source: For example, when this option is enabled, spelling the character "ĳ" will pronounce it as "i j normalized".
segment.target: 例如，当启用此选项时，拼写字符“ĳ”将会朗读为“i j 规范化”。

segment.source: Note that this setting is only available when "[Unicode normalization](#SpeechUnicodeNormalization)" is enabled.
segment.target: 注意，此设置仅在启用了“[Unicode 规范化](#SpeechUnicodeNormalization)”时生效。

segment.source: Include Unicode Consortium data (including emoji) when processing characters and symbols
segment.target: 处理字符和符号时包含 Unicode 联盟提供的数据（包括表情符号）

segment.source: When this checkbox is checked, NVDA will include additional symbol pronunciation dictionaries when pronouncing characters and symbols.
segment.target: 启用此复选框后，NVDA 将在拼读字符和符号时包含其他符号发音词典。

segment.source: These dictionaries contain descriptions for symbols (particularly emoji) that are provided by the [Unicode Consortium](https://www.unicode.org/consortium/) as part of their [Common Locale Data Repository](http://cldr.unicode.org/).
segment.target: 这些词典包含[Unicode 联盟](https://www.unicode.org/consortium/consort.html)在[通用本地化数据库](http://cldr.unicode.org/)中提供的一部分符号（特别是表情符号）的描述。

segment.source: If you want NVDA to speak descriptions of emoji characters based on this data, you should enable this option.
segment.target: 如果您希望 NVDA 根据此数据拼读表情符号以及其他字符的描述，则应启用此选项。

segment.source: However, if you are using a speech synthesizer that supports speaking emoji descriptions natively, you may wish to turn this off.
segment.target: 但是，如果您使用的语音合成器本身支持表情符号，您可以关闭这个选项。

segment.source: Note that manually added or edited character descriptions are saved as part of your user settings.
segment.target: 请注意，手动添加或编辑的符号说明将保存为用户设置的一部分。

segment.source: Therefore, if you change the description of a particular emoji, your custom description will be spoken for that emoji regardless of whether this option is enabled.
segment.target: 因此，如果您更改特定表情符号的说明，则无论是否启用此选项，该表情符号按照自定义说明朗读。

segment.source: You can add, edit or remove symbol descriptions in NVDA's [punctuation/symbol pronunciation dialog](#SymbolPronunciation).
segment.target: 您可以在 NVDA 的[标点符号读音](#SymbolPronunciation)设置中添加，编辑或删除符号说明。

segment.source: To toggle Unicode Consortium data inclusion from anywhere, please assign a custom gesture using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 若要随时切换是否包含这些数据，请使用[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)为该功能分配自定义快捷键。

segment.source: Capital pitch change percentage
segment.target: 大写时音高变化的百分比

segment.source: This edit field allows you to type the amount that the pitch of the voice will change when speaking a capital letter.
segment.target: 这是一个编辑框，允许您定义在遇到大写字母时，语音语调变化的数值。

segment.source: This value is a percentage, where a negative value lowers the pitch and a positive value raises it.
segment.target: 此数值是一个百分数，负数语调降低，正数语调升高。

segment.source: For no pitch change you would use 0.
segment.target: 设置为 0 时语调不变。

segment.source: Usually, NVDA raises the pitch slightly for any capital letter, but some synthesizers may not support this well.
segment.target: 通常，NVDA 遇到大写字母时会略微提高音调，但某些合成器可能无法支持此特性。

segment.source: In case pitch change for capitals is not supported, consider [Say "cap" before capitals](#SpeechSettingsSayCapBefore) and/or [Beep for capitals](#SpeechSettingsBeepForCaps) instead.
segment.target: 如果不支持遇到大写字母时提高音调，请考虑使用[遇到大写字母时先提示“大写”](#SpeechSettingsSayCapBefore)和/或[遇到大写字母时发出提示音](#SpeechSettingsBeepForCaps)。

segment.source: Say "cap" before capitals
segment.target: 遇到大写字母时先提示“大写”

segment.source: This setting is a checkbox that, when checked, tells NVDA to say the word "cap" before any capital letter when spoken as an individual character such as when spelling.
segment.target: 此设置是一个复选框，如果选择，告诉 NVDA，在读出单独的大写字母之前提示“大写”字样。

segment.source: Beep for capitals
segment.target: 遇到大写字母时发出提示音

segment.source: If this checkbox is checked, NVDA will make a small beep each time it encounters a capitalized character by itself.
segment.target: 如果此复选框被选中，每次遇到大写字母时，NVDA 会发出一个短促的提示音。

segment.source: Use spelling functionality if supported
segment.target: 在合成器支持的情况下激活拼读功能

segment.source: Some words consist of only one character, but the pronunciation is different depending on whether the character is being spoken as an individual character (such as when spelling) or a word.
segment.target: 一些单词由一个字符组成，而朗读的标点符号会依照读出的字符（例如一个单独的字符（在单词拼读时）或者一个单词）而不同。

segment.source: For example, in English, "a" is both a letter and a word and is pronounced differently in each case.
segment.target: 例如，“a”在英语里既用来表示“a”这个字母，也是一个单词，并且在不同的场景下读法也不尽相同。

segment.source: This option allows the synthesizer to differentiate between these two cases if the synthesizer supports this.
segment.target: 此选项允许合成器在这两者之间进行区分，前提是合成器支持这个特性。

segment.source: Most synthesizers do support it.
segment.target: 大多数合成器对此作了支持。

segment.source: This option should generally be enabled.
segment.target: 此选项通常应该开启。

segment.source: However, some Microsoft Speech API synthesizers do not implement this correctly and behave strangely when it is enabled.
segment.target: 然而，一些微软语音接口的合成器不能正确地支持此特性，当启用该选项时个别字符发音会非常奇怪（译者注：如果使用的是 VVTTS，建议关闭）。

segment.source: Synthesizers from Code Factory, both the add-on and the SAPI application, do not implement it correctly either and cause unwanted spelling of the spoken text (e.g. in NVDA menu or dialogs).
segment.target: 另外，Code Factory 的合成器（无论是插件还是 SAPI 接口的语音库）都无法实现该特性，并可能导致朗读的文本出现意外拼写（例如在 NVDA 菜单或对话框中）。

segment.source: If you are having problems with the pronunciation of individual characters, try disabling this option.
segment.target: 如果在朗读单独的字符时发音出现问题，请尝试停用此选项。

segment.source: Delayed descriptions for characters on cursor movement
segment.target: 移动光标后读出字符解释

segment.source: Options |Enabled, Disabled
segment.target: 选项 | 已启用、已禁用

segment.source: Default |Disabled
segment.target: 默认 | 已禁用

segment.source: When this setting is checked, NVDA will say the character description when you move by characters.
segment.target: 选中该选项后，NVDA 会在您按字符移动时读出字符解释。

segment.source: For example, while reviewing a line by characters, when the letter "b" is read NVDA will say "Bravo" after a 1 second delay.
segment.target: 例如，在逐字查看某一行文字时，若遇到字母“b”，NVDA 会延迟 1 秒后读出“Bravo、第二个字母”。

segment.source: This can be useful if it is hard to distinguish between pronunciation of symbols, or for hearing impaired users.
segment.target: 若难以区分某个字符的发音，或者对于听力障碍的用户来说，这可能是个有用的功能。

segment.source: The delayed character description will be cancelled if other text is spoken during that time, or if you press the `control` key.
segment.target: 如果在读出解释期间朗读了其他内容，或者如果您按下了 `Ctrl` 键，字符解释会被打断。

segment.source: Modes available in the Cycle speech mode command
segment.target: 循环语音模式中可用的模式

segment.source: This checkable list allows selecting which [speech modes](#SpeechModes) are included when cycling between them using `NVDA+s`.
segment.target: 这个列表中有几个复选框，决定了哪些模式可以在按 `NVDA+s` 循环切换[语音模式](#SpeechModes)时被切换到。

segment.source: Modes which are unchecked are excluded.
segment.target: 此处未选中的模式则会被排除。

segment.source: By default all modes are included.
segment.target: 默认情况下包含所有模式。

segment.source: For example if you do not need to use "beeps" and "off" mode you should uncheck these two, and keep both "talk" and "on-demand" checked.
segment.target: 例如，如您不需要使用“提示音”和“不朗读”，您应取消选中这两个模式，并选中“正常朗读”和“手动朗读”。

segment.source: Note that it is necessary to check at least two modes.
segment.target: 请注意，必须至少选中两种模式。

segment.source: Select Synthesizer
segment.target: 选择语音合成器

segment.source: Open Select Synthesizer dialog
segment.target: 打开选择语音合成器对话框

segment.source: Key: `NVDA+control+s`
segment.target: 按键：`NVDA+Ctrl+s`

segment.source: The Synthesizer dialog, which can be opened by activating the Change... button in the speech category of the NVDA settings dialog, allows you to select which Synthesizer NVDA should use to speak with.
segment.target: 在语音类别中点击“修改”按钮，就会打开此对话框。您可以在这里更改 NVDA 使用的语音合成器。

segment.source: Once you have selected your synthesizer of choice, you can press Ok and NVDA will load the selected Synthesizer.
segment.target: 当您选中想要的合成器后，点击“确认”按钮，NVDA 将加载您选择的合成器。

segment.source: If there is an error loading the synthesizer, NVDA will notify you with a message, and continue using the previous synthesizer.
segment.target: 如加载时发生错误，NVDA 会向您显示一条通知消息，继续使用上一次选择的合成器。

segment.source: Synthesizer
segment.target: 语音合成器

segment.source: This option allows you to choose the synthesizer you wish NVDA to use for speech output.
segment.target: 此选项允许您选择 NVDA 语音输出时使用的语音合成器。

segment.source: For a list of the Synthesizers that NVDA supports, please see the [Supported Speech Synthesizers](#SupportedSpeechSynths) section.
segment.target: NVDA 支持的合成器列表可以在[支持的语音合成器](#SupportedSpeechSynths)章节查看。

segment.source: One special item that will always appear in this list is "No speech", which allows you to use NVDA with no speech output whatsoever.
segment.target: 出现在列表中的一个特殊的项目“关闭语音”，允许您在没有语音输出的情况下使用 NVDA。

segment.source: This may be useful for someone who wishes to only use NVDA with braille, or perhaps to sighted developers who only wish to use the Speech Viewer.
segment.target: 此选项对于只想用盲文输出的用户或者只想用“语音查看器”查看语音内容的开发者来说非常有用。

segment.source: Synth settings ring
segment.target: 循环切换合成器设置

segment.source: If you wish to quickly change speech settings without going to the Speech category of the NVDA settings dialog, there are some NVDA key commands that allow you to move through the most common speech settings from anywhere while running NVDA:
segment.target: 如果您想在不进入“语音设置”对话框的情况下随时对最常用的语音选项进行修改，可以使用下列快捷键：

segment.source: Name |Desktop key |Laptop key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 台式机键盘 | 笔记本键盘 | 描述

segment.source: Move to next synth setting |NVDA+control+rightArrow |NVDA+shift+control+rightArrow |Moves to the next available speech setting after the current, wrapping around to the first setting again after the last
segment.target: 移动到下一个合成器设置 | `NVDA+Ctrl+右光标` | `NVDA+Shift+Ctrl+右光标` | 移动到当前设置的下一个可用的语音设置，移动到最后一个设置后会再次循环至第一个

segment.source: Move to previous synth setting |NVDA+control+leftArrow |NVDA+shift+control+leftArrow |Moves to the next available speech setting before the current, wrapping around to the last setting after the first
segment.target: 移动到上一个合成器设置 | `NVDA+Ctrl+左光标` |`NVDA+Shift+Ctrl+左光标` | 移动到当前设置的上一个可用的语音设置，移动到第一个设置后会再次循环至最后一个

segment.source: Increment current synth setting |NVDA+control+upArrow |NVDA+shift+control+upArrow |increases the current speech setting you are on. E.g. increases the rate, chooses the next voice, increases the volume
segment.target: 增加当前合成器设置的值 | `NVDA+Ctrl+上光标` |`NVDA+Shift+Ctrl+上光标` | 增加当前所在语音设置的值，例如加快速度，选择下一个语音，增大音量

segment.source: Increment the current synth setting in a larger step |`NVDA+control+pageUp` |`NVDA+shift+control+pageUp` |Increases the value of the current speech setting you're on in larger steps. e.g. when you're on a voice setting, it will jump forward every 20 voices; when you're on slider settings (rate, pitch, etc) it will jump forward the value up to 20%
segment.target: 以更大的步长增加当前语音选项的设置值 | `NVDA+Ctrl+上翻页` | `NVDA+Shift+Ctrl+上翻页` | 以更大的步长增加当前语音设置的值。例如当你处于语音设置时，每一次会跳过 20 个语音角色；当您处于滑块设置（速度、音调等）时，每次会增加 20%

segment.source: Decrement current synth setting |NVDA+control+downArrow |NVDA+shift+control+downArrow |decreases the current speech setting you are on. E.g. decreases the rate, chooses the previous voice, decreases the volume
segment.target: 减小当前合成器设置的值 | `NVDA+Ctrl+下光标` |`NVDA+Shift+Ctrl+下光标` | 减小当前所在语音设置的值，例如减慢速度，选择上一个语音，减小音量

segment.source: Decrement the current synth setting in a larger step |`NVDA+control+pageDown` |`NVDA+shift+control+pageDown` |Decreases the value of the current speech setting you're on in larger steps. e.g. when you're on a voice setting, it will jump backward every 20 voices; when you're on a slider setting, it will jump backward the value up to 20%
segment.target: 以更大的步长减小当前语音选项的设置值 | `NVDA+Ctrl+下翻页` | `NVDA+Shift+Ctrl+下翻页` | 以更大的步长减小当前语音设置的值。例如当你处于语音设置时，每一次会跳过 20 个语音角色；当您处于滑块设置时，每次会减小 20%

segment.source: Set the first value of the current synth setting |none |none |Select the first value of the current speech setting, e.g. set rate to 0 or select the first available voice
segment.target: 设置当前语音选项为第一个值 | 无 | 无 | 选择当前语音设置的第一个值，例如将速度设置为 0 或选择第一个可用语音

segment.source: Set the last value of the current synth setting |none |none |Select the last value of the current speech setting, e.g. set rate to 100 or select the last available voice
segment.target: 设置当前语音选项为最后一个值 | 无 | 无 | 选择当前语音设置的最后一个值，例如将速度设置为 100 或选择最后一个可用语音

segment.source: Braille
segment.target: 盲文

segment.source: The Braille category in the NVDA Settings dialog contains options that let you change several aspects of braille input and output.
segment.target: 盲文设置类别用于更改盲文输入和输出的相关设置。

segment.source: This category contains the following options:
segment.target: 该类别包含以下选项：

segment.source: Change braille display
segment.target: 更改盲文点显器

segment.source: The Change... button in the Braille category of the NVDA Settings dialog activates the [Select Braille Display](#SelectBrailleDisplay) dialog, which allows you to select the active braille display.
segment.target: 按下该按钮，将打开[选择盲文点显器](#SelectBrailleDisplay)对话框。

segment.source: This dialog opens on top of the NVDA Settings dialog.
segment.target: 此对话框会出现在 NVDA 设置对话框上面。

segment.source: Saving or dismissing the settings in the Select Braille Display dialog will return you to the NVDA Settings dialog.
segment.target: 在此对话框保存或取消设置后，会返回 NVDA 设置对话框。

segment.source: Output Table
segment.target: 输出表

segment.source: The next option you will come to in this category is the braille output table combo box.
segment.target: 这个类别的下一个选项是“输出表”组合框。

segment.source: In this combo box, you will find braille tables for different languages, braille standards and grades.
segment.target: 在该组合框内，您可以找到不同语言的标准级别或其他级别的盲文输出表。

segment.source: The chosen table will be used to translate text into braille to be presented on your braille display.
segment.target: 选择的输出表将用于盲文翻译并输出到点显器。

segment.source: You can move from braille table to braille table in the list by using the arrow keys.
segment.target: 您可以使用光标键在盲文表的列表之间移动。

segment.source: If you select "Automatic", the table will be selected according with NVDA's current language.
segment.target: 如果选择“自动”，则将根据 NVDA 的当前语言选择盲文表。

segment.source: Input Table
segment.target: 输入表

segment.source: Complementary to the previous option, the next setting you will find is the braille input table combo box.
segment.target: 和上一个选项对应，您会发现下一个选项是“输入表”组合框。

segment.source: The chosen table will be used to translate braille entered on your braille display's Perkins-style keyboard into text.
segment.target: 选择的输入表将用来翻译由点显器 Perkins style 键盘所输入的文本。NVDA 目前仅支持计算机盲文的输入，因此，只有八点盲文表才会显示出来。

segment.source: You can move from braille table to braille table in the list by using the arrow keys.
segment.target: 您可以使用光标键在盲文表之间移动。

segment.source: Note that this option is only useful if your braille display has a Perkins-style keyboard and this feature is supported by the braille display driver.
segment.target: 请注意，只有当您的点显器带有 Perkins-style 键盘且点显器驱动支持此特性时，此选项才可用。

segment.source: If input is not supported on a display which does have a braille keyboard, this will be noted in the [Supported Braille Displays](#SupportedBrailleDisplays) section.
segment.target: 如果某个带有盲文输入键盘的点显器确实不能支持输入，会在[支持的点显器](#SupportedBrailleDisplays)章节中记录。

segment.source: Braille mode
segment.target: 盲文模式

segment.source: Key: `NVDA+alt+t`
segment.target: 按键：`NVDA+Alt+t`

segment.source: This option allows you to select between the available braille modes.
segment.target: 此选项可以让您在可用的盲文模式之间进行切换。

segment.source: Currently, two braille modes are supported, "follow cursors" and "display speech output".
segment.target: 目前支持两种盲文模式，“跟随光标”和“显示语音输出”。

segment.source: When follow cursors is selected, the braille display will follow either the system focus/caret or the navigator object/review cursor, depending on what braille is tethered to.
segment.target: 选择跟随光标后，盲文点显器将跟随系统焦点/光标或导航对象/查看光标，具体取决于“盲文显示跟随”设置。

segment.source: When display speech output is selected, the braille display will show what NVDA speaks, or would have spoken if speech mode was set to "talk".
segment.target: 选择显示语音输出后，盲文点显器会完全显示 NVDA 所朗读的内容，即使将语音模式设置为“正常朗读”以外的其他模式该设置也会生效。

segment.source: Expand to computer braille for the word at the cursor
segment.target: 将光标所在单词转换为计算机盲文

segment.source: This option allows the word that is under the cursor to be displayed in non-contracted computer braille.
segment.target: 此选项可以把光标下面的单词以非缩写形式的计算机盲文进行显示。

segment.source: Show Cursor
segment.target: 显示光标

segment.source: This option allows the braille cursor to be turned on and off.
segment.target: 此选项允许您对盲文光标进行开关。

segment.source: It applies to the system caret and review cursor, but not to the selection indicator.
segment.target: 该设置会应用到系统光标和查看光标，而并不会作用于选择指示器。换言之，此选项对选择指示器无效。

segment.source: Blink Cursor
segment.target: 光标闪烁

segment.source: This option allows the braille cursor to blink.
segment.target: 选中这个选项开启盲文光标闪烁。

segment.source: If blinking is turned off, the braille cursor will constantly be in the "up" position.
segment.target: 如果关闭闪烁，盲文光标将始终处于“固定”位置。

segment.source: The selection indicator is not affected by this option, it is always dots 7 and 8 without blinking.
segment.target: 选择指示光标不受影响，它一直位于 7 点和 8 点，而且不会闪烁。

segment.source: Cursor Blink Rate (ms)
segment.target: 光标闪烁频率（以毫秒为单位）

segment.source: This option is a numerical field that allows you to change the blink rate of the cursor in milliseconds.
segment.target: 此选项是一个数字区域，允许您以毫秒为单位更改光标的闪烁速度。

segment.source: Cursor Shape for Focus
segment.target: 光标形状

segment.source: This option allows you to choose the shape (dot pattern) of the braille cursor when braille is tethered to focus.
segment.target: 此选项允许您选择盲文光标的形状（即盲文点位）。

segment.source: The selection indicator is not affected by this option, it is always dots 7 and 8 without blinking.
segment.target: 此选项对选择指示器无效。

segment.source: Cursor Shape for Review
segment.target: 跟随查看光标时盲文光标的形状

segment.source: This option allows you to choose the shape (dot pattern) of the braille cursor when braille is tethered to review.
segment.target: 此选项允许您在盲文光标跟随查看光标时，选择盲文光标的形状（哪些点位）。

segment.source: The selection indicator is not affected by this option, it is always dots 7 and 8 without blinking.
segment.target: 选择指示光标不受影响，它一直位于 7 点和 8 点，而且不会闪烁。

segment.source: Show Messages
segment.target: 显示消息

segment.source: This is a combobox that allows you to select if NVDA should display braille messages and when they should disappear automatically.
segment.target: 这是一个组合框，可让您选择 NVDA 是否应显示盲文消息，如果显示，那么在多长时间后消失。

segment.source: To toggle show messages from anywhere, please assign a custom gesture using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 若要随时切换显示消息，请在[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)中分配一个自定义按键或手势.

segment.source: Message Timeout (sec)
segment.target: 消息显示时间（以秒为单位）

segment.source: This option is a numerical field that controls how long NVDA messages are displayed on the braille display.
segment.target: 这是一个数字区域，允许您控制 NVDA 的消息将在点显器上显示多长时间。

segment.source: The NVDA message is immediately dismissed when pressing a routing key on the braille display, but appears again when pressing a corresponding key which triggers the message.
segment.target: 当按下点显器上的光标定位键时，NVDA 消息立即被消除，但是当按下触发消息的键时，NVDA 消息再次出现。

segment.source: This option is shown only if "Show Messages" is set to "Use timeout".
segment.target: 仅当“显示消息”设置为“使用超时”时，才显示此选项。

segment.source: Tether Braille
segment.target: 盲文光标跟随

segment.source: Key: NVDA+control+t
segment.target: 按键: NVDA+Ctrl+t

segment.source: This option allows you to choose whether the braille display will follow the system focus / caret, the navigator object / review cursor, or both.
segment.target: 此选项允许您选择是否希望点显器跟随系统焦点/系统光标、导航对象/查看光标或自动。

segment.source: When "automatically" is selected, NVDA will follow the system focus and caret by default.
segment.target: 如果选中了“自动”，盲文光标会默认跟随系统焦点或系统光标。

segment.source: In this case, when the navigator object or the review cursor position is changed by means of explicit user interaction, NVDA will tether to review temporarily, until the focus or the caret changes.
segment.target: 此时，如果用户操作改变了导航对象或查看光标，NVDA 会让盲文光标暂时跟随查看光标，直到系统焦点或者系统光标改变为止。

segment.source: If you want it to follow the focus and caret only, you need to configure braille to be tethered to focus.
segment.target: 如果您想让盲文光标只跟随系统焦点或系统光标，需要把这个设置改成焦点。

segment.source: In this case, braille will not follow the NVDA navigator during object navigation or the review cursor during review.
segment.target: 此时，盲文光标不会跟随导航对象或查看光标。

segment.source: If you want braille to follow object navigation and text review instead, you need to configure braille to be tethered to review.
segment.target: 如果您想让盲文光标只跟随对象导航或文本查看，需要把这个设置改成查看光标。

segment.source: In this case, Braille will not follow system focus and system caret.
segment.target: 此时盲文光标不再跟随系统焦点或系统光标。

segment.source: Move system caret when routing review cursor
segment.target: 移动查看光标时移动系统光标

segment.source: This setting determines if the system caret should also be moved with a routing button press.
segment.target: 此设置决定是否应该在按下盲文点显器上的定位按键后移动系统光标。
