segment.target: 在文档校对时为某些程序（如 Wordpad）启用此选项非常实用，因为格式信息很重要。

segment.source: Spelling and grammar error reporting
segment.target: 提示拼写和语法错误

segment.source: The checkboxes in this list allow you to configure how spelling and grammar errors are reported while reading text.
segment.target: 此列表中的复选框允许您配置在阅读文本时如何提示拼写和语法错误。

segment.source: You can choose any combination of the following three options:
segment.target: 您可选择以下三个选项的任意组合：

segment.source: Speech: NVDA will say "spelling error" or "grammar error" when an error is encountered while reading text.
segment.target: 语音：当阅读文本时遇到拼写或语法错误，NVDA 将读出“拼写错误”或“语法错误”

segment.source: Sound: NVDA will play a short buzzer sound when a spelling or grammar error is encountered while reading text.
segment.target: 提示音：当阅读文本时遇到拼写或语法错误，NVDA 将播放短促的提示音

segment.source: When navigating word by word or character by character, "out of spelling error" or "out of grammar error" is also reported if the "Speech" or "Sound" option is selected.
segment.target: 当逐词或逐字导航时，如果选择了“语音”或“提示音”选项，在离开错误区域时会读出“离开拼写错误”或“离开语法错误”。

segment.source: Braille: NVDA will indicate spelling or grammar errors in braille.
segment.target: 盲文：NVDA 将以盲文呈现拼写或语法错误。

segment.source: To have spelling or grammar errors reported in braille, [formatting display with tags](#BrailleFormattingDisplayTags) must be enabled.
segment.target: 要以盲文呈现拼写或语法错误，必须将格式信息的显示方式设置为[标记](#BrailleFormattingDisplayTags)。

segment.source: Due to performance limitations, errors are not reported with speech or sounds when navigating by paragraph or by cell in tables, no matter the options selected.
segment.target: 由于性能限制，无论选择何种选项，在按段落导航或在表格中按单元格导航时，拼写或语法错误都不会通过语音或提示音进行提示。

segment.source: In these cases, errors can only be reported in braille.
segment.target: 在这些情况下，拼写或语法错误只能通过盲文呈现。

segment.source: By default, errors will be reported with speech.
segment.target: 默认情况下，拼写或语法错误将通过语音进行提示。

segment.source: To cycle through available options to report errors via audio, please assign a custom gesture using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 要循环切换是否以音频提示拼写或语法错误，请使用[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)分配自定义快捷键。

segment.source: The available options are: Off, Speech, Sound, Speech and sound.
segment.target: 可用选项包括：关闭、语音、提示音、语音和提示音。

segment.source: You can also assign a custom gesture to toggle the reporting of errors in braille using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 您还可在[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)为是否以盲文呈现拼写或语法错误的切换开关分配自定义快捷键。

segment.source: Line indentation reporting
segment.target: 行缩进的提示方式

segment.source: This option allows you to configure how indentation at the beginning of lines is reported.
segment.target: 此选项允许您定义如何提示行首位置的缩进。

segment.source: The Report line indentation with combo box has four options.
segment.target: “行缩进的提示方式为”组合框，包含四个选项。

segment.source: Off: NVDA will not treat indentation specially.
segment.target: 关闭：NVDA 不提示行首缩进。

segment.source: Speech: If speech is selected, when the amount of indentation changes, NVDA will say something like "twelve space" or "four tab."
segment.target: 语音：若选择该选项，当缩进个数发生变化时，NVDA 就会给出诸如“12 个空格”或“4 个制表符”这样的提示。

segment.source: Tones: If Tones is selected, when the amount of indentation changes, tones indicate the amount of change in indent.
segment.target: 提示音：若选择该选项，当缩进数量发生改变时，会以声音反馈缩进变化的量。

segment.source: The tone will increase in pitch every space, and for a tab, it will increase in pitch the equivalent of 4 spaces.
segment.target: 每增加一个空格或一个制表符，音调升高一个半音，也会为四个连续的空格升高伴音。

segment.source: Both Speech and Tones: This option reads indentation using both of the above methods.
segment.target: 语音和提示音：此选项将同时使用上述两种方式来提示缩进。

segment.source: If you tick the "Ignore blank lines for line indentation reporting" checkbox, then indentation changes won't be reported for blank lines.
segment.target: 如果勾选了“忽略空白行的行缩进”复选框则不会读出空白行的缩进变化。

segment.source: This may be useful when reading a document where blank lines are used to separate indented blocks of text, such as in programming source code.
segment.target: 在阅读使用空行来分隔缩进文本块的文档时（例如在个别编程语言的源代码中），这可能很有用。

segment.source: Document Navigation
segment.target: 文档导航

segment.source: This category allows you to adjust various aspects of document navigation.
segment.target: 该类别可以让您调整有关文档导航的各项设置。

segment.source: Paragraph Style
segment.target: 段落导航模式

segment.source: Options |Default (Handled by application), Handled by application, Single line break, Multi line break
segment.target: 选项 | 默认（由应用程序处理）、由应用程序处理、单行分段、多行分段

segment.source: Default |Handled by application
segment.target: 默认 | 由应用程序处理

segment.source: This combo box allows you to select the paragraph style to be used when navigating by paragraphs with `control+upArrow` and `control+downArrow`.
segment.target: 此组合框用于选择当您使用`Ctrl+上光标`和`Ctrl+下光标`进行段落导航时要使用的段落导航模式。

segment.source: The available paragraph styles are:
segment.target: 可用的导航模式包括：

segment.source: Handled by application: NVDA will let the application determine the previous or next paragraph, and NVDA will read the new paragraph when navigating.
segment.target: 由应用程序处理：交给应用程序来确定上一段或下一段，在执行段落导航时 NVDA 会读出相应的段落。

segment.source: This style works best when the application supports paragraph navigation natively, and is the default.
segment.target: 当应用程序本身支持段落导航时，此默认模式效果最佳。

segment.source: Single line break: NVDA will attempt to determine the previous or next paragraph using a single line break as the paragraph indicator.
segment.target: 单行分段：尝试使用单行分段（换行）作为段落指示符来确定上一段或下一段。

segment.source: This style works best when reading documents in an application which does not natively support paragraph navigation, and paragraphs in the document are marked by a single press of the `enter` key.
segment.target: 在本身不支持段落导航的应用程序中阅读文档时，使用该模式效果最佳，书写时通过按一次`回车`键来标记文档中的各个段落。

segment.source: Multi line break: NVDA will attempt to determine the previous or next paragraph using at least one blank line (two presses of the `enter` key) as the paragraph indicator.
segment.target: 多行分段：尝试使用至少一个空行（书写时，按两次`回车`键）作为段落指示符来确定上一段或下一段。

segment.source: This style works best when working with documents which use block paragraphs.
segment.target: 该模式在处理那些使用了块段落（block paragraphs）的文档时效果最佳。

segment.source: Note that this paragraph style cannot be used in Microsoft Word or Microsoft Outlook, unless you are using UIA to access Microsoft Word controls.
segment.target: 请注意，不能在 Microsoft Word 或 Microsoft Outlook 中使用该模式，除非您在 Word 中启用了 UIA 接口支持。

segment.source: You may toggle through the available paragraph styles from anywhere by assigning a key in the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 您可以在[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)的“系统光标”类别下分配一个快捷键，用于随时在段落导航模式之间循环切换。

segment.source: Math Settings
segment.target: 数学

segment.source: This category allows you to adjust how NVDA reads mathematical content.
segment.target: 该类别允许您调整 NVDA 阅读数学内容的方式。

segment.source: Speech Options
segment.target: Speech Options

segment.source: Impairment
segment.target: Impairment

segment.source: This controls whether certain notations are disambiguated or not in speech.
segment.target: This controls whether certain notations are disambiguated or not in speech.

segment.source: Options | Blindness, Low Vision, Learning disabilities
segment.target: Options | Blindness, Low Vision, Learning disabilities

segment.source: Default | Blindness
segment.target: Default | Blindness

segment.source: Language
segment.target: Language

segment.source: This value determines the language to be used.
segment.target: This value determines the language to be used.

segment.source: If the regional variant is not found among the speech rules, the speech will fall back to using the main language.
segment.target: If the regional variant is not found among the speech rules, the speech will fall back to using the main language.

segment.source: If speech rules for the main language cannot be found, English ("en") is used.
segment.target: If speech rules for the main language cannot be found, English ("en") is used.

segment.source: Options | Automatic, English, English (en-GB), Chinese (Traditional) (zh-TW), Finnish, German, Indonesian, Norwegian Bokmål, Spanish, Swedish, Vietnamese
segment.target: Options | Automatic, English, English (en-GB), Chinese (Traditional) (zh-TW), Finnish, German, Indonesian, Norwegian Bokmål, Spanish, Swedish, Vietnamese

segment.source: Default | Automatic (the language of the current voice if supported, or fallback to English)
segment.target: Default | Automatic (the language of the current voice if supported, or fallback to English)

segment.source: Speech Style
segment.target: Speech Style

segment.source: Different styles can be used to speak mathematical content.
segment.target: Different styles can be used to speak mathematical content.

segment.source: Each [math speech language](#MathSpeechLanguage) has different speech styles available.
segment.target: Each [math speech language](#MathSpeechLanguage) has different speech styles available.

segment.source: For English and most languages, the following styles are available:
segment.target: For English and most languages, the following styles are available:

segment.source: ClearSpeak was developed by the Educational Testing Service for use on university-admission and other high-stakes tests in the United States.
segment.target: ClearSpeak was developed by the Educational Testing Service for use on university-admission and other high-stakes tests in the United States.

segment.source: Refer to the [ClearSpeak specification details in this Word document](https://daisy.github.io/MathCAT/ClearSpeakRulesAndPreferences.docx).
segment.target: Refer to the [ClearSpeak specification details in this Word document](https://daisy.github.io/MathCAT/ClearSpeakRulesAndPreferences.docx).

segment.source: SimpleSpeak tries to minimize speech by speaking simple expressions such as $\frac{a}{b}$ quickly without bracketing words ("a over b").
segment.target: SimpleSpeak tries to minimize speech by speaking simple expressions such as $\frac{a}{b}$ quickly without bracketing words ("a over b").

segment.source: These are distinguished from more complex expressions such as $\frac{a}{b+1}$ which will always have bracketing words ("fraction a over b plus 1 end fraction").
segment.target: These are distinguished from more complex expressions such as $\frac{a}{b+1}$ which will always have bracketing words ("fraction a over b plus 1 end fraction").

segment.source: LiteralSpeak tells MathCAT to speak math expressions almost exactly as written, without interpreting the symbols or meaning.
segment.target: LiteralSpeak tells MathCAT to speak math expressions almost exactly as written, without interpreting the symbols or meaning.

segment.source: It prioritizes literal reading (character-by-character or symbol-by-symbol), rather than mathematical meaning.
segment.target: It prioritizes literal reading (character-by-character or symbol-by-symbol), rather than mathematical meaning.

segment.source: Examples of each type of speech:
segment.target: Examples of each type of speech:

segment.source: Expression | LiteralSpeak | SimpleSpeak | ClearSpeak
segment.target: Expression | LiteralSpeak | SimpleSpeak | ClearSpeak

segment.source: 1/2 | 1 slash 2 | 1 divided by 2 | one half
segment.target: 1/2 | 1 slash 2 | 1 divided by 2 | one half

segment.source: √x | radical x | square root x | square root of x
segment.target: √x | radical x | square root x | square root of x

segment.source: Options | ClearSpeak, SimpleSpeak, LiteralSpeak, or other options depending on your language
segment.target: Options | ClearSpeak, SimpleSpeak, LiteralSpeak, or other options depending on your language

segment.source: Default | Depends on the language
segment.target: Default | Depends on the language

segment.source: Speech verbosity
segment.target: Speech verbosity

segment.source: This option controls how much "extra" speech is used.
segment.target: This option controls how much "extra" speech is used.

segment.source: For example, square roots are verbosely spoken as "the square root of x" and tersely spoken as "square root x".
segment.target: For example, square roots are verbosely spoken as "the square root of x" and tersely spoken as "square root x".

segment.source: Options | Terse, Medium, Verbose
segment.target: Options | Terse, Medium, Verbose

segment.source: Default | Medium
segment.target: Default | Medium

segment.source: Relative speech rate
segment.target: Relative speech rate

segment.source: Changes the relative speech rate.
segment.target: Changes the relative speech rate.

segment.source: The change is a percentage speed change from the standard speech engine's rate.
segment.target: The change is a percentage speed change from the standard speech engine's rate.

segment.source: `100` means the reading rates of text and math content are the same, whereas `50` means that math content is read at half the speed of other content.
segment.target: `100` means the reading rates of text and math content are the same, whereas `50` means that math content is read at half the speed of other content.

segment.source: Options | Number between 1 and 100
segment.target: Options | Number between 1 and 100

segment.source: Default | 100
segment.target: Default | 100

segment.source: Pause Factor
segment.target: Pause Factor

segment.source: Changes the relative amount of pausing that MathCAT adds.
segment.target: Changes the relative amount of pausing that MathCAT adds.

segment.source: `0` turns off all pausing and `100` makes the pauses 10 times longer than normal.
segment.target: `0` turns off all pausing and `100` makes the pauses 10 times longer than normal.

segment.source: Options | Number between 0 and 100
segment.target: Options | Number between 0 and 100

segment.source: Default | 50
segment.target: Default | 50

segment.source: Beep at the beginning and end of math
segment.target: Beep at the beginning and end of math

segment.source: This option determines whether NVDA beeps at the beginning and end of math content.
segment.target: This option determines whether NVDA beeps at the beginning and end of math content.

segment.source: This option is disabled by default.
segment.target: 默认情况下此选项被禁用。

segment.source: Options | Checked, Unchecked
segment.target: Options | Checked, Unchecked

segment.source: Default | Unchecked
segment.target: Default | Unchecked

segment.source: Chemical formulae
segment.target: Chemical formulae

segment.source: This option controls how chemical formulae are read.
segment.target: This option controls how chemical formulae are read.

segment.source: Examples for $\mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{O}$:
segment.target: Examples for $\mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{O}$:

segment.source: Spell it out: "H 2 O" ([verbosity](#MathSpeechVerbosity) controls whether "sub"/"super" is spoken)
segment.target: Spell it out: "H 2 O" ([verbosity](#MathSpeechVerbosity) controls whether "sub"/"super" is spoken)

segment.source: Off: "H sub 2 O"
segment.target: Off: "H sub 2 O"

segment.source: Options | Spell it out, Off
segment.target: Options | Spell it out, Off

segment.source: Default | Spell it out
segment.target: Default | Spell it out

segment.source: When entering an equation
segment.target: When entering an equation

segment.source: Whether to speak the expression after moving to it or give an overview.
segment.target: Whether to speak the expression after moving to it or give an overview.

segment.source: Options | Speak, Describe overview
segment.target: Options | Speak, Describe overview

segment.source: Default | Speak
segment.target: Default | Speak

segment.source: Navigation Options
segment.target: Navigation Options

segment.source: Default navigation mode
segment.target: Default navigation mode

segment.source: "Enhanced" mode understands math structure.
segment.target: "Enhanced" mode understands math structure.

segment.source: "Simple" mode walks by character to find things like fractions, roots, and scripts.
segment.target: "Simple" mode walks by character to find things like fractions, roots, and scripts.

segment.source: "Character" mode moves around by character, automatically moving into fractions, etc.
segment.target: "Character" mode moves around by character, automatically moving into fractions, etc.

segment.source: Options | Enhanced, Character, Simple
segment.target: Options | Enhanced, Character, Simple

segment.source: Default | Enhanced
segment.target: Default | Enhanced

segment.source: Reset to the default navigation mode for each new equation
segment.target: Reset to the default navigation mode for each new equation

segment.source: This option selects whether NVDA resets to the default navigation mode when entering a new equation.
segment.target: This option selects whether NVDA resets to the default navigation mode when entering a new equation.

segment.source: When this option is disabled, NVDA preserves the last selected navigation mode across equations in the same NVDA session.
segment.target: When this option is disabled, NVDA preserves the last selected navigation mode across equations in the same NVDA session.

segment.source: This option is enabled by default.
segment.target: This option is enabled by default.

segment.source: Options | Checked, Unchecked
segment.target: Options | Checked, Unchecked

segment.source: Default | Checked
segment.target: Default | Checked

segment.source: Automatically zoom out of two-dimensional notation
segment.target: Automatically zoom out of two-dimensional notation

segment.source: Auto zoom out of 2D expressions like fractions (use `upArrow` to manually zoom out if this is unchecked).
segment.target: Auto zoom out of 2D expressions like fractions (use `upArrow` to manually zoom out if this is unchecked).

segment.source: This option is enabled by default.
segment.target: This option is enabled by default.

segment.source: Options | Checked, Unchecked
segment.target: Options | Checked, Unchecked

segment.source: Default | Checked
segment.target: Default | Checked

segment.source: Navigation verbosity
segment.target: Navigation verbosity

segment.source: This option specifies whether NVDA should read mathematical expressions in a terse or verbose manner during navigation.
segment.target: This option specifies whether NVDA should read mathematical expressions in a terse or verbose manner during navigation.

segment.source: Options | Terse, Medium, Verbose
segment.target: Options | Terse, Medium, Verbose

segment.source: Default | Medium
segment.target: Default | Medium

segment.source: Copy math as
segment.target: Copy math as

segment.source: This option selects the format of math content copied to the clipboard.
segment.target: This option selects the format of math content copied to the clipboard.

segment.source: Options | MathML, LaTeX, ASCIIMath, Speech
segment.target: Options | MathML, LaTeX, ASCIIMath, Speech

segment.source: Default | MathML
segment.target: Default | MathML

segment.source: Braille Options
segment.target: Braille Options

segment.source: Output code
segment.target: Output code

segment.source: The braille math code to use.
segment.target: The braille math code to use.

segment.source: When this option is set to "Automatic", NVDA selects a default math braille code based on the current NVDA language.
segment.target: When this option is set to "Automatic", NVDA selects a default math braille code based on the current NVDA language.

segment.source: Options | Automatic, ASCIIMath, ASCIIMath-Finnish, CMU, LaTeX, Nemeth, Swedish, UEB, Vietnam
segment.target: Options | Automatic, ASCIIMath, ASCIIMath-Finnish, CMU, LaTeX, Nemeth, Swedish, UEB, Vietnam

segment.source: Default | Automatic
segment.target: Default | Automatic

segment.source: Highlight navigation focus with dots 7 and 8
segment.target: Highlight navigation focus with dots 7 and 8

segment.source: This option determines whether NVDA indicates the currently selected subexpression with dots 7 and 8 during navigation.
segment.target: This option determines whether NVDA indicates the currently selected subexpression with dots 7 and 8 during navigation.

segment.source: The options allow for either no highlighting, only highlighting of the first character, highlighting of the first and last character, or highlighting of the entire subexpression.
segment.target: The options allow for either no highlighting, only highlighting of the first character, highlighting of the first and last character, or highlighting of the entire subexpression.

segment.source: Options | Off, First Character, Endpoints, All
segment.target: Options | Off, First Character, Endpoints, All

segment.source: Default | Endpoints
segment.target: Default | Endpoints

segment.source: Application support
segment.target: Application support

segment.source: Use native math support in Word and Outlook
segment.target: Use native math support in Word and Outlook

segment.source: This option disables MathCAT when reading and interacting with equations in Microsoft Word or Outlook.
segment.target: This option disables MathCAT when reading and interacting with equations in Microsoft Word or Outlook.

segment.source: This allows you to use the math presentation (speech, braille, and interaction) that is built-in to these programs.
segment.target: This allows you to use the math presentation (speech, braille, and interaction) that is built-in to these programs.

segment.source: You cannot use MathCAT in Microsoft Word or Outlook when this option is enabled.
segment.target: You cannot use MathCAT in Microsoft Word or Outlook when this option is enabled.

segment.source: This option does not affect MathCAT support in other programs.
segment.target: This option does not affect MathCAT support in other programs.

segment.source: Options | Checked, Unchecked
segment.target: Options | Checked, Unchecked

segment.source: Default | Unchecked
segment.target: Default | Unchecked

segment.source: Add-on Store Settings
segment.target: 插件商店

segment.source: This category allows you to adjust the behaviour of the Add-on Store.
segment.target: 该类别允许您调整插件商店的行为。

segment.source: Automatic updates
segment.target: 自动更新

segment.source: When this option is set to "Notify", the Add-on Store will notify you after NVDA startup if any add-on updates are available.
segment.target: 当此选项设置为“通知”时，插件商店将在 NVDA 启动后通知您是否有任何插件更新可用。

segment.source: This check is performed every 24 hours.
segment.target: 该检查每 24 小时执行一次。

segment.source: By default, notifications will only occur for add-ons with updates available within the same [channel](#AddonStoreFilterChannel) (e.g. stable, beta or dev).
segment.target: 默认情况下，仅对同一[通道](#AddonStoreFilterChannel)（如稳定版、测试版或开发版）内可用的插件更新发出通知。

segment.source: You can configure add-on update channels [individually for each add-on](#AddonStoreUpdateChannel) or for [all add-ons](#DefaultAddonUpdateChannel).
segment.target: 您可为[每个插件单独配置](#AddonStoreUpdateChannel)或为[所有插件统一配置](#DefaultAddonUpdateChannel)更新通道。

segment.source: When set to "Update Automatically", add-ons will automatically update in the background.
segment.target: 当设置为“自动更新”时，插件将在后台自动完成更新。

segment.source: You will be prompted to restart NVDA when the updates are finished.
segment.target: 更新完成后，系统将提示您重启 NVDA。

segment.source: Options |Notify (Default), Update Automatically, Disabled
segment.target: 选项 | 通知（默认）、自动更新、已禁用

segment.source: Default |Notify
segment.target: 默认 |通知

segment.source: Option |Behaviour
segment.target: 选项 |行为

segment.source: Notify |Notify when updates are available to add-ons
segment.target: 通知 | 当插件有可用更新时通知

segment.source: Update Automatically |Automatically update add-ons in the background
segment.target: 自动更新 | 在后台自动更新插件

segment.source: Disabled |Do not automatically check for updates to add-ons
segment.target: 已禁用 |不自动检查插件更新

segment.source: Default Update Channel
segment.target: 默认更新通道

segment.source: When [Automatic add-on updates](#AutomaticAddonUpdates) are enabled, by default, add-ons only update to the same [channel](#AddonStoreFilterChannel).
segment.target: 当启用[自动更新插件](#AutomaticAddonUpdates)时，默认情况下插件仅会更新到与已安装版本相同[通道](#AddonStoreFilterChannel)的版本。

segment.source: For example, an installed beta version will only update to a newer beta version.
segment.target: 例如：已安装的测试版插件仅会更新到较新的测试版本。

segment.source: This option sets the default update channel for all add-ons.
segment.target: 此选项用于为所有插件设置默认更新通道。

segment.source: You can also change the update channel for a [specific add-on individually from the Add-on Store](#AddonStoreUpdateChannel).
segment.target: 您也可以通过插件商店[为单个插件修改更新通道](#AddonStoreUpdateChannel)。

segment.source: Options | Same (Default), Any, Do not update, Stable, Beta or dev, Beta, Dev
segment.target: 选项 | 与已安装版本相同（默认）、不限、关闭自动更新、稳定版、测试版或开发版、测试版、开发版

segment.source: Default | Same
segment.target: 默认 | 与已安装版本相同

segment.source: Option | Behaviour
segment.target: 选项 | 行为

segment.source: Same | Add-ons will remain on their channel
segment.target: 与已安装版本相同 | 插件仅会更新到当前通道的新版本

segment.source: Any | Add-ons will automatically update to the latest version, regardless of channel
segment.target: 不限 | 不考虑通道，自动更新到最新的可用版本

segment.source: Do not update | Add-ons will not automatically update by default, you must enable them individually
segment.target: 关闭自动更新 | 默认禁用自动更新，可单独启用特定插件的更新

segment.source: Stable | Add-ons will automatically update to stable versions
segment.target: 稳定版 | 插件将自动更新到稳定通道的新版本

segment.source: Beta or dev | Add-ons will automatically update to beta or dev versions
segment.target: 测试版或开发板 | 插件将自动更新到测试或开发通道的新版本

segment.source: Beta | Add-ons will automatically update to beta versions
segment.target: 测试版 | 插件将自动更新到测试通道的新版本

segment.source: Dev | Add-ons will automatically update to dev versions
segment.target: 开发板 | 插件将自动更新到开发通道的新版本

segment.source: Allow automatic updates to install incompatible add-ons
segment.target: 允许自动更新安装不兼容的插件

segment.source: This setting enables automatic updates to add-ons that may not be fully compatible with the current version of NVDA.
segment.target: 此设置允许自动更新可能不完全兼容当前版本 NVDA 的插件。

segment.source: By default, this is disabled, meaning automatic updates will only upgrade to add-on versions marked as compatible with the current version of NVDA.
segment.target: 默认禁用该功能，即自动更新仅会更新标记为与当前版本 NVDA 兼容的插件。

segment.source: Automatic updates will still update an incompatible add-on version to a compatible version when it is released.
segment.target: 当兼容版本发布时，自动更新仍会将不兼容的插件更新到兼容版本。

segment.source: Enabling this may be useful for switching over to using add-on breaking releases (the first release of the year).
segment.target: 启用此选项可能有助于过渡至使用插件兼容性破坏版本（年度首个版本）。

segment.source: This is particularly useful for alpha and beta testers, who are testing compatibility of add-ons during the early stages of an add-on breaking release.
segment.target: 对于 alpha 和 beta 版的测试人员尤其有用，可在插件破坏性更新的早期阶段测试兼容性。

segment.source: Mirror server
segment.target: 镜像服务器

segment.source: These controls allow you to specify an alternative URL to download Add-on Store data from.
segment.target: 这些控件允许指定替代网址以下载插件商店数据。

segment.source: This may be of use in locations where access to the NV Access Add-on Store server is slow or unavailable.
segment.target: 在访问 NV Access 插件商店服务器较慢或不可用的地区，此功能可能非常有用。

segment.source: The read-only text box shows the current mirror URL.
segment.target: 只读文本框将显示当前的镜像网址。

segment.source: If no mirror is in use (i.e. the NV Access Add-on Store server is being used), "No mirror" is displayed.
segment.target: 若未使用任何镜像（即正在使用 NV Access 插件商店服务器），则会显示“不使用镜像”。

segment.source: If you wish to change the Add-on Store mirror, press the "Change..." button to open the [Set Add-on Store Mirror dialog](#SetURLDialog).
segment.target: 如需更改插件商店镜像，请按下“更改...”按钮以打开[设置插件商店镜像对话框](#SetURLDialog)

segment.source: Remote Access Settings
segment.target: 远程访问

segment.source: This category allows you to configure the behaviour of [Remote Access](#RemoteAccess).
segment.target: 该类别用于配置[远程访问](#RemoteAccess)的行为。

segment.source: Enable Remote Access
segment.target: 启用远程访问

segment.source: Use this checkbox to enable or disable NVDA's Remote Access feature.
segment.target: 通过该复选框可启用或禁用 NVDA 的远程访问功能。

segment.source: When this is unchecked, the Remote Access feature is entirely unavailable.
segment.target: 取消选中此复选框，远程访问功能将完全不可用。

segment.source: Please note that in order to continue a Remote Access session on secure screens such as User Account Control prompts, you must enable this setting, save the changes, and then [copy your settings to NVDA's system configuration directory](#GeneralSettingsCopySettings).
segment.target: 请注意：若要在用户账户控制提示等安全界面保持远程会话，必须启用此设置、保存更改后[将设置拷贝到 NVDA 系统配置目录](#GeneralSettingsCopySettings)。

segment.source: Remote Access will only continue sessions started by the installed copy of NVDA on secure desktops.
segment.target: 安全桌面仅会继续由安装版 NVDA 发起的远程访问会话。

segment.source: This means that you cannot, for instance, start a Remote Access session with a portable copy of NVDA and have the session continue on secure screens.
segment.target: 这意味着，您无法通过便携版 NVDA 发起远程访问会话后，在安全界面继续保持连接。

segment.source: The following options are only available if Remote Access is enabled.
segment.target: 以下选项仅在启用远程访问时可用。

segment.source: Confirm before disconnecting when controlled
segment.target: 被控时断开连接前确认

segment.source: This option controls whether confirmation is required before disconnecting from a Remote Access session when connected as the controlled computer.
segment.target: 此选项用于在作为被控计算机连接时，断开远程访问会话前是否需要确认。

segment.source: When checked, NVDA will ask for confirmation before disconnecting.
segment.target: 选中时，NVDA 将在断开前请求确认。

segment.source: When unchecked, NVDA will disconnect immediately without confirmation.
segment.target: 取消选中时将立即断开，无需确认。

segment.source: Mute when controlling the local computer
segment.target: 控制本地计算机时静音

segment.source: This option controls whether you can hear speech and sounds from the remote computer when controlling the local computer.
segment.target: 此选项用于控制当您操作本地计算机时，是否可以听到远程计算机的语音和声音。

segment.source: When checked, Remote Access will be muted automatically when first connecting as the controlling computer, and when switching to controlling the local computer.
segment.target: 选中此项后，远程访问将在首次作为主控端连接时自动静音，并在切换到控制本地计算机时保持静音状态。

segment.source: When unchecked, Remote Access sessions start unmuted, and must be muted explicitly.
segment.target: 取消选中时，远程访问会话将以非静音状态启动，需要手动执行静音操作。

segment.source: You can still manually mute or unmute Remote Access when controlling the local computer [via the Remote Access menu](#RemoteAccessUsage), or by assigning a custom gesture using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 您仍可在控制本地计算机时通过[远程访问菜单](#RemoteAccessUsage)或通过[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)分配自定义快捷键来手动切换静音状态。

segment.source: Automatically connect after NVDA starts
segment.target: NVDA 启动后自动连接

segment.source: This option allows you to automatically establish a Remote Access session when NVDA starts.
segment.target: 此选项允许在 NVDA 启动时自动建立远程访问会话。

segment.source: This could be useful, for example, to control your home computer when away from home.
segment.target: 例如，可用于在外出时控制家用计算机。

segment.source: Use caution when enabling this option, as it may increase the risk of unauthorized access to your computer.
segment.target: 请谨慎启用此选项，因为可能增加未经授权访问计算机的风险。

segment.source: For further details on the following options, please refer to the [Setting Up a Remote Access Session section](#RemoteAccessSetup)
segment.target: 关于以下选项的详细信息，请参阅[建立远程访问会话章节](#RemoteAccessSetup)。

segment.source: Mode
segment.target: 模式

segment.source: Select the connection mode for automatic connections.
segment.target: 选择自动连接时的模式。

segment.source: This option is only available when [Automatically connect after NVDA starts](#RemoteAutoconnect) is checked.
segment.target: 此选项仅在选中 [NVDA 启动后自动连接](#RemoteAutoconnect)时可用。

segment.source: Option |Behaviour
segment.target: 选项 |行为

segment.source: Allow this computer to be controlled |Use this computer as the "controlled" computer. This allows the operator of the "controlling" computer to use this computer as if they were sitting in front of it.
segment.target: 允许此计算机被控制 | 将这台计算机作为被控计算机，允许主控计算机的用户如同本地操作般控制此计算机。

segment.source: Control another computer |Use this computer as the "controlling" computer. This allows you to execute commands on the remote computer.
segment.target: 控制另一台计算机 | 将这台计算机作为主控计算机，允许对远程计算机执行操作。

segment.source: Server
segment.target: 服务器

segment.source: Select the server type for automatic connections.
segment.target: 选择自动连接的服务器类型。

segment.source: This option is only available when [Automatically connect after NVDA starts](#RemoteAutoconnect) is checked.
segment.target: 此选项仅在选中[NVDA 启动后自动连接](#RemoteAutoconnect)时可用。

segment.source: Option |Behaviour
segment.target: 选项 |行为

segment.source: Use existing |Use an existing Remote Access server to mediate the connection (recommended).
segment.target: 使用现有 | 通过既有远程访问服务器建立中继连接（推荐）。

segment.source: Host locally |Use this instance of NVDA as the Remote Access server (advanced). This option may require network configuration that is out of scope for this manual.
segment.target: 本地托管 | 将当前 NVDA 实例作为远程访问服务器（高级），此选项可能涉及超出本指南范围的网络配置。

segment.source: Host
segment.target: 主机

segment.source: Use this field to set the URL of the Remote Access server you would like to use for automatic connections.
segment.target: 在此字段设置自动连接使用的远程访问服务器网址。

segment.source: If the server uses a port other than 6837, include it after a colon (eg. `example.com:1234`).
segment.target: 若服务器使用非 6837 端口，需在网址后附加冒号和端口号（如：`example.com:1234`）。

segment.source: This option is only available when [Automatically connect after NVDA starts](#RemoteAutoconnect) is checked, and [Server](#RemoteAutoconnectServer) is set to "Use existing".
segment.target: 此选项仅在选中 [NVDA 启动后自动连接](#RemoteAutoconnect)且[服务器](#RemoteAutoconnectServer)设为“使用现有”时可用。

segment.source: Port
segment.target: 端口

segment.source: Use this field to set the TCP port you would like to use for automatic connections.
segment.target: 在此字段设置自动连接使用的 TCP 端口。

segment.source: This option is only available when [Automatically connect after NVDA starts](#RemoteAutoconnect) is checked, and [Server](#RemoteAutoconnectServer) is set to "Host locally".
segment.target: 此选项仅在选中 [NVDA 启动后自动连接](#RemoteAutoconnect)且[服务器](#RemoteAutoconnectServer)设为“本地托管”时可用。

segment.source: Key
segment.target: 密钥

segment.source: Use this field to set the key (password) you would like to use for automatic connections.
segment.target: 在此字段设置自动连接使用的身份验证密钥（密码）。

segment.source: This option is only available when [Automatically connect after NVDA starts](#RemoteAutoconnect) is checked.
segment.target: 此选项仅在选中 [NVDA 启动后自动连接](#RemoteAutoconnect)时可用。

segment.source: Delete all trusted fingerprints
segment.target: 删除所有已信任的指纹

segment.source: This button allows you to forget the fingerprints of all previously trusted Remote Access servers.
segment.target: 此按钮用于清除所有之前受信任的远程访问服务器指纹。

segment.source: This means that you will again be asked whether to connect to all unrecognised Remote Access servers, even ones that you have previously connected to.
segment.target: 这意味着您将再次被询问是否要连接到所有无法识别的远程访问服务器，包括您之前曾经连接过的服务器。

segment.source: You will be asked to confirm before all trusted fingerprints are deleted.
segment.target: 删除前将进行二次确认。

segment.source: This option is only available if there are trusted fingerprints stored in your configuration.
segment.target: 此选项仅在配置中存在受信指纹时可用。

segment.source: Windows OCR Settings
segment.target: Windows OCR

segment.source: The settings in this category allow you to configure [Windows OCR](#Win10Ocr).
segment.target: 该类别用于设置 [Windows 光学字符识别](#Win10Ocr)。

segment.source: This category contains the following options:
segment.target: 该类别包含以下选项：

segment.source: Recognition language
segment.target: 识别语言

segment.source: This combo box allows you to choose the language to be used for text recognition.
segment.target: 此组合框允许您选择用于光学字符识别的语言。

segment.source: To cycle through available languages from anywhere, please assign a custom gesture using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 要在任何地方循环切换可用的语言，请在[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)分配一个自定义快捷键。

segment.source: Periodically refresh recognized content
segment.target: 定期刷新识别结果

segment.source: When this checkbox is enabled, NVDA will automatically refresh the recognized content when a recognition result has focus.
segment.target: 启用该复选框后，当识别结果文档获得焦点时，NVDA 会自动刷新识别结果。

segment.source: This can be very useful when you want to monitor constantly changing content, such as when watching a video with subtitles.
segment.target: 若您想要监视不断变化的内容，该功能非常有用。

segment.source: The refresh takes place every one and a half seconds.
segment.target: 每隔 1.5 秒刷新一次。

segment.source: This option is disabled by default.
segment.target: 默认情况下此选项被禁用。

segment.source: Automatically say all on result
segment.target: 识别完成后朗读所有内容

segment.source: This checkbox toggles the automatic reading of all recognized content after a recognition is complete.
segment.target: 此复选框可切换识别完成后是否自动朗读识别内容。

segment.source: This option is disabled by default.
segment.target: 默认情况下此选项被禁用。

segment.source: Set Mirror Dialog
segment.target: 设置镜像对话框

segment.source: This dialog allows you to specify the URL of a mirror to use when [updating NVDA](#GeneralSettingsCheckForUpdates) or [using the Add-on Store](#AddonsManager).
segment.target: 此对话框允许您指定用于[更新 NVDA](#GeneralSettingsCheckForUpdates) 或[使用插件商店](#AddonsManager)时的镜像服务器网址。

segment.source: This may be of use in locations where access to the NV Access servers for these functions is slow or unavailable.
segment.target: 在访问 NV Access 官方服务器较慢或不可用的地区，此功能可能非常有用。

segment.source: When setting the [NVDA update mirror](#UpdateMirror), the title of this dialog will be "Set NVDA Update Mirror".
segment.target: 当设置 [NVDA 更新镜像](#UpdateMirror)时，对话框标题将显示为“设置NVDA更新镜像”。

segment.source: When setting the [Add-on Store mirror](#AddonStoreMetadataMirror), the title of this dialog will be "Set Add-on Store Mirror Server".
segment.target: 当设置[插件商店镜像](#AddonStoreMetadataMirror)时，对话框标题将显示为“设置插件商店镜像服务器”。

segment.source: URL
segment.target: 网址

segment.source: Enter the URL (web address) of the mirror you wish to use here.
segment.target: 在此输入您要使用的镜像网址。

segment.source: Only HTTP and HTTPS URLs are supported.
segment.target: 仅支持 HTTP 和 HTTPS 协议的网址。

segment.source: For your privacy, NV Access recommends using HTTPS URLs whenever possible.
segment.target: 为保护隐私安全，NV Access 建议尽可能使用 HTTPS 协议的网址。

segment.source: Leave this blank to use the default NV Access server.
segment.target: 留空此字段将使用默认的 NV Access 官方服务器。

segment.source: Test...
segment.target: 测试...

segment.source: Press this button to test the mirror URL you have entered.
segment.target: 按下此按钮可测试您输入的镜像网址。

segment.source: You must be connected to the internet for the test to succeed.
segment.target: 测试需要保持互联网连接。

segment.source: It is recommended that you always test the URL before saving it.
segment.target: 建议在保存前务必进行网址测试。

segment.source: Copy Settings to System-wide Configuration Dialog
segment.target: 拷贝设置到系统配置对话框

segment.source: This dialog appears if you choose to [copy your settings to NVDA's system-wide configuration](#GeneralSettingsCopySettings) and your NVDA configuration or the system-wide NVDA configuration contains [add-ons](#AddonsManager).
segment.target: 当您选择[应用已保存的配置到欢迎界面和其他安全界面](#GeneralSettingsCopySettings)，且 NVDA 的当前配置或系统配置中包含[插件](#AddonsManager)时，将显示此对话框。

segment.source: It allows you to choose which of your add-ons to copy to the system-wide configuration, which is used during sign-in and on [secure screens](#SecureScreens).
segment.target: 通过此对话框，您可选择要将哪些插件拷贝到系统配置。该配置将在登录及[安全界面](#SecureScreens)使用。

segment.source: It also shows which add-ons are already present in the system-wide configuration.
segment.target: 对话框还会显示系统配置中已存在哪些插件。

segment.source: By default, only add-ons that are already present in the system-wide configuration will be included.
segment.target: 默认情况下，仅会选中系统配置中已存在的插件。

segment.source: Copying add-ons to the system-wide configuration is a serious security risk.
segment.target: 将插件拷贝到系统配置存在严重的安全风险。

segment.source: NVDA uses this configuration when running on secure screens, including the sign-in and User Account Control (UAC) screens.
segment.target: 在安全界面（包括登录界面和用户账户控制（UAC）界面）运行的 NVDA 将使用此配置。

segment.source: When running on secure screens, NVDA runs as the system user, which has privileges even greater than administrators.
segment.target: NVDA 在安全界面会以系统用户的身份运行，其权限甚至高于管理员。

segment.source: This means that many of the usual security and privacy features of Windows, like User Account Control (UAC), do not apply.
segment.target: 这意味着 Windows 的许多常规安全和隐私功能（例如用户账户控制（UAC））将不再适用。

segment.source: Allowing add-ons to run in this environment grants them unrestricted access to your entire system.
segment.target: 允许插件在此环境运行，等同于让它们获得对整个系统的无限制访问权限。

segment.source: The list of add-ons shows all add-ons enabled in the currently running NVDA configuration and/or present in the system-wide NVDA configuration.
segment.target: 插件列表显示了当前运行的 NVDA 配置中已启用的所有插件，以及 NVDA 系统配置中存在的所有插件。

segment.source: The version of the add-on installed in the currently running configuration is shown in the "User version" column.
segment.target: 当前运行配置中安装的插件版本会显示在“用户版本”列中。

segment.source: The version installed in the system-wide configuration is shown in the "System-wide version" column.
segment.target: 系统配置中安装的版本会显示在“系统版本”列中。

segment.source: If the add-on is not present in the currently running or system-wide configuration, "Not installed" is shown in the appropriate column.
segment.target: 如插件未在某一配置中安装，相应列会显示“未安装”。

segment.source: To copy one or more add-ons to the system-wide configuration, check them in the list of add-ons.
segment.target: 可在此列表选择要拷贝到系统配置的插件。

segment.source: You are strongly recommended to leave all add-ons that you do not require to access secure screens unchecked.
segment.target: 强烈建议您取消选中那些在访问安全界面时不需要的插件。

segment.source: To get more information about an add-on, select the add-on in the list of add-ons and press the "About add-on..." button.
segment.target: 要获取有关插件的更多信息，请在插件列表中选择该插件，然后按“关于插件”按钮。

segment.source: The details shown are for the version in the currently running configuration.
segment.target: 将显示当前运行配置版本的详细信息。

segment.source: If the add-on is not installed in the currently running configuration, the details of the version in the system-wide configuration are shown instead.
segment.target: 若该插件未安装在当前运行配置中，则会显示系统配置中已安装版本的详细信息。

segment.source: Please note that you may only copy currently enabled add-ons to the system-wide configuration.
segment.target: 请注意，您只能将当前已启用的插件拷贝到系统配置。

segment.source: Add-ons that are "pending restart" cannot be copied.
segment.target: 无法拷贝状态为“重启后生效”的插件。

segment.source: Add-ons that are currently installed in the system-wide configuration, but are not present in the running NVDA configuration will be removed.
segment.target: 已安装在系统配置但不存在于当前运行 NVDA 配置的插件将被移除。

segment.source: These items cannot be checked.
segment.target: 这些项目无法选中。

segment.source: They also begin with "[remove]" for easy identification.
segment.target: 为便于识别，其还会以“[移除]”作为前缀。

segment.source: Advanced Settings
segment.target: 高级

segment.source: Warning! The settings in this category are for advanced users and may cause NVDA to not function correctly if configured in the wrong way.
segment.target: 警告！此类别中的设置适用于高级用户，如果不慎修改，可能会导致 NVDA 无法正常运行。

segment.source: Only make changes to these settings if you are sure you know what you are doing or if you have been specifically instructed to by an NVDA developer.
segment.target: 只有在您确定知道自己在做什么，或 NVDA 开发者明确指示您修改时，才应改变其中的设置。

segment.source: Making changes to advanced settings
segment.target: 我清楚更改这些设置可能导致 NVDA 无法正常运行

segment.source: In order to make changes to the advanced settings, the controls must be enabled by confirming, with the checkbox, that you understand the risks of modifying these settings
segment.target: 更改下面的设置之前必须选中这个复选框，表示用户了解随意更改这些设置可能的风险

segment.source: Restoring the default settings
segment.target: 恢复高级设置为默认值

segment.source: The button restores the default values for the settings, even if the confirmation checkbox is not ticked.
segment.target: 即使未勾选确认复选框，该按钮也会恢复高级设置为默认值。

segment.source: After changing settings you may wish to revert to the default values.
segment.target: 更改高级设置中的选项后，您可能希望恢复高级设置为默认值。

segment.source: This may also be the case if you are unsure if the settings have been changed.
segment.target: 如果您不确定设置是否已更改，您可能也会需要恢复高级设置为默认值。

segment.source: Enable loading custom code from Developer Scratchpad Directory
segment.target: 允许从开发者实验目录加载代码

segment.source: When developing add-ons for NVDA, it is useful to be able to test code as you are writing it.
segment.target: 在为 NVDA 开发插件时，能够边写边测试会给开发者带来很大便利。

segment.source: This option when enabled, allows NVDA to load custom appModules, globalPlugins, brailleDisplayDrivers, synthDrivers and vision enhancement providers, from a special developer scratchpad directory in your NVDA user configuration directory.
segment.target: 启用此选项后，NVDA 允许从 NVDA 用户配置目录中特殊的开发者实验目录加载自定义 appModules、globalPlugins、brailleDisplayDrivers、synthDrivers 和 vision enhancement。

segment.source: As their equivalents in add-ons, these modules are loaded when starting NVDA or, in the case of appModules and globalPlugins, when [reloading plugins](#ReloadPlugins).
segment.target: 作为插件的等效模块，这些插件在 NVDA 启动时加载。对于 appModules 和 globalPlugins，[重新加载插件](#ReloadPlugins)时也会被加载。。

segment.source: This option is off by default, ensuring that no untested code is ever run in NVDA with out the user's explicit knowledge.
segment.target: 默认情况下，此选项处于关闭状态，可以确保用户仅仅在明确了解的情况下，NVDA 才会运行未经测试的代码。

segment.source: If you wish to distribute custom code to others, you should package it as an NVDA add-on.
segment.target: 如果您希望将代码分发给其他人，则应将其打包为 NVDA 插件。

segment.source: Open Developer Scratchpad Directory
segment.target: 打开开发者实验目录

segment.source: This button opens the directory where you can place custom code while developing it.
segment.target: 此按钮可打开开发者实验目录。

segment.source: This button is only enabled if NVDA is configured to enable loading custom code from the Developer Scratchpad Directory.
segment.target: 仅当用户允许从开发者实验目录加载代码时，才会启用此按钮。

segment.source: Registration for UI Automation events and property changes
segment.target: 注册 UIA 事件和属性改变

segment.source: Options |Automatic, Selective, Global
segment.target: 选项 | 自动、选择性注册、全局

segment.source: Default |Automatic
segment.target: 默认 | 自动

segment.source: This option changes how NVDA registers for events fired by the Microsoft UI Automation accessibility API.
segment.target: 此选项可以改变 NVDA 接收 Microsoft UIA 事件的方式。

segment.source: The registration for UI Automation events and property changes combo box has three options:
segment.target: 注册 UIA 事件和属性改变组合框中有三个选项：

segment.source: Automatic: "selective" on Windows 11 Sun Valley 2 (version 22H2) and later, "global" otherwise.
segment.target: 自动：在 Windows 11 Sun Valley 2（版本 22H2）及更高版本的操作系统上为“选择性注册”，否则为“全局”。

segment.source: Selective: NVDA will limit event registration to the system focus for most events.
segment.target: 选择性注册：对于大多数事件，NVDA 会将事件注册限制在系统焦点上。

segment.source: If you suffer from performance issues in one or more applications, We recommend you to try this functionality to see whether performance improves.
segment.target: 如果您在一个或多个应用程序中被性能问题所困扰，我们建议您尝试此功能以查看性能是否有所提高。

segment.source: However, on older versions of Windows, NVDA may have trouble tracking focus in some controls (such as the task manager and emoji panel).
segment.target: 但是，在旧版 Windows 上，NVDA 可能无法跟踪某些控件焦点（例如任务管理器和表情符号面板）。

segment.source: Global: NVDA registers for many UIA events that are processed and discarded within NVDA itself.
segment.target: 全局：NVDA 会注册很多由自身处理并丢弃的 UIA 事件。

segment.source: While focus tracking is more reliable in more situations, performance is significantly degraded, especially in applications like Microsoft Visual Studio.
segment.target: 虽然焦点跟踪在某些情况下更稳定，但可能会降低性能，尤其是在 Microsoft Visual Studio 等应用程序中。

segment.source: Use UI automation to access Microsoft Word document controls
segment.target: 在 Word 中启用 UIA 接口

segment.source: Configures whether or not NVDA should use the UI Automation accessibility API to access Microsoft Word documents, rather than the older Microsoft Word object model.
segment.target: 配置 NVDA 是否应该使用 UIA 接口来访问 Microsoft Word 文档，而不是旧的 Microsoft Word 对象模型。

segment.source: This applies to documents in Microsoft word itself, plus messages in Microsoft Outlook.
segment.target: 此选项适用于 Microsoft Word 文档，以及 Microsoft Outlook 中的消息区域。

segment.source: This setting contains the following values:
segment.target: 该设置包含以下选项：

segment.source: Default (where suitable)
segment.target: 默认（符合要求时）

segment.source: Only where necessary: where the Microsoft Word object model is not available at all
segment.target: 仅必要时：Microsoft Word 对象模型完全不可用

segment.source: Where suitable: Microsoft Word version 16.0.15000 or higher on Windows 11, or where the Microsoft Word object model is unavailable
segment.target: 符合要求时：Windows 11 操作系统且 Microsoft Word 版本不低于 16.0.15000，或者传统的 Word 对象模型不可用

segment.source: Always: where ever UI automation is available in Microsoft word (no matter how complete).
segment.target: 总是：始终在 Microsoft Word 中使用 UIA 接口（无论其是否完整）。

segment.source: Use UI automation to access Microsoft Excel spreadsheet controls when available
segment.target: 在 Excel 中启用 UIA 接口（如果可用）

segment.source: When this option is enabled, NVDA will try to use the Microsoft UI Automation accessibility API in order to fetch information from Microsoft Excel Spreadsheet controls.
segment.target: 启用该选项后，NVDA 将尝试使用 Microsoft UI Automation 接口从 Excel 表格中获取信息。

segment.source: This is an experimental feature, and some features of Microsoft Excel may not be available in this mode.
segment.target: 这是一项实验性功能，在此模式下可能无法使用 Excel 的某些功能。

segment.source: For instance, NVDA's Elements List for listing formulas and comments, and Browse mode quick navigation to jump to form fields on a spreadsheet features are not available.
segment.target: 例如，用于列出公式和批注的元素列表，以及用于在浏览模式下跳转到表单的快速导航功能。

segment.source: However, for basic spreadsheet navigating / editing, this option may provide a vast performance improvement.
segment.target: 但对于基础的导航和编辑功能，启用该选项可能会带来明显的性能改进。

segment.source: We still do not recommend that the majority of users turn this on by default, though we do welcome users of Microsoft Excel build 16.0.13522.10000 or higher to test this feature and provide feedback.
segment.target: 尽管如此，我们仍然不推荐大多数用户启用该功能，但我们也欢迎使用 Microsoft Excel 内部版本 16.0.13522.10000 或更高版本的用户测试此功能并提供反馈。

segment.source: Microsoft Excel's UI automation implementation is ever changing, and versions of Microsoft Office older than 16.0.13522.10000 may not expose enough information for this option to be of any use.
segment.target: Microsoft Excel 的 UI Automation 接口实现不断变化，早于 16.0.13522.10000 版本的 Office 可能无法提供足够多的信息来支持此功能。

segment.source: Use enhanced event processing
segment.target: 使用增强的事件处理

segment.source: Options |Default (Enabled), Disabled, Enabled
segment.target: 选项 | 默认（已启用）、已禁用、已启用

segment.source: Default |Enabled
segment.target: 默认 | 已启用

segment.source: When this option is enabled, NVDA should remain responsive when being flooded with many UI Automation events, e.g. large amounts of text in a terminal.
segment.target: 若启用此选项，当 NVDA 收到大量 UIA 事件时仍然可以保持响应状态，例如向终端内打印大量文本。

segment.source: After changing this option, you will need to restart NVDA for the change to take effect.
segment.target: 更改此选项后，您需要重新启动 NVDA 才能使更改生效。

segment.source: Windows Console support
segment.target: Windows 控制台支持

segment.source: Options |Automatic, UIA when available, Legacy
segment.target: 选项 | 自动、UIA（可用时）、旧版

segment.source: Default |Automatic
segment.target: 默认 | 自动

segment.source: This option selects how NVDA interacts with the Windows Console used by command prompt, PowerShell, and the Windows Subsystem for Linux.
segment.target: 该选项用于选择如何与命令提示符，PowerShell 以及 Linux 子系统的 Windows 控制台进行交互。

segment.source: It does not affect the modern Windows Terminal.
segment.target: 这个选项不会影响新的 Windows 终端应用。

segment.source: In Windows 10 version 1709, Microsoft [added support for its UI Automation API to the console](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/commandline/whats-new-in-windows-console-in-windows-10-fall-creators-update/), bringing vastly improved performance and stability for screen readers that support it.
segment.target: 在 Windows 10 版本 1709 中，Microsoft[向控制台添加了 UIA 接口的支持](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/commandline/whats-new-in-windows-console-in-windows-10-fall-creators-update/)，这一举措显著的改善了屏幕阅读器的性能和稳定性。

segment.source: In situations where UI Automation is unavailable or known to result in an inferior user experience, NVDA's legacy console support is available as a fallback.
segment.target: 在 UIA 接口不可用，或者已知存在影响用户体验的问题时，NVDA 旧版控制台的支持方式可作为备用。

segment.source: The Windows Console support combo box has three options:
segment.target: 该选项的组合框中包含三个选项：

segment.source: Automatic: Uses UI Automation in the version of Windows Console included with Windows 11 version 22H2 and later.
segment.target: 自动：在 Windows 11 22H2 及更高版本中的 Windows 控制台中使用 UIA 接口。

segment.source: This option is recommended and set by default.
segment.target: 推荐使用此选项，这也是默认设置。

segment.source: UIA when available: Uses UI Automation in consoles if available, even for versions with incomplete or buggy implementations.
segment.target: UIA 可用时：在控制台中使用 UIA（如果可用），即使对于接口尚未实现完整支持或存在缺陷的版本也使用 UIA 接口。

segment.source: While this limited functionality may be useful (and even sufficient for your usage), use of this option is entirely at your own risk and no support for it will be provided.
segment.target: 虽然在这种情况下的功能可能有效（甚至对您来说已经够用了），但因使用此选项而带来的风险完全由您自行承担，并且无法提供任何支持。

segment.source: Legacy: UI Automation in the Windows Console will be completely disabled.
segment.target: 旧版：完全禁用 Windows 控制台中的 UIA 接口。

segment.source: The legacy fallback will always be used even in situations where UI Automation would provide a superior user experience.
segment.target: 即使在 UIA 非常完善且能显著改善用户体验的情况下，也将始终使用旧的支持方式。

segment.source: Therefore, selecting this option is not recommended unless you know what you are doing.
segment.target: 因此，除非您清楚自己在做什么，否则不建议选择此选项。

segment.source: Use UIA with Microsoft Edge and other Chromium based browsers when available
segment.target: 在 Microsoft Edge 及其他基于 Chromium 内核的浏览器中启用 UIA 接口（如果可用）

segment.source: Allows specifying when UIA will be used when it is available in Chromium based browsers such as Microsoft Edge.
segment.target: 允许设置当 UIA 在 Chromium 系列浏览器（如 Microsoft Edge）中可用时何时启用。

segment.source: UIA support for Chromium based browsers is early in development and may not provide the same level of access as IA2.
segment.target: UIA 对基于 Chromium 的浏览器的支持目前处于早期开发阶段，可能无法提供与 IA2 相同的支持水平。

segment.source: The combo box has the following options:
segment.target: 组合框中包含以下选项：

segment.source: Default (Only when necessary): The NVDA default, currently this is "Only when necessary". This default may change in the future as the technology matures.
segment.target: 默认（仅必要时）： NVDA 的默认设置，目前为“仅必要时”。随着该技术的成熟，此默认设置在未来可能会更改。

segment.source: Only when necessary: When NVDA is unable to inject into the browser process in order to use IA2 and UIA is available, then NVDA will fall back to using UIA.
segment.target: 仅必要时：当 NVDA 无法注入浏览器进程以使用 IA2 且 UIA 接口可用时，则 NVDA 将回退到 UIA 。

segment.source: Yes: If the browser makes UIA available, NVDA will use it.
segment.target: 是：如果浏览器支持 UIA，NVDA 将调用该接口。

segment.source: No: Don't use UIA, even if NVDA is unable to inject in process. This may be useful for developers debugging issues with IA2 and want to ensure that NVDA does not fall back to UIA.
segment.target: 否：不使用 UIA，即使 NVDA 无法在进程中注入。这可能对开发人员调试 IA2 的问题很有用，或者希望确保 NVDA 不会自动退回到 UIA。

segment.source: Annotations
segment.target: 注释

segment.source: This group of options is used to enable features which add experimental support for ARIA annotations.
segment.target: 这组选项为 ARIA 注释启用实验性的朗读支持特性。

segment.source: Some of these features may be incomplete.
segment.target: 其中的某些特性可能并不完整。

segment.source: To "Report summary of any annotation details at the system caret", press NVDA+d.
segment.target: 若要读出系统光标处的详细信息摘要，请按 NVDA+d。

segment.source: The following options exist:
segment.target: 存在如下选项：

segment.source: "Report 'has details' for structured annotations": enables reporting if the text or control has further details.
segment.target: “读出“有详细信息”以获取结构化注释”：如果文本或控件有更多详细信息，启用了该选项则会被读出。

segment.source: "Report aria-description always":
segment.target: “始终读出 aria-description”：

segment.source: When the source of `accDescription` is aria-description, the description is reported.
segment.target: 当 `accDescription` 的来源是 aria-description 时，则读出描述。

segment.source: This is useful for annotations on the web.
segment.target: 这对于 Web 上的注释很有用。

segment.source: Note:
segment.target: 注意：

segment.source: There are many sources for `accDescription` several have mixed or unreliable semantics.
segment.target: `accDescription` 有很多来源，其中一些具有混合或不可靠的语义。

segment.source: Historically AT has not been able to differentiate sources of `accDescription` typically it wasn't spoken due to the mixed semantics.
segment.target: 从历史上看，AT 无法区分 `accDescription` 的来源，由于混合语义，通常不会朗读。

segment.source: This option is in very early development, it relies on browser features not yet widely available.
segment.target: 此选项正处于初期开发阶段，依赖于尚未被广泛应用的浏览器功能。

segment.source: Expected to work with Chromium 92.0.4479.0+
segment.target: 预计适用于 Chromium 92.0.4479.0 以上

segment.source: Report live regions
segment.target: 盲文显示动态内容更新

segment.source: Options |Default (Enabled), Disabled, Enabled
segment.target: 选项 | 默认（已启用）、已禁用、已启用

segment.source: Default |Enabled
segment.target: 默认 | 已启用

segment.source: This option selects whether NVDA reports changes in some dynamic web content in Braille.
segment.target: 此选项选择 NVDA 是否用盲文显示某些 Web 动态内容更新。

segment.source: Disabling this option is equivalent to NVDA's behaviour in versions 2023.1 and earlier, which only reported these content changes in speech.
segment.target: 禁用此选项则意味着与 NVDA2023.1 及更早版本中的行为一致，仅用语音提示这些动态内容更新。

segment.source: Speak passwords in all enhanced terminals
segment.target: 在所有的增强终端读出密码

segment.source: This setting controls whether characters are spoken by [speak typed characters](#KeyboardSettingsSpeakTypedCharacters) or [speak typed words](#KeyboardSettingsSpeakTypedWords) in situations where the screen does not update (such as password entry) in some terminal programs, such as the Windows Console with UI automation support enabled and Mintty.
segment.target: 此设置控制在某些终端程序（例如启用了 UIA 和 Mintty 的 Windows 控制台）屏幕不更新的情况下（例如密码输入）的场景，是否[读出输入的字符](#KeyboardSettingsSpeakTypedCharacters)或[读出输入的单词](#KeyboardSettingsSpeakTypedWords)。

segment.source: For security purposes, this setting should be left disabled.
segment.target: 出于安全考虑，应禁用此设置。

segment.source: However, you may wish to enable it if you experience performance issues or instability with typed character and/or word reporting in consoles, or work in trusted environments and prefer password announcement.
segment.target: 但是，如果您在控制台中遇到性能问题，或者输入字符和/或单词朗读不正常，亦或在您信任的环境下工作且更喜欢读出密码，您可能希望启用该选项。

segment.source: Use enhanced typed character support in legacy Windows Console when available
segment.target: 在旧版 Windows 控制台使用增强型字符支持 （如果可用）

segment.source: This option enables an alternative method for detecting typed characters in legacy Windows consoles.
segment.target: 启用此选项，可以使用另一种方法在旧版 Windows 命令控制台中检测键入的字符。

segment.source: While it improves performance and prevents some console output from being spelled out, it may be incompatible with some terminal programs.
segment.target: 虽然该选项可以提高性能并防止某些控制台输出被逐字符拼读，但它可能不兼容某些终端应用程序。

segment.source: This feature is available and enabled by default on Windows 10 versions 1607 and later when UI Automation is unavailable or disabled.
segment.target: 默认情况下，在 Windows 10 版本 1607 之后，当 UI Automation 不可用或被禁用时，NVDA 就会启用此功能。

segment.source: Warning: with this option enabled, typed characters that do not appear onscreen, such as passwords, will not be suppressed.
segment.target: 注意：启用此选项后，在屏幕上不显示的字符（例如密码）也会被读出。

segment.source: In untrusted environments, you may temporarily disable [speak typed characters](#KeyboardSettingsSpeakTypedCharacters) and [speak typed words](#KeyboardSettingsSpeakTypedWords) when entering passwords.
segment.target: 在不受信任的环境中，您可以在输入密码时暂时禁用[朗读输入字符](#KeyboardSettingsSpeakTypedCharacters)和[朗读输入单词](#KeyboardSettingsSpeakTypedWords)的功能。

segment.source: Diff algorithm
segment.target: Diff 算法

segment.source: This setting controls how NVDA determines the new text to speak in terminals.
segment.target: 该设置将决定 NVDA 用何种算法确定在终端内要朗读的新文本。

segment.source: The diff algorithm combo box has three options:
segment.target: Diff 算法组合框内有三个选项：

segment.source: Automatic: This option causes NVDA to prefer Diff Match Patch in most situations, but fall back to Difflib in problematic applications, such as older versions of the Windows Console and Mintty.
segment.target: 自动：此选项可以让 NVDA 在大多数情况下首选 Diff Match Patch，但在某些应用程序中遇到问题时则回退到 Difflib，例如旧版本的 Windows 控制台和 Mintty。

segment.source: Diff Match Patch: This option causes NVDA to calculate changes to terminal text by character, even in situations where it is not recommended.
segment.target: Diff Match Patch：此选项让 NVDA 强制按字符计算终端文本的变化。

segment.source: It may improve performance when large volumes of text are written to the console and allow more accurate reporting of changes made in the middle of lines.
segment.target: 当控制台中包含大量文本时，该选项可以提高性能，并能够更加准确的读出行中间的字符变化。

segment.source: However, in some applications, reading of new text may be choppy or inconsistent.
segment.target: 但是，在某些终端程序中，可能会导致文本的读取断断续续或不一致。

segment.source: Difflib: this option causes NVDA to calculate changes to terminal text by line, even in situations where it is not recommended.
segment.target: Difflib：此选项让 NVDA 强制逐行计算终端文本的变化。

segment.source: It is identical to NVDA's behaviour in versions 2020.4 and earlier.
segment.target: 这与 NVDA 2020.4 及更早版本中的行为一致。

segment.source: This setting may stabilize reading of incoming text in some applications.
segment.target: 此设置可能会使某些应用程序中对传入文本的读取更加稳定。

segment.source: However, in terminals, when inserting or deleting a character in the middle of a line, the text after the caret will be read out.
segment.target: 但是，当在一行中间插入或删除一个字符时，会读出光标后的文本。

segment.source: Speak new text in Windows Terminal via
segment.target: 在 Windows 终端内使用以下方式朗读新文本

segment.source: Options |Default (Diffing), Diffing, UIA notifications
segment.target: 选项 | 默认（Diffing）、Diffing、UIA 通知

segment.source: Default |Diffing
segment.target: 默认 | Diffing

segment.source: This option selects how NVDA determines what text is "new" (and thus what to speak when "report dynamic content changes" is enabled) in Windows Terminal and the WPF Windows Terminal control used in Visual Studio 2022.
segment.target: 该选项决定 NVDA 如何确定 Windows 终端和 Visual Studio 2022 中使用的 WPF Windows Terminal 控件中的“新”文本（以及启用“读出动态内容更新”时要朗读的内容）。

segment.source: It does not affect the Windows Console (`conhost.exe`).
segment.target: 这不会影响 Windows 控制台（`conhost.exe`）。

segment.source: The Speak new text in Windows Terminal combo box has three options:
segment.target: 有三个选项可选：

segment.source: Default: This option is currently equivalent to "diffing", but it is anticipated to change once support for UIA notifications is further developed.
segment.target: 默认：该选项目前等价于“diffing”，但如果 UIA 通知的支持得到进一步改进，该选项可能会被改变。

segment.source: Diffing: This option uses the selected diff algorithm to calculate changes each time the terminal renders new text.
segment.target: Diffing：此选项使用 diff 算法来计算每次终端内提供的新文本的差异。

segment.source: This is identical to NVDA's behaviour in versions 2022.4 and earlier.
segment.target: 与 NVDA 在 2022.4 及之前版本中的行为一致。

segment.source: UIA notifications: This option defers the responsibility of determining what text to speak to Windows Terminal itself, meaning that NVDA no longer has to determine what text currently on-screen is "new".
segment.target: UIA 通知：此选项决定把如何用语音输出文本的职责转让给 Windows 终端自身，这意味着，NVDA 不必判断屏幕上的文本是不是新文本。

segment.source: This should markedly improve performance and stability of Windows Terminal, but this feature is not yet complete.
segment.target: 这可以明显提高 Windows 终端的性能和稳定性，但该功能尚未开发完成。

segment.source: In particular, typed characters that are not displayed on-screen, such as passwords, are reported when this option is selected.
segment.target: 尤其是当选择了这个选项时，未在屏幕上显示的输入字符（如密码）也会被读出。

segment.source: Additionally, contiguous spans of output of over 1,000 characters may not be reported accurately.
segment.target: 此外，可能无法准确读出连续输出超过 1000 个字符的文本。

segment.source: Attempt to cancel speech for expired focus events
segment.target: 取消无效焦点事件的朗读

segment.source: This option enables behaviour which attempts to cancel speech for expired focus events.
segment.target: 启用此选项则会取消对无效焦点事件的朗读。

segment.source: In particular moving quickly through messages in Gmail with Chrome can cause NVDA to speak outdated information.
segment.target: 尤其在 Chrome 下，快速浏览 Gmail 中的信息时会导致 NVDA 读出无效的内容。

segment.source: This functionality is enabled by default as of NVDA 2021.1.
segment.target: 自 NVDA 2021.1 起，此选项默认启用。

segment.source: Trim leading silence in speech audio
segment.target: 去除语音开头的静音

segment.source: When enabled, NVDA will remove silence from the start of speech audio, which may improve the responsiveness of some speech synthesizers.
segment.target: 启用此选项后，NVDA 将去除语音音频起始部分的静音，这可能提升部分语音合成器的响应速度。

segment.source: This option is enabled by default, and should only affect the silence at the beginning of speech.
segment.target: 该选项默认开启，且仅会影响语音开始时的静音。

segment.source: If you find that some necessary silence periods are also missing (e.g. pause between two sentences) when using a speech synthesizer add-on, you may turn this feature off entirely to resolve the issue.
segment.target: 若您在使用语音合成器插件时发现必要的静音段落缺失（例如句间停顿），可关闭此功能以解决问题。

segment.source: Use WASAPI for SAPI 4 audio output
segment.target: SAPI 4 使用 WASAPI 输出音频

segment.source: This option enables Microsoft Speech API version 4 (SAPI 4) voices to output audio via the Windows Audio Session API (WASAPI).
segment.target: 此选项允许 Microsoft Speech API version 4（SAPI 4）的语音通过 Windows 音频会话 API（WASAPI）输出音频。

segment.source: This can allow SAPI 4 voices to work with more features, such as leading silence trimming and keeping audio device awake.
segment.target: 该功能可使 SAPI 4 语音支持更多特性，例如：去除语音开头的静音、音频设备保持唤醒等。

segment.source: However, some SAPI 4 voices might not work with the current WASAPI implementation.
segment.target: 但请注意，部分 SAPI 4 语音可能无法兼容当前的 WASAPI 实现方案。

segment.source: If you find that the SAPI 4 voice you are using stops working, you may disable this option.
segment.target: 若您使用的 SAPI 4 语音出现异常，可通过禁用此选项来恢复。

segment.source: Note that in Speech settings, there is a similar [option for SAPI 5 voices](#SpeechSettingsUseWasapi), not to be confused with this one.
segment.target: 请注意，在语音设置中有一个类似的[针对 SAPI 5 语音的选项](#SpeechSettingsUseWasapi)，请勿与此选项混淆。

segment.source: Options |Default (Enabled), Disabled, Enabled
segment.target: 选项 | 默认（已启用）、已禁用、已启用

segment.source: Default |Enabled
segment.target: 默认 | 已启用

segment.source: Caret move timeout (in MS)
segment.target: 光标移动超时（毫秒）

segment.source: This option allows you to configure the number of milliseconds NVDA will wait for the caret (insertion point) to move in editable text controls.
segment.target: 此选项允许您配置 NVDA 等多长时间之后才从编辑框获取光标位置。

segment.source: If you find that NVDA seems to be incorrectly tracking the caret E.g. it seems to be always one character behind or is repeating lines, then you may wish to try increasing this value.
segment.target: 如果您发现 NVDA 光标朗读有问题，比如位置不对，那么你可以增加这个时间试试。

segment.source: Report transparency for colors
segment.target: 读出透明色值

segment.source: This option enables reporting when colors are transparent, useful for addon/appModule developers gathering information to improve user experience with a 3rd party application.
segment.target: 启用此选项可在颜色透明时朗读，这对于插件开发者收集信息以改善用户使用第三方应用程序的体验非常有用。

segment.source: Some GDI applications will highlight text with a background color, NVDA (via display model) attempts to report this color.
segment.target: 一些 GDI 应用程序会用背景颜色突出显示文本，NVDA（通过显示模型）尝试读出这些颜色。

segment.source: In some situations, the text background may be entirely transparent, with the text layered on some other GUI element.
segment.target: 在某些情况下，文本背景可能是完全透明的，文本分层在其他一些 GUI 元素上。

segment.source: With several historically popular GUI APIs, the text may be rendered with a transparent background, but visually the background color is accurate.
segment.target: 使用几个历史上流行的 GUI API，文本可能会以透明背景渲染，但在视觉上背景颜色是准确的。

segment.source: Debug logging categories
segment.target: 调试日志

segment.source: The checkboxes in this list allow you to enable specific categories of debug messages in NVDA's log.
segment.target: 此列表中的复选框允许您在 NVDA 日志中启用特定类别的调试信息。

segment.source: Logging these messages can result in decreased performance and large log files.
segment.target: 记录这些信息可能会影响性能而且会增大日志文件的体积。

segment.source: Only turn one of these on if specifically instructed to by an NVDA developer e.g. when debugging why a braille display driver is not functioning correctly.
segment.target: 例如调试点显器驱动程序时，NVDA 开发者会让你打开其中一个，请不要同时开启多个。

segment.source: Play a sound for logged errors
segment.target: 日志记录后播放错误提示音

segment.source: This option allows you to specify if NVDA will play an error sound in case an error is logged.
segment.target: 此选项允许您选择 NVDA 是否在捕捉到错误时播放错误提示音。

segment.source: Choosing Only in test versions (default) makes NVDA play error sounds only if the current NVDA version is a test version (alpha, beta or run from source).
segment.target: 选择“仅测试版”（默认）仅当 NVDA 版本是测试版本（alpha、beta 或从源代码运行）时 NVDA 会播放错误提示音。

segment.source: Choosing Yes allows to enable error sounds whatever your current NVDA version is.
segment.target: 选择“是”，启用错误声音，无论您当前的 NVDA 是什么版本。

segment.source: Regular expression for text paragraph quick navigation commands
segment.target: 文本段落导航的正则表达式

segment.source: This field allows users to customize regular expression for detecting text paragraphs in browse mode.
segment.target: 此编辑框可以让用户自定义在浏览模式下检测文本段落的正则表达式。

segment.source: The [text paragraph navigation command](#TextNavigationCommand) searches for paragraphs matched by this regular expression.
segment.target: [文本段落导航命令](#TextNavigationCommand)会查找匹配该正则表达式的文本段落。

segment.source: miscellaneous Settings
segment.target: 杂项设置

segment.source: Besides the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog, The Preferences sub-menu of the NVDA Menu contains several other items which are outlined below.
segment.target: 除[NVDA 设置](#NVDASettings)对话框外，NVDA 菜单的“选项”子菜单包含下面列出的其他几个项目。

segment.source: Speech dictionaries
segment.target: 语音字典

segment.source: The speech dictionaries menu (found in the Preferences menu) contains dialogs that allow you to manage the way NVDA pronounces particular words or phrases.
segment.target: “语音字典”对话框，可用来为特定词语或者短语指定特殊的朗读方法，它可以在“选项”菜单下的“语音字典”找到。

segment.source: There are currently three different types of speech dictionaries.
segment.target: 目前，存在三种类型的字典。

segment.source: They are:
segment.target: 分别是：

segment.source: Default: rules in this dictionary affect all speech in NVDA.
segment.target: 默认：字典的规则会应用于所有 NVDA 的语音输出。

segment.source: Voice: rules in this dictionary affect speech for the synthesizer voice currently being used.
segment.target: 语音：字典的规则会应用于当前使用的合成器语音的输出。

segment.source: Temporary: rules in this dictionary affect all speech in NVDA, but only for the current session. These rules are temporary and will be lost if NVDA is restarted.
segment.target: 临时：字典的规则会应用于 NVDA 所有的语音输出，但仅在当前会话中可用，规则是临时的，并在下次 NVDA 重新启动之后丢失数据。

segment.source: You need to assign custom gestures using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures) if you wish to open any of these dictionary dialogs from anywhere.
segment.target: 如果您想随时打开任意一个字典对话框，您必须在[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)设置一个自定义快捷键。

segment.source: All dictionary dialogs contain a list of rules which will be used for processing the speech.
segment.target: 所有字典对话框都包含一个将用于处理发音的规则列表。

segment.source: The dialog also contains Add, Edit, Remove and Remove all buttons.
segment.target: 该对话框还包含添加、编辑、移除和移除全部按钮。

segment.source: To add a new rule to the dictionary, press the Add button, and fill in the fields in the dialog box that appears and then press Ok.
segment.target: 要想为字典添加规则，点击“添加”按钮，在出现的对话框的各个编辑区域中填入规则内容之后点击“确认”按钮。

segment.source: You will then see your new rule in the list of rules.
segment.target: 之后您就可以在规则列表中看到您的新规则。

segment.source: However, to make sure your rule is actually saved, make sure to press Ok to exit the dictionary dialog completely once you have finished adding/editing rules.
segment.target: 然而，要想确认您的字典规则实际上已经保存，请确保您在完成编辑的同时通过按下“确认”按钮来退出字典对话框。

segment.source: The rules for NVDA's speech dictionaries allow you to change one string of characters into another.
segment.target: NVDA 的字典规则允许您将一串字符变成其他的字符。

segment.source: For example, you could create a rule which causes NVDA to say the word "frog" instead of "bird" whenever the word "bird" is encountered.
segment.target: 下面的一个简单例子，假设您希望每次读到“bird”这个单词的时候用“frog”代替。

segment.source: In the Add rule dialog, the easiest way to do this is to type the word bird in the Pattern field, and the word frog in the Replacement field.
segment.target: 在“添加规则”对话框，您只需简单地在“原文本”编辑区域输入“bird”这个单词，并在“替换文本”编辑区域输入“frog”。

segment.source: You may also want to type a description of the rule in the Comment field (something like: changes bird to frog).
segment.target: 您可能也希望在“注释”编辑区域输入规则的描述（大概是：把 bird 更改为 frog）。

segment.source: NVDA's speech dictionaries however are much more powerful than simple word replacement.
segment.target: NVDA 的语音字典比之单词替换更为强大。

segment.source: The Add rule dialog also contains a checkbox to say whether or not you want the rule to be case sensitive (meaning that NVDA should care whether the characters are uppercase or lowercase.
segment.target: “添加规则”对话框还包含一个区分大小写复选框（这意味着 NVDA 应该区分字符是大写还是小写）。

segment.source: NVDA ignores case by default).
segment.target: 默认情况下，NVDA 忽略大小写)。

segment.source: Finally, a set of radio buttons allows you to tell NVDA whether your pattern should match anywhere, should only match if it is a complete word or should be treated as a "Regular expression".
segment.target: 最后的一组单选按钮告诉 NVDA 您的来源文本到底应该匹配任何地方、匹配整个单词或为“正则表达式”。

segment.source: Setting the pattern to match as a whole word means that the replacement will only be made if the pattern does not occur as part of a larger word.
segment.target: 设置模式以匹配整个单词意味着仅当模式不作为较大单词的一部分出现时才进行替换。

segment.source: This condition is met if the characters immediately before and after the word are anything other than a letter, a number, or an underscore, or if there are no characters at all.
segment.target: 如果单词前后的字符不是字母，数字或下划线，或者根本没有字符，则满足此条件。

segment.source: Thus, using the earlier example of replacing the word "bird" with "frog", if you were to make this a whole word replacement, it would not match "birds" or "bluebird".
segment.target: 因此，使用前面的示例将“ bird”替换为“ frog”的示例，如果您将其替换为整个单词，则它将与“ birds”或“ bluebird”不匹配。

segment.source: A regular expression is a pattern containing special symbols that allow you to match on more than one character at a time, or match on just numbers, or just letters, as a few examples.
segment.target: “正则表达式”是一个包含特殊符号的匹配模板，允许您同时匹配多个字符，仅匹配数字或仅匹配字母等等。

segment.source: Regular expressions are not covered in this user guide.
segment.target: 本指南不会教你如何使用正则表达式。

segment.source: For an introductory tutorial, please refer to [Python's Regular Expression Guide](https://docs.python.org/3.13/howto/regex.html).
segment.target: 您可以参考 [Python 的正则表达式文档](https://docs.python.org/3.13/howto/regex.html)来学习。

segment.source: Punctuation/symbol pronunciation
segment.target: 标点符号读音

segment.source: This dialog allows you to change the way punctuation and other symbols are pronounced, as well as the symbol level at which they are spoken.
segment.target: 此对话框允许您修改标点符号的发音，并指定语音输出标点符号的级别。

segment.source: The language for which symbol pronunciation is being edited will be shown in the dialog's title.
segment.target: 正在编辑的标点发音所属的语言会被显示在对话框的标题上。

segment.source: Note that this dialog respects the "Trust voice's language for processing symbols and characters" option found in the [Speech category](#SpeechSettings) of the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog; i.e. it uses the voice language rather than the NVDA global language setting when this option is enabled.
segment.target: 请注意，此对话框依照位于 [NVDA 设置](#NVDASettings)中的[语音设置类别](#SpeechSettings)下的“处理字符和标点时信任语音的语言”选项而定，极如果此选项被选中，将使用语音的语言代替 NVDA 本地语言设置。

segment.source: To change a symbol, first select it in the Symbols list.
segment.target: 要想修改某个标点，请在标点列表选择它。

segment.source: You can filter the symbols by entering the symbol or a part of the symbol's replacement into the Filter by edit box.
segment.target: 您可以通过在“查找”编辑框中输入符号或符号替换的一部分来寻找符号。

segment.source: The Replacement field allows you to change the text that should be spoken in place of this symbol.
segment.target: “替换文本”编辑区域允许您定义用来替换此标点的文本。

segment.source: Using the Level field, you can adjust the lowest symbol level at which this symbol should be spoken (none, some, most or all).
segment.target: 使用“标点符号级别”区域，您可以为希望读出的标点指定更低的级别（无、少数、多数或全部）。

segment.source: You can also set the level to character; in this case the symbol will not be spoken regardless of the symbol level in use, with the following two exceptions:
segment.target: 您也可以将级别设置为逐字移动；在这种情况下，无论使用的符号级别如何，都不会读出该符号，以下两种情况除外：

segment.source: When navigating character by character.
segment.target: 逐字浏览时。

segment.source: When NVDA is spelling any text containing that symbol.
segment.target: 当 NVDA 拼读包含该符号的文本时。

segment.source: The Send actual symbol to synthesizer field specifies when the symbol itself (in contrast to its replacement) should be sent to the synthesizer.
segment.target: “发送实际标点到合成器”区域定义核实把标点自身而不是替换文本传送到合成器。

segment.source: This is useful if the symbol causes the synthesizer to pause or change the inflection of the voice.
segment.target: 这对于让合成器读取该标点时的语调或停顿发生改变非常有用。

segment.source: For example, a comma causes the synthesizer to pause.
segment.target: 例如，一个逗号可以让合成器暂停。

segment.source: There are three options:
segment.target: 这里有三个选项：

segment.source: never: Never send the actual symbol to the synthesizer.
segment.target: 从不：从不发送标点到合成器。

segment.source: always: Always send the actual symbol to the synthesizer.
segment.target: 总是:总是发送标点符号本身到合成器。

segment.source: only below symbols' level: Send the actual symbol only if the configured speech symbol level is lower than the level set for this symbol.
segment.target: 仅标点符号级别低于：仅当配置的标点级别低于为标点设置的级别时，发送标点本身到合成器。

segment.source: For example, you might use this so that a symbol will have its replacement spoken at higher levels without pausing, while still being indicated with a pause at lower levels.
segment.target: 例如，您可以使用此功能来让标点在处于比自身级别更高时不暂停且拥有替换文本，而在比自身级别低时暂停。

segment.source: You can add new symbols by pressing the Add button.
segment.target: 您可以通过点击“添加”按钮增加新的符号。

segment.source: In the dialog that appears, enter the symbol and press the OK button.
segment.target: 在出现的对话框输入标点名称并点击“确定”按钮。

segment.source: Then, change the fields for the new symbol as you would for other symbols.
segment.target: 然后，像您修改其他标点一样的修改新标点每个区域的值。

segment.source: You can remove a symbol you previously added by pressing the Remove button.
segment.target: 您可以点击“删除”按钮移除您先前添加的符号。

segment.source: When you are finished, press the OK button to save your changes or the Cancel button to discard them.
segment.target: 当您完成之后，您可以点击“确认”按钮保存设置或者点击“取消”按钮放弃修改。

segment.source: In the case of complex symbols, the Replacement field may have to include some group references of the matched text. For instance, for a pattern matching a whole date, \1, \2, and \3 would need to appear in the field, to be replaced by the corresponding parts of the date.
segment.target: 对于复杂符号规则，“替换”字段可能必须包含匹配文本的某些组引用。例如，对于匹配完整日期的表达式，\1、\2 和 \3 必须出现，以用来替换日期的相应部分。
