segment.source: Normal backslashes in the Replacement field should thus be doubled, e.g. "a\\\\b" should be typed in order to get the "a\\b" replacement.
segment.target: 因此，“替换”字段中的正常反斜杠应输入两个，例如应该键入“a\\\\b”以达到“a\\b”的替换效果。

segment.source: Input Gestures
segment.target: 按键与手势

segment.source: In this dialog, you can customize the input gestures (keys on the keyboard, buttons on a braille display, etc.) for NVDA commands.
segment.target: 使用“按键与手势”对话框，可为 NVDA 的命令自定义手势或快捷键（如键盘上的按键、点显器上的按钮等等）。

segment.source: Only commands that are applicable immediately before the dialog is opened are shown.
segment.target: 此对话框仅显示在其被打开之前可用的命令。

segment.source: For example, if you want to customize commands related to browse mode, you should open the Input Gestures dialog while you are in browse mode.
segment.target: 例如，您如果想修改浏览模式的命令，您必须在处于浏览模式的情况下，打开“按键与手势”对话框。

segment.source: The tree in this dialog lists all of the applicable NVDA commands grouped by category.
segment.target: 此对话框的树视图按分类的分组方式显示了所有可应用的 NVDA 命令。

segment.source: You can filter them by entering one or more words from the command's name into the Filter by edit box in any order.
segment.target: 您可以通过在“查找”编辑框中输入命令的部分文本进行查找。

segment.source: Any gestures associated with a command are listed beneath the command.
segment.target: 任何与命令相关的按键或手势都会被列举在该命令下。

segment.source: To add an input gesture to a command, select the command and press the Add button.
segment.target: 要想为一个命令添加按键或手势，选择该命令并点击“添加”按钮。

segment.source: Then, perform the input gesture you wish to associate; e.g. press a key on the keyboard or a button on a braille display.
segment.target: 然后，执行您希望与该命令关联的手势，如按下键盘的按键或者点显器的按钮。

segment.source: Often, a gesture can be interpreted in more than one way.
segment.target: 通常，一个按键或手势可以用多种方式进行理解。

segment.source: For example, if you pressed a key on the keyboard, you may wish it to be specific to the current keyboard layout (e.g. desktop or laptop) or you may wish it to apply for all layouts.
segment.target: 例如，如您按下一个键盘的按键，您可能希望指定其用于当前的键盘布局（如台式机键盘或笔记本键盘）或希望应用于所有的键盘布局。

segment.source: In this case, a menu will appear allowing you to select the desired option.
segment.target: 在此种情况下，出现的菜单允许您选择期望的选项。

segment.source: To remove a gesture from a command, select the gesture and press the Remove button.
segment.target: 要想从一个命令删除按键或手势，选择要删除的项目并点击“移除”按钮。

segment.source: The Emulated system keyboard keys category contains NVDA commands that emulate keys on the system keyboard.
segment.target: “模拟系统按键”类别包含 NVDA 命令，用于模拟系统键盘上的按键。

segment.source: These emulated system keyboard keys can be used to control a system keyboard right from your braille display.
segment.target: 这些模拟的系统键盘的按键可用于直接从点显器控制系统键盘。

segment.source: To add an emulated input gesture, select the Emulated system keyboard keys category and press the Add button.
segment.target: 要添加需要模拟的按键或手势，请选择“模拟系统按键”类别，然后按“添加”按钮。

segment.source: Then, press the key on the keyboard you wish to emulate.
segment.target: 然后，按要模拟的按键。

segment.source: After that, the key will be available from the Emulated system keyboard keys category and you will be able to assign an input gesture to it as described above.
segment.target: 之后，该键将在“模拟系统按键”类别中可用，并且您将能够如上所述为其分配按键或手势。

segment.source: Note:
segment.target: 注意:

segment.source: Emulated keys must have gestures assigned in order to persist when saving / closing the dialog.
segment.target: 被模拟的键需要分配快捷键或手势，否则无法保存。

segment.source: An input gesture with modifier keys may not be able to be mapped to an emulated gesture without modifier keys.
segment.target: 有修饰键的按键模拟没有修饰键的按键会出问题。

segment.source: For instance, setting the emulated input `a` and configuring an input gesture of `ctrl+m`, may result in the application receiving `ctrl+a`.
segment.target: 比如用 `Ctrl+m` 模拟按下 `a` 键，应用程序最终收到的其实是 `Ctrl+a`。

segment.source: When you are finished making changes, press the OK button to save them or the Cancel button to discard them.
segment.target: 当您完成修改之后，点击“确认”保存设置或点击“取消”按钮放弃。

segment.source: Saving and Reloading the configuration
segment.target: 保存或重新加载配置

segment.source: By default NVDA will automatically save your settings on exit.
segment.target: 默认情况下，NVDA 会在退出时保存您的设置。

segment.source: Note, however, that this option can be changed under the general options in the preferences menu.
segment.target: 请注意，此设置可以在“选项”菜单下的“常规设置”修改。

segment.source: To save the settings manually at any time, choose the Save configuration item in the NVDA menu.
segment.target: 任何时候想手动保存配置，可选择 NVDA 菜单的“保存配置”项目。

segment.source: If you ever make a mistake with your settings and need to revert back to the saved settings, choose the "revert to saved configuration" item in the NVDA menu.
segment.target: 如果您做了一个错误的修改，希望恢复到上次保存的设置，在 NVDA 菜单选择“重新应用已保存的配置”菜单项目。

segment.source: You can also reset your settings to their original factory defaults by choosing Reset Configuration To Factory Defaults, which is also found in the NVDA menu.
segment.target: 您也可重置您的设置到初始的默认状态，可使用“重置设置为默认值”，它也可在 NVDA 菜单中找到。

segment.source: The following NVDA key commands are also useful:
segment.target: 下面的 NVDA 按键命令也很实用：

segment.source: Name |Desktop key |Laptop key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 台式机键盘 | 笔记本键盘 | 描述

segment.source: Save configuration |`NVDA+control+c` |`NVDA+control+c` |Saves your current configuration so that it is not lost when you exit NVDA
segment.target: 保存设置 | NVDA+Ctrl+c | NVDA+Ctrl+c | 保存您的当前配置，当您退出 NVDA 时也不会丢失

segment.source: Revert configuration |`NVDA+control+r` |`NVDA+control+r` |Pressing once resets your configuration to when you last saved it. Pressing three times will reset it back to factory defaults.
segment.target: 恢复配置 | NVDA+Ctrl+r | NVDA+Ctrl+r | 按一次重置您的设置到上一次保存的状态，连按三次恢复到默认的出厂设置。

segment.source: Configuration Profiles
segment.target: 配置文件

segment.source: Sometimes, you may wish to have different settings for different situations.
segment.target: 有些时候，您可能希望在不同的场景下拥有不同的设置。

segment.source: For example, you may wish to have reporting of indentation enabled while you are editing or reporting of font attributes enabled while you are proofreading.
segment.target: 例如，您可能希望在编辑文档时启用缩进的朗读，在校对的时候启用字体属性朗读。

segment.source: NVDA allows you to do this using configuration profiles.
segment.target: 通过使用配置，NVDA 允许您这样做。

segment.source: A configuration profile contains only those settings which are changed while the profile is being edited.
segment.target: 配置文件仅包含当配置处于编辑状态时更改的设置。

segment.source: Most settings can be changed in configuration profiles except for those in the General category of the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog, which apply to the entirety of NVDA.
segment.target: 大多数设置都可以跟随配置文件，但 [NVDA 设置](#NVDASettings)对话框常规类别中的设置除外，这些设置影响 NVDA 全局。

segment.source: Configuration profiles can be manually activated either from a dialog or using custom added gestures.
segment.target: 配置文件可通过对话框或使用自定义添加的快捷键手动激活。

segment.source: They can also be activated automatically due to triggers such as switching to a particular application.
segment.target: 它也可由一些触发条件自动激活，如切换到特定程序。

segment.source: Basic Management
segment.target: 基本配置管理

segment.source: You manage configuration profiles by selecting "Configuration profiles" in the NVDA menu.
segment.target: 您可以通过选择 NVDA 的“管理配置”菜单来管理配置文件。

segment.source: You can also do this using a key command:
segment.target: 您还可使用下列键盘命令来执行此操作：

segment.source: NVDA+control+p: Show the Configuration Profiles dialog.
segment.target: NVDA+Ctrl+p：显示“配置管理”对话框。

segment.source: The first control in this dialog is the profile list from which you can select one of the available profiles.
segment.target: 此对话框的第一个控件就是配置列表，您可以在此选择一个可用的配置。

segment.source: When you open the dialog, the profile you are currently editing is selected.
segment.target: 当您打开一个对话框，当前选择的配置就是您要编辑的配置。

segment.source: Additional information is also shown for active profiles, indicating whether they are manually activated, triggered and/or being edited.
segment.target: 显示在激活配置的附加信息指示，它们是否需要手动激活，已关联或正在编辑。

segment.source: To rename or delete a profile, press the Rename or Delete buttons, respectively.
segment.target: 要想删除或重命名配置，分别点击“删除”按钮或“重命名”按钮即可。

segment.source: Press the Close button to close the dialog.
segment.target: 点击“关闭”按钮关闭对话框。

segment.source: Creating a Profile
segment.target: 创建配置

segment.source: To create a profile, press the New button.
segment.target: 要想创建配置，点击“新建”按钮。

segment.source: In the New Profile dialog, you can enter a name for the profile.
segment.target: 在“新建配置”对话框，您可以为配置键入名称。

segment.source: You can also select how this profile should be used.
segment.target: 您也可以指定该配置的使用方法。

segment.source: If you only want to use this profile manually, select Manual activation, which is the default.
segment.target: 如果您只想手动使用此配置，选择“手动激活”，这是默认设置。

segment.source: Otherwise, select a trigger which should automatically activate this profile.
segment.target: 否则，选择一个“关联”来自动激活该配置。

segment.source: For convenience, if you haven't entered a name for the profile, selecting a trigger will fill in the name accordingly.
segment.target: 为方便起见，如果您并没有为配置输入名称，名称就会依照您选择的关联而自动填入。

segment.source: See [below](#ConfigProfileTriggers) for more information about triggers.
segment.target: 请查看下面[激活配置](#ConfigProfileTriggers)章节有关于“关联”的信息。

segment.source: Pressing OK will create the profile and close the Configuration Profiles dialog so you can edit it.
segment.target: 点击“确认”按钮创建配置并关闭配置文件对话框，使得您可以开始对其进行编辑。

segment.source: Manual Activation
segment.target: 手动激活

segment.source: You can manually activate a profile by selecting a profile and pressing the Manual activate button.
segment.target: 您可以通过选择一个配置并点击“手动激活”按钮手动激活配置。

segment.source: Once activated, other profiles can still be activated due to triggers, but any settings in the manually activated profile will override them.
segment.target: 一旦激活，其他配置的关联仍然处于激活状态，但包含在手动配置的设置会覆盖关联的配置。

segment.source: For example, if a profile is triggered for the current application and reporting of links is enabled in that profile but disabled it in the manually activated profile, links will not be reported.
segment.target: 例如，一个配置设置在当前程序下启用链接的朗读，但是手动激活的配置设置为不朗读链接，那么，链接将不会朗读。

segment.source: However, if you have changed the voice in the triggered profile but have never changed it in the manually activated profile, the voice from the triggered profile will be used.
segment.target: 然而，如果您在关联的配置中修改了语音选项，而在手动激活的配置中没有修改，此时使用的将是关联配置的设置（译者注：这个设定并不矛盾，因为手动配置并没有改动设置，如果你在手动配置中更改过语音设置，那么，语音设置会和手动配置同步变更）。

segment.source: Any settings you change will be saved in the manually activated profile.
segment.target: 任何您进行的修改都会被保存在手动激活的配置中。

segment.source: To deactivate a manually activated profile, select it in the Configuration Profiles dialog and press the Manual deactivate button.
segment.target: 要想停用手动激活的配置，可在“配置管理”对话框选择此配置并点击“手动停用”按钮。

segment.source: Triggers
segment.target: 关联

segment.source: Pressing the Triggers button in the Configuration Profiles dialog allows you to change the profiles which should be automatically activated for various triggers.
segment.target: 点击“管理配置”对话框的“关联”按钮允许您基于各种“关联”修改配置的自动激活。

segment.source: The Triggers list shows the available triggers, which are as follows:
segment.target: 下面显示了所有能在关联列表看到的关联：

segment.source: Current application: Triggered when you switch to the current application.
segment.target: 当前程序：当您切换到当前程序时激活。

segment.source: Say all: Triggered while reading with the say all command.
segment.target: 全文朗读：当您在使用全文朗读命令时激活。

segment.source: To change the profile which should be automatically activated for a trigger, select the trigger and then select the desired profile from the Profile list.
segment.target: 要想更改一个配置自动触发的条件，选择一个关联条件并从配置列表选择您期望的配置。

segment.source: You can select "(normal configuration)" if you don't want a profile to be used.
segment.target: 如果您不想使用此配置，您可以选择通用配置。

segment.source: Press the Close button to return to the Configuration Profiles dialog.
segment.target: 点击“关闭”按钮返回“配置管理”对话框。

segment.source: Editing a Profile
segment.target: 编辑配置

segment.source: If you have manually activated a profile, any settings you change will be saved to that profile.
segment.target: 如果您手动激活了一个配置，任何设置都会自动保存在这个配置里。

segment.source: Otherwise, any settings you change will be saved to the most recently triggered profile.
segment.target: 否则，您进行的任何设置将会被保存在最近关联的配置之内。

segment.source: For example, if you have associated a profile with the Notepad application and you switch to Notepad, any changed settings will be saved to that profile.
segment.target: 例如，如果您最近为应用程序“记事本”关联了一个配置，您切换到“记事本”时进行的修改，都会被保存在此关联的配置之内。

segment.source: Finally, if there is neither a manually activated nor a triggered profile, any settings you change will be saved to your normal configuration.
segment.target: 最后，如果您既没有手动激活配置，也没有为程序创建关联，那么，您进行的任何修改都会被保存在通用配置。

segment.source: To edit the profile associated with say all, you must [manually activate](#ConfigProfileManual) that profile.
segment.target: 要想编辑与“全文朗读”进行了关联的配置，您必须[手动激活](#ConfigProfileManual)该配置。

segment.source: Temporarily Disabling Triggers
segment.target: 临时停用关联

segment.source: Sometimes, it is useful to temporarily disable all triggers.
segment.target: 有时，临时停用所有关联将非常实用。

segment.source: For example, you might wish to edit a manually activated profile or your normal configuration without triggered profiles interfering.
segment.target: 例如，您可能希望在不受到其他关联配置影响的情况下，对手动激活的配置或者通用配置进行修改。

segment.source: You can do this by checking the Temporarily disable all triggers checkbox in the Configuration Profiles dialog.
segment.target: 您可以在“管理配置”对话框中选中“临时停用所有关联”复选框达到此目的。

segment.source: To toggle disabling triggers from anywhere, please assign a custom gesture using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 要想随时切换是否临时停用所有关联，请在[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)分配一个自定义快捷键。

segment.source: Activating a profile using input gestures
segment.target: 使用按键或手势激活配置

segment.source: For every profile you add, you are able to assign one or more input gestures to activate it.
segment.target: 对于您添加的每个配置文件，您都可以分配一个或多个按键或手势来激活它。

segment.source: By default, configuration profiles do not have input gestures assigned.
segment.target: 默认情况下，配置文件没有分配按键或手势。

segment.source: You can add gestures to activate a profile using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 您可以使用[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)添加手势以激活配置文件。

segment.source: Every profile has its own entry under the configuration profiles category.
segment.target: 每个配置文件在配置文件类别下都有自己的条目。

segment.source: When you rename a profile, any gesture you added previously will still be available.
segment.target: 重命名配置文件时，您之前添加的任何按键或手势仍然可用。

segment.source: Removing a profile will automatically delete the gestures associated with it.
segment.target: 删除配置文件将自动删除与其关联的按键或手势。

segment.source: Location of Configuration files
segment.target: 配置文件保存的位置

segment.source: Portable versions of NVDA store all settings and add-ons in a directory called userConfig, found in the NVDA directory.
segment.target: 便携版本的 NVDA 设置和插件都被直接存放在 NVDA 所在目录下的 userConfig 目录中。

segment.source: Installed versions of NVDA store all settings and add-ons in a special NVDA directory located in your Windows user profile.
segment.target: 安装版本的 NVDA 的所有插件和配置文件都放在您的 Windows 用户配置的文件的 NVDA 目录下。

segment.source: This means that each user on the system can have their own NVDA settings.
segment.target: 系统内的每个用户都可以拥有自己的配置。

segment.source: To open your settings directory from anywhere you can use [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures) to add a custom gesture.
segment.target: 如果想随时访问 NVDA 配置目录可以在“[按键与手势](#InputGestures)”对话框内为“浏览当前的 NVDA 用户配置目录”命令分配一个快捷键。

segment.source: In addition for an installed version of NVDA, on the start menu you can go to programs -> NVDA -> explore user configuration directory.
segment.target: 此外，对于安装板的 NVDA 您还可以从开始菜单的 NVDA 文件夹找到“浏览 NVDA 用户配置目录”入口。

segment.source: Settings for NVDA when running during sign-in or on UAC screens are stored in the systemConfig directory in NVDA's installation directory.
segment.target: 运行在欢迎屏幕或 UAC 屏幕时的 NVDA 设置都被存放在 NVDA 安装目录下的 SystemConfig 目录中。

segment.source: Usually, this configuration should not be touched.
segment.target: 通常情况下，不要接触这些配置文件。

segment.source: To change NVDA's configuration during sign-in or on UAC screens, configure NVDA as you wish while signed into Windows, save the configuration, and then press the "use currently saved settings during sign-in and on secure screens" button in the General category of the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog.
segment.target: 要想更改 NVDA 在欢迎屏幕和 UAC 屏幕上的配置，您需要在登录 Windows 后保存配置，然后转到 “[NVDA 设置](#NVDASettings)”中的“常规”设置对话框，点击“应用已保存的配置到欢迎界面和其他安全界面”按钮。

segment.source: Remote Access
segment.target: 远程访问

segment.source: With NVDA's built-in remote access feature, you can control another computer running NVDA or allow someone to control your computer.
segment.target: 借助 NVDA 内置的远程访问功能，您可控制另一台运行 NVDA 的计算机，或允许他人控制您的计算机。

segment.source: This makes it easy to provide or receive assistance, collaborate, or access your own computer remotely.
segment.target: 该功能便于提供/获取技术支持、开展协作或远程访问自己的计算机。

segment.source: Remote access is disabled by default for your security.
segment.target: 出于安全考虑，远程访问功能默认为禁用状态。

segment.source: You can enable Remote Access [in Remote Access settings](#RemoteSettings).
segment.target: 您可在[远程访问设置](#RemoteSettings)中启用该功能。

segment.source: Getting Started
segment.target: 开始使用

segment.source: Before you begin, ensure NVDA is installed and running on both computers.
segment.target: 使用前请确保两台计算机均已安装并运行 NVDA。

segment.source: Also ensure that the Enable Remote Access checkbox [in Remote Access settings](#RemoteSettings) is checked on both computers.
segment.target: 还要确保双方计算机均在[远程访问设置](#RemoteSettings)中选中启用远程访问复选框。

segment.source: The remote access feature will then be available from the Tools menu in NVDA; there's no need for additional downloads or installations.
segment.target: 随后即可在 NVDA 的工具菜单中使用远程访问功能，无需额外下载或安装组件。

segment.source: If NVDA is running in [secure mode](#SecureMode), you cannot manually initiate a new Remote Access session.
segment.target: 若 NVDA 在[安全模式](#SecureMode)下运行，您将无法手动发起新的远程会话。

segment.source: However, NVDA will still automatically start a new Remote Access session if configured to do so with the [Automatically connect after NVDA starts](#RemoteAutoconnect) setting.
segment.target: 但若已启用[NVDA 启动后自动连接](#RemoteAutoconnect)设置，程序仍会自动建立远程会话。

segment.source: You can still manually disconnect in secure mode.
segment.target: 安全模式下仍可手动断开现有连接。

segment.source: Setting Up a Remote Access Session
segment.target: 建立远程访问会话

segment.source: Remote access sessions are configured via the Remote Access connection dialog.
segment.target: 可通过连接到另一台计算机对话框配置远程访问会话。

segment.source: Open the NVDA menu and select Tools, then "Remote Access", then "Connect...".
segment.target: 打开 NVDA 菜单，依次选择“工具” -> “远程访问” -> “连接...”。

segment.source: Or from anywhere press `NVDA+alt+r`.
segment.target: 或直接按 `NVDA+Alt+r` 快捷键。

segment.source: Mode Selection (Controlling or Controlled)
segment.target: 模式选择（主控或被控）

segment.source: You'll need to decide which computer will be controlled (the controlled computer) and which will be controlling (the controlling computer).
segment.target: 您需确定哪台计算机将被控制（被控计算机），以及哪台计算机将进行控制（主控计算机）。

segment.source: the mode combo box allows you to choose whether this computer will be controlled (Another person will interact with your computer) or controlling (you will interact with someone else's computer).
segment.target: 模式组合框允许您选择允许此计算机被控制（他人将操作您的计算机）还是控制另一台计算机（您将操作他人的计算机）。

segment.source: If you require another person to help you with your computer, choose "Allow this computer to be controlled".
segment.target: 如果您需要他人协助，请选择“允许此计算机被控制”。

segment.source: If you are going to help someone with their computer, choose "Control another computer".
segment.target: 如果您要帮助他人，请选择"控制另一台计算机"。

segment.source: Connecting to an existing server (Host and Key Provided)
segment.target: 连接到现有服务器（已知主机和密钥）

segment.source: In this case, the other person has either started the connection via a relay server, or is hosting the connection locally.
segment.target: 当对方已通过中继服务器或局域网发起连接时。

segment.source: For Server, choose "Use existing".
segment.target: 在服务器组合框选择使用现有。

segment.source: In the Host field, Enter the host address (and port if also given).
segment.target: 在主机字段输入对方提供的主机地址和端口（如有）。

segment.source: You may include the port to connect on by appending a colon (":") and the port number to the host address.
segment.target: 您可通过在主机地址后附加冒号（“:”）和端口号来包含要连接的端口。

segment.source: For example, `example.com:1234`.
segment.target: 例如，`example.com:1234`。

segment.source: In the Key field, enter the key provided.
segment.target: 在密钥字段输入对方提供的密钥。

segment.source: Be careful to type the key exactly as given.
segment.target: 请准确输入给定的密钥。

segment.source: Press OK.
segment.target: 点击确定。

segment.source: Starting a Connection Via a Relay Server
segment.target: 通过中继服务器发起连接

segment.source: If allowing another person to connect to you over the internet, the easiest option is to use a relay server. To do this:
segment.target: 若允许他人通过互联网连接您的计算机，最简单的方法是使用中继服务器。操作步骤如下：

segment.source: For Server, choose "Use existing".
segment.target: 在服务器组合框选择使用现有。

segment.source: For host, provide the host name of a relay server, such as `nvdaremote.com`.
segment.target: 在主机字段输入中继服务器地址（如 `nvdaremote.com`，译者注：中国用户可[在这里](https://www.nvdacn.com/index.php/archives/844/)查看国内的一些志愿组织/个人贡献的服务器）。

segment.source: You will need to provide this address to the other person.
segment.target: 需将此地址告知对方。

segment.source: You may include the port to connect on by appending a colon (":") and the port number to the host.
segment.target: 您可通过在主机地址后附加冒号（“:”）和端口号来包含要连接的端口。

segment.source: For example, `example.com:1234`.
segment.target: 例如，`example.com:1234`。

segment.source: For key: come up with a long, hard to guess key, or press the "Generate Key" button to have one automatically generated.
segment.target: 在密钥字段输入一个难以猜测的长密钥，或点击生成密钥按钮自动创建。

segment.source: You will need to provide this to the other person.
segment.target: 需将此密钥告知对方。

segment.source: Note that the key acts as both the identifier for the session and the password, so it is very important it is hard to guess.
segment.target: 请注意：该密钥同时作为会话标识符和密码，因此必须确保其难以被猜测。

segment.source: Press OK.
segment.target: 点击确定。

segment.source: Provide the connection details (such as host and key) to the other person so they can connect.
segment.target: 将连接信息（如主机地址和密钥）提供给对方以便其连接。

segment.source: Using NVDA as the server
segment.target: 使用 NVDA 作为服务器

segment.source: If you do not wish to use a relay server or you are connecting over a local network:
segment.target: 适用于通过局域网连接或不愿使用中继服务器时：

segment.source: For Server, choose "Host locally".
segment.target: 在服务器组合框选择本地托管。

segment.source: If connecting over the internet, you can press the "Get External IP" button to show your external IP (internet visible) address.
segment.target: 若通过互联网连接，可点击获取公网 IP 按钮显示您的公网 IP 地址。

segment.source: You will need to provide this external IP to the other person.
segment.target: 需将此公网 IP 告知对方。

segment.source: If connecting over a local network, you will need to provide the other person with your local IP.
segment.target: 若通过局域网连接，需提供本机局域网 IP 地址。

segment.source: Locating this is not covered in this documentation.
segment.target: 本文档不包含如何查找局域网 IP 地址的内容。

segment.source: For Port, enter the port you want to use for incoming Remote connections.
segment.target: 在端口字段输入用于远程连接的端口号。

segment.source: The other person will also need this.
segment.target: 对方同样需要此端口号。

segment.source: This should be a port that is not used by any other services.
segment.target: 应选择未被其他服务占用的端口。

segment.source: By default, Remote Access uses port 6837.
segment.target: 远程访问默认使用 6837 端口。

segment.source: If connecting over the internet, the port may need to be forwarded.
segment.target: 通过互联网连接时可能需要端口转发。

segment.source: This documentation does not cover how to forward ports.
segment.target: 本文档不包含端口转发的教程。

segment.source: You may need to contact your network administrator to do this.
segment.target: 您可能需要联系网络管理员完成此操作。

segment.source: For key: come up with a long, hard to guess key, or press the "Generate Key" button to have one automatically generated.
segment.target: 在密钥字段输入一个难以猜测的长密钥，或点击生成密钥按钮自动创建。

segment.source: You will need to provide this to the other person.
segment.target: 需将此密钥告知对方。

segment.source: Note that the key acts as both the identifier for the session and the password, so it is very important it is hard to guess.
segment.target: 请注意：该密钥同时作为会话标识符和密码，因此必须确保其难以被猜测。

segment.source: Press OK.
segment.target: 点击确定。

segment.source: Provide the connection details (such as host and key) to the other person so they can connect.
segment.target: 将连接信息（如主机地址和密钥）提供给对方以便其连接。

segment.source: Using Remote Access
segment.target: 使用远程访问

segment.source: Once a Remote Access session is active, you can switch between controlling the remote computer and your own, share your clipboard, and mute the remote session:
segment.target: 远程访问会话建立后，您可执行以下操作：

segment.source: Press `NVDA+alt+tab` to toggle between controlling and returning to your own computer.
segment.target: 按 `NVDA+Alt+Tab` 在控制远程计算机与控制本地计算机之间切换。

segment.source: Send text from your clipboard to the other computer by opening the NVDA menu, then selecting Tools, then "Remote Access", then "Send clipboard".
segment.target: 通过 NVDA 菜单 -> 工具 -> 远程访问 -> 发送剪贴板，可将剪贴板中的文本发送到另一台计算机。

segment.source: If connected as the controlling computer, mute the remote computer's speech output on your local computer by opening the NVDA menu, then selecting Tools, then "Remote Access", then "Mute remote".
segment.target: 作为主控计算机时，可通过 NVDA 菜单 -> 工具 -> 远程访问 -> 远程静音屏蔽远程计算机的语音输出。

segment.source: If connected as the controlling computer, send `control+alt+delete` to the controlled computer by opening the NVDA menu, then selecting Tools, then "Remote Access", then "Send control+alt+delete".
segment.target: 作为主控计算机时，可通过 NVDA 菜单 -> 工具 -> 远程访问 -> 发送 Ctrl+Alt+Delete，向被控计算机发送 Ctrl+Alt+Delete。

segment.source: In order for this to work, the controlled computer must be running an installed copy of NVDA.
segment.target: 使用此功能，被控计算机必须运行安装版 NVDA。

segment.source: Additionally, depending on the settings of the controlled computer, this function may not always work.
segment.target: 此外，根据被控计算机的设置，此功能可能并不总是有效。

segment.source: Remote Access Key Commands Summary
segment.target: 远程访问按键命令汇总

segment.source: Name |Key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 按键 | 描述

segment.source: Toggle Remote connection | `NVDA+alt+r` | Starts a new Remote Access session or, if a session is already in progress, disconnects from it.
segment.target: 切换远程连接 | `NVDA+Alt+r` | 建立新远程访问会话，若已有会话则断开连接。

segment.source: Toggle Control | `NVDA+alt+tab` | Switches between controlling the remote and local computer.
segment.target: 切换控制权 | `NVDA+Alt+Tab` | 在控制远程计算机与控制本地计算机之间切换。

segment.source: Connect | None | Starts a new Remote Access session. Unavailable in [secure mode](#SecureMode).
segment.target: 连接 | 无 | 建立新的远程访问会话（在[安全模式](#SecureMode)下不可用）。

segment.source: Copy link | None | Copies a link to the remote session to the clipboard.
segment.target: 复制链接 | 无 | 将远程会话的链接复制到剪贴板。

segment.source: Disconnect | None | Ends an existing Remote Access session.
segment.target: 断开 | 无 | 终止当前的远程访问会话。

segment.source: Mute remote | None | Mutes or unmutes the speech coming from the remote computer.
segment.target: 远程静音 | 无 | 开关远程计算机的语音输出。

segment.source: Send clipboard | None | Sends the contents of the clipboard to the remote computer.
segment.target: 发送剪贴板 | 无 | 发送剪贴板的内容到远程计算机。

segment.source: Send `control+alt+delete` | None | Sends `control+alt+delete` to the controlled computer.
segment.target: 发送 `Ctrl+Alt+Delete` | 无 | 发送 `Ctrl+Alt+Delete` 到被控计算机。

segment.source: Add-ons and the Add-on Store
segment.target: 插件和插件商店

segment.source: Add-ons are software packages which provide new or altered functionality for NVDA.
segment.target: 插件是为 NVDA 提供新功能或更改现有功能的软件包。

segment.source: They are developed by the NVDA community, and external organisations such as commercial vendors.
segment.target: 这些插件往往由 NVDA 社区以及外部商业供应商等组织开发。

segment.source: Add-ons may do any of the following:
segment.target: 插件可以执行以下任一操作：

segment.source: Add or enhance support for certain applications.
segment.target: 增加或增强对某些应用程序的支持能力。

segment.source: Provide support for extra Braille displays or speech synthesizers.
segment.target: 提供对第三方盲文点显器或语音合成器的支持。

segment.source: Add or change features in NVDA.
segment.target: 添加或更改 NVDA 的功能。

segment.source: NVDA's Add-on Store allows you to browse and manage add-on packages.
segment.target: NVDA 的插件商店可以让您浏览和管理插件。

segment.source: All add-ons that are available in the Add-on Store can be downloaded for free.
segment.target: 插件商店中提供的所有插件都可免费下载。

segment.source: However, some of them may require users to pay for a license or additional software before they can be used.
segment.target: 然而，其中个别插件可能要求用户在使用前购买许可证或额外付费。

segment.source: Commercial speech synthesizers are an example of this type of add-on.
segment.target: 一个典型的例子是个别商业版语音合成器。

segment.source: If you install an add-on with paid components and change your mind about using it, the add-on can be easily removed.
segment.target: 如果您在安装了需要付费的插件后不想使用，您可以轻松移除该插件。

segment.source: The Add-on Store is accessed from the Tools submenu of the NVDA menu.
segment.target: 您可以从 NVDA 菜单的“工具”子菜单打开插件商店。

segment.source: To access the Add-on Store from anywhere, assign a custom gesture using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 若需要从任意位置打开插件商店，请在[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)中分配一个自定义快捷键。

segment.source: Security warning for add-ons
segment.target: 插件的安全警告

segment.source: Add-ons listed in the Add-on Store have not been vetted by NV Access or anyone else.
segment.target: 插件商店中列出的插件未经 NV Access 或其他机构的审查。

segment.source: It is very important to only install add-ons from sources you trust.
segment.target: 因此只安装来自可信来源的插件非常重要。

segment.source: The functionality of add-ons is unrestricted inside NVDA.
segment.target: 插件的功能在 NVDA 内部不受限制。

segment.source: This could include accessing and modifying your personal data or even the entire system.
segment.target: 这可能包括访问和修改您的个人数据，甚至整个系统。

segment.source: Add-ons submitted to the Add-on Store are scanned by [VirusTotal](https://www.virustotal.com/).
segment.target: 提交到插件商店的插件会经过 [VirusTotal](https://www.virustotal.com/) 扫描。

segment.source: This can detect malware that was known when the add-on was submitted.
segment.target: 这可以检测到插件提交时已知的恶意软件。

segment.source: However, VirusTotal results may be inaccurate or out of date.
segment.target: 然而，VirusTotal 的结果可能不准确或已过时。

segment.source: For example, an add-on that is marked as malicious might not be malicious, and an add-on that is not marked as malicious might actually be malicious.
segment.target: 例如，一个被标记为恶意的插件可能实际上并无恶意，而一个未被标记的插件反而可能确实存在恶意风险。

segment.source: You can view a summary of the scan results for a scanned add-on by reviewing the add-on's details.
segment.target: 您可通过查看被扫描插件的其他详情来获取该插件的扫描结果摘要。

segment.source: You can view the VirusTotal scan results directly using the "VirusTotal scan results" [action from the context menu](#AddonStoreActions).
segment.target: 也可使用上下文菜单中的“VirusTotal 扫描结果”[操作](#AddonStoreActions)来查看详细的扫描报告。

segment.source: There are a number of other ways of investigating the safety of an add-on:
segment.target: 还有许多其他方法可以调查插件的安全性：

segment.source: Research the developer's reputation (e.g. how long have they been contributing)
segment.target: 调查开发者的声誉（例如，他们贡献了多久）

segment.source: Look for user feedback in the [NVDA user group](https://groups.google.com/a/nvaccess.org/g/nvda-users) or the [NVDA add-on group](https://nvda-addons.groups.io/g/nvda-addons)
segment.target: 在 [NVDA 用户邮件列表](https://groups.google.com/a/nvaccess.org/g/nvda-users) 或 [NVDA 插件邮件列表](https://nvda-addons.groups.io/g/nvda-addons) 中寻找用户反馈

segment.source: Verify that the add-on is regularly updated
segment.target: 确认该插件是否定期更新

segment.source: Read [Community reviews](#AddonStoreReviews) of the add-on
segment.target: 阅读该插件的[社区评论](#AddonStoreReviews)

segment.source: Seek community feedback through forums or social media
segment.target: 通过论坛或社交媒体寻求社区反馈

segment.source: Browsing add-ons
segment.target: 浏览插件

segment.source: When opened, the Add-on Store displays a list of add-ons.
segment.target: 打开插件商店后，会显示一个插件列表。

segment.source: If you have not installed an add-on before, the Add-on Store will open to a list of add-ons available to install.
segment.target: 如果您尚未安装插件，插件商店会停留在可安装的插件列表。

segment.source: If you have installed add-ons, the list will display currently installed add-ons.
segment.target: 如果您已经安装了插件，列表内将显示当前安装的插件。

segment.source: Selecting an add-on, by moving to it with the up and down arrow keys, will display the details for the add-on.
segment.target: 按上下光标键移动到对应插件来选中某个插件，选中后将显示该插件的详细信息。

segment.source: Add-ons have associated actions that you can access through an [actions menu](#AddonStoreActions), such as install, help, disable, and remove.
segment.target: 对于已选中的插件有与之关联的操作，您可以通过[操作菜单](#AddonStoreActions)访问这些操作，例如安装、帮助、禁用和移除。

segment.source: Available actions will change based on whether the add-on is installed or not, and whether it is enabled or disabled.
segment.target: 可用的操作会根据是否安装插件以及是否启用或禁用而有所差异。

segment.source: Add-on list views
segment.target: 插件选项卡组

segment.source: There are different views for installed, updatable, available and incompatible add-ons.
segment.target: 对于已安装的、可更新的、可用的和不兼容的插件有不同的选项卡。

segment.source: To change the view of add-ons, change the active tab of the add-ons list using `ctrl+tab`.
segment.target: 可以使用 `Ctrl+Tab` 切换不同的选项卡。

segment.source: You can also `tab` to the list of views, and move through them with the `leftArrow` and `rightArrow` keys.
segment.target: 您还可以按 `Tab` 到选项卡组，用`左光标`或`右光标`键进行切换。

segment.source: Filtering for enabled or disabled add-ons
segment.target: 过滤已启用或已禁用的插件

segment.source: Normally, an installed add-on is "enabled", meaning that it is running and available within NVDA.
segment.target: 通常，已安装的插件处于“启用”状态，这意味着该插件正在 NVDA 中运行且可用。

segment.source: However, some of your installed add-ons may be set to the "disabled" state.
segment.target: 但是，您安装的某些插件可能会被设置为“禁用”状态。

segment.source: This means that they will not be used, and their functions won't be available during your current NVDA session.
segment.target: 这意味着，这些插件不可用，其功能在您当前 NVDA 会话中无效。

segment.source: You may have disabled an add-on because it conflicted with another add-on, or with a certain application.
segment.target: 您也可能会因为插件与插件或与应用程序之间存在冲突而选择禁用某个插件。

segment.source: NVDA may also disable certain add-ons, if they are found to be incompatible during an NVDA upgrade; though you will be warned if this is going to happen.
segment.target: 如果在 NVDA 升级过程中发现某些插件不兼容，NVDA 也可能会禁用这些插件；但在这种情况下，您会收到警告。

segment.source: Add-ons can also be disabled if you simply don't need them for a prolonged period, but don't want to uninstall them because you expect to want them again in the future.
segment.target: 如果您长时间用不到某些插件，又想保留它们以备不时之需，您也可以选择禁用插件。

segment.source: The lists of installed and incompatible add-ons can be filtered by their enabled or disabled state.
segment.target: 已安装和不兼容的插件列表可以按其启用​​或禁用状态进行过滤。

segment.source: The default shows both enabled and disabled add-ons.
segment.target: 默认会显示已启用和已禁用的插件。

segment.source: Include incompatible add-ons
segment.target: 包含不兼容插件

segment.source: Available and updatable add-ons can be filtered to include [incompatible add-ons](#incompatibleAddonsManager) that are available to install.
segment.target: 在“可更新的插件”和“可安装的插件”中可以选择包含[不兼容的插件](#incompatibleAddonsManager)进行安装。

segment.source: Filter add-ons by channel
segment.target: 按通道过滤插件

segment.source: Add-ons can be distributed through up to four channels:
segment.target: 插件最多可以通过四个通道发布：

segment.source: Stable: The developer has released this as a tested add-on with a released version of NVDA.
segment.target: 稳定版：开发者使用 NVDA 的稳定版对其进行了测试后发布。

segment.source: Beta: This add-on may need further testing, but is released for user feedback.
segment.target: 测试版：插件可能需要进一步测试，公开发布以便收集用户反馈。

segment.source: Suggested for early adopters.
segment.target: 建议尝鲜用户选用。

segment.source: Dev: This channel is suggested to be used by add-on developers to test unreleased API changes.
segment.target: 开发板：建议插件开发者使用此通道来测试未发布的 API 变更。

segment.source: NVDA alpha testers may need to use a "Dev" version of their add-ons.
segment.target: 使用 NVDA alpha 版的测试用户可能需要使用此开发板插件。

segment.source: External: Add-ons installed from external sources, outside of the Add-on Store.
segment.target: 外部：从插件商店的外部源安装的插件。

segment.source: To list add-ons only for specific channels, change the "Channel" filter selection.
segment.target: 如需仅列出来自特定通道的插件，请在“通道”组合框内选择相应的通道。

segment.source: Searching for add-ons
segment.target: 搜索插件

segment.source: To search add-ons, use the "Search" text box.
segment.target: 要搜索插件，请使用“搜索”编辑框。

segment.source: You can reach it by pressing `shift+tab` from the list of add-ons.
segment.target: 您可以从插件列表按 `Shift+Tab` 找到该编辑框。

segment.source: Type a keyword or two for the kind of add-on you're looking for, then `tab` to the list of add-ons.
segment.target: 输入一两个有关您要搜索的插件类型的关键词，然后按 `Tab` 键进入插件列表。

segment.source: Add-ons will be listed if the search text can be found in the add-on ID, display name, publisher, author or description.
segment.target: 如果可以在插件 ID、显示名称、发布者、作者或描述等字段中找到所键入的关键词，则会列出插件。

segment.source: Sorting the add-ons list by column
segment.target: 对插件列表排序

segment.source: By default, the add-ons list is sorted by the add-ons' display name.
segment.target: 默认情况下，插件列表按插件的显示名称排序。

segment.source: The "Sort by column" combo box can be used to sort the list by the available columns for each tab.
segment.target: 通过排序组合框，可根据各选项卡的可用列对列表进行排序。

segment.source: For example, you may wish to sort add-ons by publisher, available version, etc.
segment.target: 例如，您可按发布者、可用版本等对插件进行排序。

segment.source: Add-ons can be sorted in ascending or descending order.
segment.target: 支持以升序或降序方式排列插件。

segment.source: Add-on actions
segment.target: 插件操作

segment.source: Add-ons have associated actions, such as install, help, disable, and remove.
segment.target: 插件具有与之关联的操作，例如安装、帮助、禁用和移除。

segment.source: For an add-on in the add-on list, these actions can be accessed through a menu opened by pressing the `applications` key, `enter`, right clicking or double clicking the add-on.
segment.target: 对于插件列表中的插件，可以通过按`applications`、`回车`、右键单击或双击该插件打开的菜单来访问这些操作。

segment.source: This menu can also be accessed through an Actions button in the selected add-on's details.
segment.target: 还可以通过选中插件详细信息中的“操作”按钮访问该菜单。

segment.source: Installing add-ons
segment.target: 安装插件

segment.source: Note: Add-ons are programs that can modify and access your device like any other software you download.
segment.target: 请注意：插件是一种程序，它能像您下载的其他软件一样修改和访问您的设备。

segment.source: Make sure to only install add-ons from sources you trust.
segment.target: 请务必只安装来自您信任来源的插件。

segment.source: Please read [our security warning](#AddonStoreSecurityWarning) for more details before installing add-ons.
segment.target: 在安装插件之前，请阅读我们的[安全警告](#AddonStoreSecurityWarning)以获取更多详细信息。

segment.source: You can install and update add-ons by [browsing Available add-ons](#AddonStoreBrowsing).
segment.target: 您可以[浏览可用的插件](#AddonStoreBrowsing)来安装和更新插件。

segment.source: Select an add-on from the "Available add-ons" or "Updatable add-ons" tab.
segment.target: 从“可安装的插件”或“可更新的插件”选项卡中选择一个插件。

segment.source: Then use the update, install, or replace action to start the installation.
segment.target: 然后使用更新、安装或替换操作开始安装。

segment.source: If the download or installation fails you can retry the installation.
segment.target: 如果下载或安装失败，您可重试安装。

segment.source: It is also possible to cancel the install before exiting the Add-on Store.
segment.target: 还可在退出插件商店前取消安装。

segment.source: You can also install multiple add-ons at once.
segment.target: 您还可以一次性安装多个插件。

segment.source: This can be done by selecting multiple add-ons in the available add-ons tab, then activating the context menu on the selection and choosing the "Install selected add-ons" action.
segment.target: 只需在“可安装的插件”选项卡中选择多个插件，随后激活所选插件的上下文菜单并选择“安装所选”即可。

segment.source: To install an add-on you have obtained outside of the Add-on Store, press the "Install from external source" button.
segment.target: 要安装从插件商店外部获取的插件，请按“从外部源安装”按钮。

segment.source: This will allow you to browse for an add-on package (`.nvda-addon` file) somewhere on your computer or on a network.
segment.target: 这可以让您在计算机或网络上的某个位置浏览插件包（`.nvda-addon` 文件）。

segment.source: Once you open the add-on package, the installation process will begin.
segment.target: 打开插件包后，安装过程将开始。

segment.source: If NVDA is installed and running on your system, you can also open an add-on file directly from the browser or file system to begin the installation process.
segment.target: 如果您在系统上已安装并运行了 NVDA，您还可以直接从浏览器或文件资源管理器打开插件文件以开始安装过程。

segment.source: When an add-on is being installed from an external source, NVDA will ask you to confirm the installation.
segment.target: 从外部源安装插件时，NVDA 会要求您确认安装。

segment.source: Once the add-on is installed, NVDA must be restarted for the add-on to start running, although you may postpone restarting NVDA if you have other add-ons to install or update.
segment.target: 安装插件后，必须重新启动 NVDA 才能使插件生效，但如果您还有其他插件需要安装或更新，则可以推迟重新启动 NVDA。

segment.source: By default, after NVDA startup, you will be notified if any add-on updates are available.
segment.target: 默认情况下，在 NVDA 启动后，如果插件有更新，您将会收到通知。

segment.source: To learn more about and configure this behaviour, refer to ["Update Notifications"](#AutomaticAddonUpdates).
segment.target: 要了解更多信息并设置该行为，请参阅“[更新通知](#AutomaticAddonUpdates)”。

segment.source: Removing Add-ons
segment.target: 移除插件

segment.source: To remove an add-on, select the add-on from the list and use the Remove action.
segment.target: 要移除特定插件，请从列表中选择该插件并使用“移除”操作。

segment.source: NVDA will ask you to confirm removal.
segment.target: NVDA 将询问您是否确认移除。

segment.source: As with installing, NVDA must be restarted for the add-on to be fully removed.
segment.target: 与安装一样，必须重新启动 NVDA 才能完全删除该插件。

segment.source: Until you do, a status of "Pending removal" will be shown for that add-on in the list.
segment.target: 在重启之前，列表中该插件的状态会显示为“待删除”。

segment.source: As with installing, you can also remove multiple add-ons at once.
segment.target: 与安装一样，您也可以一次性删除多个插件。

segment.source: Disabling and Enabling Add-ons
segment.target: 禁用和启用插件

segment.source: To disable an add-on, use the "disable" action.
segment.target: 要禁用特定插件，请使用“禁用”操作。

segment.source: To enable a previously disabled add-on, use the "enable" action.
segment.target: 要启用先前禁用的插件，请使用“启用”操作。

segment.source: You can disable an add-on if the add-on status indicates it is "enabled", or enable it if the add-on is "disabled".
segment.target: 如果插件状态显示“已启用”，您可以禁用该插件；反之，如果插件“已禁用”，则可以启用。

segment.source: For each use of the enable/disable action, add-on status changes to indicate what will happen when NVDA restarts.
segment.target: 每次使用启用/禁用操作时，插件状态都会发生变化，以指示 NVDA 重新启动时会发生什么情况。

segment.source: If the add-on was previously "disabled", the status will show "enabled after restart".
segment.target: 如果该插件之前被“禁用”，则状态将显示“已启用，重启后生效”。

segment.source: If the add-on was previously "enabled", the status will show "disabled after restart".
segment.target: 如果该插件之前已“启用”，则状态将显示“已禁用，重启后生效”。

segment.source: Just like when you install or remove add-ons, you need to restart NVDA in order for changes to take effect.
segment.target: 就像安装或删除插件时一样，您需要重新启动 NVDA 才能使更改生效。

segment.source: You can also enable or disable multiple add-ons at once by selecting multiple add-ons in the available add-ons tab, then activating the context menu on the selection and choosing the appropriate action.
segment.target: 您还可以在“可安装的插件”选项卡中选择多个插件，随后激活所选插件的上下文菜单并选择相应操作，从而批量启用或禁用多个插件。

segment.source: Reviewing add-ons and reading reviews
segment.target: 评论插件和阅读评论

segment.source: You may want to read reviews by other users who have experienced an add-on, for example before you install it, or as you are learning to use it.
segment.target: 在安装插件之前或在学习插件的用法过程中，您可能想看看其他用户的使用心得。

segment.source: Also, it is helpful to other users to provide feedback about add-ons you have tried.
segment.target: 同样地，如果您使用过某个插件，提供反馈信息也会对其他用户有所帮助。

segment.source: To read reviews for an add-on, select it, and use the "Community reviews" action.
segment.target: 要阅读相应插件的评论，可以选择一个插件，通过“评论网址”进入到插件的评论页面。

segment.source: This links to a GitHub Discussion webpage, where you will be able to read and write reviews for the add-on.
segment.target: 该网址会打开一个 GitHub 讨论页面，您可以在此页面阅读或撰写有关该插件的评论。

segment.source: Please be aware that this doesn't replace direct communication with add-on developers.
segment.target: 请注意，此评论并不能取代与插件开发者的直接沟通。

segment.source: Instead, the purpose of this feature is to share feedback to help users decide if an add-on may be useful for them.
segment.target: 此评论页面的目的是让用户分享使用心得，帮助其他用户决定某个插件是否对他们有用。

segment.source: Changing the automatic update channel
segment.target: 更改自动更新通道

segment.source: You can manage the automatic update channels for add-ons from the [installed and updatable add-ons tabs](#AddonStoreFilterStatus).
segment.target: 您可通过[已安装的插件和可更新的插件选项卡](#AddonStoreFilterStatus)管理插件的自动更新通道。

segment.source: When [Automatic add-on updates](#AutomaticAddonUpdates) are enabled, add-ons will update to the same [channel](#AddonStoreFilterChannel) they were installed from by [default](#DefaultAddonUpdateChannel).
segment.target: 当[自动更新插件](#AutomaticAddonUpdates)功能启用时，[默认](#DefaultAddonUpdateChannel)会从与已安装版本相同的[通道](#AddonStoreFilterChannel)获取插件更新。

segment.source: From an add-on's actions menu, using the submenu "Update channel", you can modify the channels an add-on will automatically update to.
segment.target: 通过操作菜单中的“自动更新通道”子菜单，可修改插件的自动更新通道。

segment.source: Option | Behaviour
segment.target: 选项 | 行为

segment.source: Default | Add-on will follow the [default update channel](#DefaultAddonUpdateChannel)
segment.target: 默认 | 插件将遵循[默认更新通道设置](#DefaultAddonUpdateChannel)

segment.source: Same | Add-on will remain on the same channel
segment.target: 与已安装版本相同 | 插件仅会更新到当前通道的新版本

segment.source: Any | Add-on will automatically update to the latest version, regardless of channel
segment.target: 不限 | 不考虑通道，自动更新到最新的可用版本

segment.source: Do not update | Add-on will not automatically update
segment.target: 关闭自动更新 | 插件将不会自动更新

segment.source: Stable | Add-on will automatically update to stable versions
segment.target: 稳定版 | 插件将自动更新到稳定通道的新版本

segment.source: Beta or dev | Add-on will automatically update to beta or dev versions
segment.target: 测试版或开发板 | 插件将自动更新到测试或开发通道的新版本

segment.source: Beta | Add-on will automatically update to beta versions
segment.target: 测试版 | 插件将自动更新到测试通道的新版本

segment.source: Dev | Add-on will automatically update to dev versions
segment.target: 开发板 | 插件将自动更新到开发通道的新版本

segment.source: What's new in the current version
segment.target: 当前版本的更新日志

segment.source: If an add-on lists what's new for the current version, an action will be available to show these changes in browse mode.
segment.target: 如果插件列出了当前版本的更新日志，则会提供一个操作，用于在浏览模式下显示这些信息。

segment.source: The add-on version is included in the title of the message.
segment.target: 该消息的标题将标明插件版本。

segment.source: Buttons are provided to copy the presented information or close the message window.
segment.target: 可通过专用按钮复制显示的信息或关闭消息窗口。

segment.source: Incompatible Add-ons
segment.target: 不兼容的插件

segment.source: Some older add-ons may no longer be compatible with the version of NVDA that you have.
segment.target: 某些较旧的插件可能已经不兼容您当前版本的 NVDA 了。

segment.source: If you are using an older version of NVDA, some newer add-ons may not be compatible either.
segment.target: 反之，若您使用的是旧版本的 NVDA，某些较新的插件可能也无法向下兼容。

segment.source: Attempting to install an incompatible add-on will result in an error explaining why the add-on is considered incompatible.
segment.target: 若您尝试安装不兼容的插件会显示错误，提示为什么该插件被视为不兼容。

segment.source: For older add-ons, you can override the incompatibility at your own risk.
segment.target: 对于较旧的插件，您可以自行承担可能的风险，忽略兼容性以强行安装不兼容的插件。

segment.source: Incompatible add-ons may not work with your version of NVDA, and can cause unstable or unexpected behaviour including crashing.
segment.target: 不兼容的插件可能无法在您当前版本的 NVDA 中使用，尤其可能导致 NVDA 不稳定或意外行为，包括崩溃。

segment.source: You can override compatibility when enabling or installing an add-on.
segment.target: 您可以在启用或安装插件时忽略兼容性。

segment.source: If the incompatible add-on causes issues later, you can disable or remove it.
segment.target: 如果不兼容的插件导致问题，您可以选择禁用或移除相应插件。

segment.source: If you are having trouble running NVDA, and you have recently updated or installed an add-on, especially if it is an incompatible add-on, you may want to try running NVDA temporarily with all add-ons disabled.
segment.target: 如果您在使用 NVDA 过程中遇到问题，并且最近更新或安装了某个插件，尤其安装或更新了不兼容的插件，您可能需要在禁用所有插件的情况下暂时运行 NVDA 以移除可能导致问题的插件。

segment.source: To restart NVDA with all add-ons disabled, choose the appropriate option when quitting NVDA.
segment.target: 要在禁用所有插件的情况下重新启动 NVDA，请在退出 NVDA 时选择相应选项。

segment.source: Alternatively, use the [command line option](#CommandLineOptions) `--disable-addons`.
segment.target: 或者，使用[命令行选项](#CommandLineOptions) `--disable-addons`。

segment.source: You can browse available incompatible add-ons using the [available and updatable add-ons tabs](#AddonStoreFilterStatus).
segment.target: 您可以在[可用和可更新的插件选项卡](#AddonStoreFilterStatus)浏览可用的不兼容插件。

segment.source: You can browse installed incompatible add-ons using the [incompatible add-ons tab](#AddonStoreFilterStatus).
segment.target: 您可以在[不兼容的插件选项卡](#AddonStoreFilterStatus)浏览已安装的不兼容插件。

segment.source: Extra Tools
segment.target: 附加工具

segment.source: Log Viewer
segment.target: 查看日志

segment.source: The log viewer, found under Tools in the NVDA menu, allows you to view the logging output that has occurred since the latest session of NVDA was started.
segment.target: 在 NVDA 的“工具”菜单下可找到“查看日志”，允许您查看自最新 NVDA 会话启动以来发生的日志记录输出。

segment.source: Apart from reading the content, you can also Save a copy of the log file, or refresh the viewer so that it loads new log output generated after the Log viewer was opened.
segment.target: 除了阅读内容，您还可以保存日志文件的副本，或刷新查看器，以便加载打开日志查看器后生成的新日志输出。

segment.source: These actions are available under the Log menu in the log viewer.
segment.target: 此动作可在日志查看器的“日志”菜单下找到。

segment.source: The file which is displayed when you open the log viewer is saved on your computer at the file location `%temp%\nvda.log`.
segment.target: 打开日志查看器时显示的文件保存在计算机上的文件位置为 `%temp%\nvda.log`。

segment.source: A new log file is created each time NVDA is started.
segment.target: 每次启动 NVDA 时都会创建一个新的日志文件。

segment.source: When this happens, the previous NVDA session's log file is moved to `%temp%\nvda-old.log`.
segment.target: 发生这种情况时，前一个 NVDA 会话的日志文件将移至 `%temp%\nvda-old.log`。

segment.source: You can also copy a fragment of the current log file to the clipboard without opening the log viewer.
segment.target: 您还可以在不打开日志查看器的情况下，将当前日志片段复制到剪贴板。

segment.source: Name |Key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 按键 | 描述

segment.source: Open log viewer |`NVDA+f1` |Opens the log viewer and displays developer information about the current navigator object.
segment.target: 打开日志查看器 | `NVDA+f1` | 打开日志查看器并显示有关当前导航对象的开发人员信息。

segment.source: Copy a fragment of the log to the clipboard |`NVDA+control+shift+f1` |When this command is pressed once, it sets a starting point for the log content that should be captured. When pressed a second time, it copies the log content since the start point to your clipboard.
segment.target: 将日志片段复制到剪贴板 | `NVDA+Ctrl+Shift+f1` | 按一次，设置要捕获日志内容的起点。按第二次时，会将从起点开始的日志内容复制到剪贴板。

segment.source: Speech Viewer
segment.target: 朗读查看器

segment.source: For sighted software developers or people demoing NVDA to sighted audiences, a floating window is available that allows you to view all the text that NVDA is currently speaking.
segment.target: 对于明眼的软件开发者或希望向明眼观众演示 NVDA 的人们，有一个浮动的窗口可以查看 NVDA 所有的语音输出文本。

segment.source: To enable the speech viewer, check the "Speech Viewer" menu item under Tools in the NVDA menu.
segment.target: 要想启用朗读查看器，可以在 NVDA 的“工具”菜单选中。

segment.source: Uncheck the menu item to disable it.
segment.target: 取消选中菜单即可停用。

segment.source: The speech viewer window contains a check box labelled "Show speech viewer on startup".
segment.target: 朗读查看器窗口包含选项“启动时显示朗读查看器”。

segment.source: If this is checked, the speech viewer will open when NVDA is started.
segment.target: 如果选中，NVDA 会在启动时打开朗读查看器。

segment.source: The speech viewer window will always attempt to re-open with the same dimensions and location as when it was closed.
segment.target: 此窗口若被关闭，重新打开时也将以相同的尺寸出现在相同的位置。

segment.source: While the speech viewer is enabled, it constantly updates to show you the most current text being spoken.
segment.target: 当朗读查看器启用时，它会不断地更新，从而向您显示最近朗读的文本。

segment.source: However, if you hover your mouse over or focus inside the viewer, NVDA will temporarily stop updating the text, so that you are able to easily select or copy the existing content.
segment.target: 然而，当您将鼠标移动到查看器上或把焦点放在查看器内，NVDA 就会暂停文本的更新，您可以轻松的选择或者复制已有的文本。

segment.source: To toggle the speech viewer from anywhere, please assign a custom gesture using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 要想随时切换朗读查看器的开关，请在[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)分配一个自定义快捷键。

segment.source: Braille Viewer
segment.target: 盲文查看器

segment.source: For sighted software developers or people demoing NVDA to sighted audiences, a floating window is available that allows you to view braille output, and the text equivalent for each braille character.
segment.target: 在视障者向明眼人演示 NVDA 时，显示一个悬浮窗口，其中显示盲文信息，以及每个盲文单元的对应文本。

segment.source: The braille viewer can be used at the same time as a physical braille display, it will match the number of cells on the physical device.
segment.target: 盲文查看器可以與实体点显器同時使用，并显示与实体设备相同数量的盲文单元。

segment.source: While the braille viewer is enabled, it constantly updates to show you the braille that would be displayed on a physical braille display.
segment.target: 打开盲文查看器后，其会实时同步点显器上的信息。

segment.source: To enable the braille viewer, check the "Braille Viewer" menu item under Tools in the NVDA menu.
segment.target: 要想使用盲文查看器，可以再 NVDA 的“工具”菜单选中“盲文查看器”。

segment.source: Uncheck the menu item to disable it.
segment.target: 取消选中菜单即可关闭。

segment.source: Physical braille displays typically have buttons to scroll forwards or backwards, to enable scrolling with the braille viewer tool use the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures) to assign keyboard shortcuts which "Scrolls the braille display back" and "Scrolls the braille display forward"
segment.target: 实体点显器通常有“向前（或向后）滚动”的按钮，如需使用该功能可在[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)指定“向前滚动盲文显示”和“向后滚动盲文显示”的快捷键，用以向前或向后滚动点显器所显示的内容。

segment.source: The braille viewer window contains a check box labelled "Show braille viewer on startup".
segment.target: 盲文查看器窗口包含一个 “启动时显示盲文查看器"的复选框。

segment.source: If this is checked, the braille viewer will open when NVDA is started.
segment.target: 如果选中此复选框，当 NVDA 启动时，盲文查看器将自动启用。

segment.source: The braille viewer window will always attempt to re-open with the same dimensions and location as when it was closed.
segment.target: 盲文查看器会记忆上次打开时的尺寸和位置。

segment.source: The braille viewer window contains a check box labeled "Hover for cell routing", the default is unchecked.
segment.target: 盲文查看器窗口包含一个“鼠标停留跟踪盲文光标位置”的复选框，默认是未选中的。

segment.source: If checked, hovering the mouse over a braille cell will enable trigger the "route to braille cell" command for that cell.
segment.target: 如果选中，鼠标停留在盲文单元格上将执行“将光标移动到或激活盲文单元”命令。

segment.source: This is often used to move the caret or trigger the action for a control.
segment.target: 通常用于移动光标或激活控件。

segment.source: This can be useful for testing NVDA is able to correctly reverse map a from braille cell.
segment.target: 这还有助于测试 NVDA 是否能够反向映射到盲文单元格。

segment.source: To prevent unintentionally routing to cells, the command is delayed.
segment.target: 为防止意外触发，该命令会延迟执行。

segment.source: The mouse must hover until the cell turns green.
segment.target: 必须将鼠标停留片刻，直到单元格变为绿色。

segment.source: The cell will start as a light yellow colour, transition to orange, then suddenly become green.
segment.target: 鼠标所停留的单元格会由浅黄色开始，然后过渡为橙色，进而变为绿色。

segment.source: To toggle the braille viewer from anywhere, please assign a custom gesture using the [Input Gestures dialog](#InputGestures).
segment.target: 要想随时切换盲文查看器的开关，请在[按键与手势对话框](#InputGestures)分配一个自定义快捷键。

segment.source: Python Console
segment.target: Python 控制台

segment.source: The NVDA Python console, found under Tools in the NVDA menu, is a development tool which is useful for debugging, general inspection of NVDA internals or inspection of the accessibility hierarchy of an application.
segment.target: 位于工具菜单下的 NVDA Python 控制台，是调试 NVDA、了解 NVDA 内部原理、以及查看其他软件无障碍支持情况的工具。

segment.source: For more information, please see the [NVDA Developer Guide](https://download.nvaccess.org/documentation/developerGuide.html).
segment.target: 有关更多信息，请参阅 [NVDA 开发者指南](https://download.nvaccess.org/documentation/developerGuide.html)。

segment.source: Add-on Store
segment.target: 插件商店

segment.source: This will open the [NVDA Add-on Store](#AddonsManager).
segment.target: 访问该菜单会打开 [NVDA 插件商店](#AddonsManager)。

segment.source: For more information, read the in-depth section: [Add-ons and the Add-on Store](#AddonsManager).
segment.target: 想了解更多信息请查看：[插件和插件商店](#AddonsManager)。

segment.source: Create portable copy
segment.target: 创建便携版

segment.source: This will open a dialog which allows you to create a portable copy of NVDA out of the currently running version.
segment.target: 显示一个对话框，可以让您从已安装的版本中创建 NVDA 的便携版。

segment.source: Follow the directions in [Creating a portable copy](#CreatingAPortableCopy) for more information.
segment.target: 有关更多信息，请参阅[创建一个便携版](#CreatingAPortableCopy)。

segment.source: Run COM registration fixing tool...
segment.target: 运行 COM 注册修复工具...

segment.source: Sometimes, problems can develop with the Windows Registry, that result in NVDA behaving abnormally.
segment.target: 有时，Windows 注册表可能出现问题，导致 NVDA 运行异常。

segment.source: This can be caused by, for example, installing or uninstalling certain programs (such as Adobe Reader or Math Player), as well as Windows updates and other events.
segment.target: 这些问题可能由安装或卸载某些程序（如 Adobe Reader 或 Math Player）、Windows 更新以及其他事件引发。

segment.source: The COM Registration Fixing Tool attempts to fix these issues by repairing accessibility entries in the registry.
segment.target: COM 注册修复工具会尝试通过修复注册表中的无障碍访问条目来解决这些问题。

segment.source: The types of problem this tool can fix include:
segment.target: 该工具可修复的问题类型包括：

segment.source: NVDA reporting "unknown" or "pane", when navigating in browsers such as Firefox or Edge, mail programs such as Thunderbird, Windows Explorer, the task bar, and other programs.
segment.target: 在 Firefox 或 Edge 等浏览器、Thunderbird 等邮件程序、Windows 资源管理器、任务栏及其他程序中导航时，NVDA 提示"未知"或"窗格"。

segment.source: NVDA failing to switch between focus mode and browse mode when you expect it to.
segment.target: NVDA 未按预期在焦点模式和浏览模式之间切换。

segment.source: Buttons which previously had their names spoken, suddenly being reported only as "button".
segment.target: 原本有名称的按钮突然仅被提示为按钮。

segment.source: NVDA being very slow when navigating in browsers while using browse mode.
segment.target: 使用浏览模式在浏览器中导航时，NVDA 反应迟缓。

segment.source: Because this tool corrects entries in the Windows registry, it requires administrative access to work, just like when installing a program.
segment.target: 由于此工具需修改 Windows 注册表，因此需要管理员权限才能运行，类似于安装程序时的要求。

segment.source: If you have UAC (User Access Control) enabled, as most users do, you will need to follow whatever prompts are presented by UAC, to run the tool successfully.
segment.target: 如您像大多数用户一样启用了 UAC（用户账户控制），您需要根据 UAC 提示完成授权才能成功运行该工具。

segment.source: Reload plugins
segment.target: 重新加载插件

segment.source: This item, once activated, reloads app modules and global plugins without restarting NVDA, which can be useful for developers.
segment.target: 该功能可以在不重新启动 NVDA 的情况下重新加载应用程序模块和全局插件，此功能对于开发者非常有用。

segment.source: App modules manage how NVDA interacts with specific applications.
segment.target: 应用程序模块决定 NVDA 如何与特定的应用程序交互。

segment.source: Global plugins manage how NVDA interacts with all applications.
segment.target: 全局插件决定 NVDA 如何与所有应用程序交互。

segment.source: The following NVDA key commands may also be useful:
segment.target: 以下命令也可能有用：

segment.source: Name |Key |Description
segment.target: 名称 | 按键 | 描述

segment.source: Reload plugins |`NVDA+control+f3` |Reloads NVDA's global plugins and app modules.
segment.target: 重新加载插件 | `NVDA+Ctrl+f3` | 重新加载 NVDA 的全局插件和应用程序模块。

segment.source: Report loaded app module and executable |`NVDA+control+f1` |Report the name of the app module, if any, and the name of the executable associated with the application which has the keyboard focus.
segment.target: 读出当前加载的应用程序模块和可执行文件名称 | `NVDA+Ctrl+f1` | 读出应用程序模块的名称（如果有）以及具有键盘焦点的应用程序所关联的可执行文件名。

segment.source: Supported Speech Synthesizers
segment.target: 支持的语音合成器

segment.source: This section contains information about the speech synthesizers supported by NVDA.
segment.target: 此章节包含 NVDA 支持的合成器的信息。

segment.source: For an even more extensive list of free and commercial synthesizers that you can purchase and download for use with NVDA, please see the [extra voices page](https://github.com/nvaccess/nvda/wiki/ExtraVoices).
segment.target: 要想查看更多您可以购买或下载的、可用于 NVDA 的免费或商业语音合成器的列表，请查看[extra voices 页面（英语）](https://github.com/nvaccess/nvda/wiki/ExtraVoices)（译者注：更多的语音合成器资源也可访问 NVDA 中文站[语音合成器集中下载页](https://www.nvdacn.com/tts.html)获取）。

segment.source: eSpeak NG
segment.target: eSpeak NG

segment.source: The [eSpeak NG](https://github.com/espeak-ng/espeak-ng) synthesizer is built directly into NVDA and does not require any other special drivers or components to be installed.
segment.target: [eSpeak NG](https://github.com/espeak-ng/espeak-ng) 语音合成器预装在 NVDA 之中，不需要安装特别的驱动或者组件。

segment.source: As this synthesizer is built into NVDA, this is a great choice for when running NVDA off a USB thumb drive on other systems.
segment.target: 作为 NVDA 的预装合成器，对于在其他系统通过 U 盘运行 NVDA 来说，这是一个很好的选择。

segment.source: Each voice that comes with eSpeak NG speaks a different language.
segment.target: 每个 eSpeak NG 的语音都可以说一种不同的语言。

segment.source: There are over 43 different languages supported by eSpeak NG.
segment.target: eSpeak NG 支持超过 43 种不同的语言。

segment.source: There are also many variants which can be chosen to alter the sound of the voice.
segment.target: 它还包含许多可供选择的、能作用于语音声音的变体。

segment.source: Microsoft Speech API version 4 (SAPI 4)
segment.target: Microsoft Speech API version 4（SAPI 4）

segment.source: SAPI 4 is an older Microsoft standard for software speech synthesizers.
segment.target: SAPI 4 是一个很古老的微软语音合成器标准。

segment.source: NVDA still supports this for users who already have SAPI 4 synthesizers installed.
segment.target: 对于安装了 SAPI 4 合成器的用户，NVDA 仍然提供支持。

segment.source: However, Microsoft no longer support this and needed components are no longer available from Microsoft.
segment.target: 但是，微软已经放弃了对该功能的支持，也不再提供相关的语音组件。

segment.source: When using this synthesizer with NVDA, the available voices (accessed from the [Speech category](#SpeechSettings) of the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog or by the [Synth Settings Ring](#SynthSettingsRing)) will contain all the voices from all the installed SAPI 4 engines found on your system.
segment.target: 在 NVDA 中使用该语音合成器时，可以在“[NVDA 设置](#NVDASettings)”下的“[语音设置类别](#SpeechSettings)”或通过[循环切换合成器设置](#SynthSettingsRing)找到已安装的所有 SAPI4 语音。

segment.source: Microsoft Speech API version 5 (SAPI 5)
segment.target: Microsoft Speech API version 5 (SAPI 5)

segment.source: SAPI 5 is a Microsoft standard for software speech synthesizers.
segment.target: SAPI 5 是一个微软语音合成器标准。

segment.source: NVDA supports both 32-bit and 64-bit SAPI 5 voices.
segment.target: NVDA 支持 32 位和 64 位的 SAPI 5 语音。

segment.source: For the best performance and feature compatibility, 64-bit voices should be preferred.
segment.target: 为了获得最佳性能和功能兼容性，应首选 64 位语音。

segment.source: Many speech synthesizers that comply with this standard may be purchased or downloaded for free from various companies and websites, though your system will probably already come with at least one SAPI 5 voice preinstalled.
segment.target: 许多支持该标准的语音合成器可以在其公司的网站上购买或免费下载。您的系统内可能已经预装了至少一个 SAPI 5 语音。

segment.source: When using the 32-bit or 64-bit SAPI 5 synthesizer with NVDA, the available voices (accessed from the [Speech category](#SpeechSettings) of the [NVDA Settings](#NVDASettings) dialog or by the [Synth Settings Ring](#SynthSettingsRing)) will contain all the voices from all the installed 32-bit or 64-bit SAPI 5 engines found on your system, respectively.
segment.target: 在 NVDA 中使用 32 位或 64 位 SAPI 5 合成器时，可以在“NVDA 设置”下的“语音设置类别”或通过循环切换合成器设置找到已安装的 32 位或 64 位的所有 SAPI5 语音。

segment.source: If you are unable to find a SAPI 5 voice that is installed on your system, try switching to the other SAPI 5 synthesizer using the [Select Synthesizer dialog](#SelectSynthesizer).
segment.target: 如果您找不到系统上安装的 SAPI 5 语音，请尝试使用[选择合成器对话框](#SelectSynthesizer)切换到另一个 SAPI 5 合成器。

segment.source: Microsoft Speech Platform
segment.target: Microsoft Speech Platform

segment.source: The Microsoft Speech Platform provides voices for many languages which are normally used in the development of server-based speech applications.
segment.target: Microsoft Speech Platform（微软语音平台）包含许多语言的声音，它通常用来进行基础语音应用程序服务的开发。

segment.source: These voices can also be used with NVDA.
segment.target: 此语音也可用于 NVDA。

segment.source: To use these voices, you will need to install two components:
segment.target: 要想使用此语音，您必须安装以下两种组件：

segment.source: [Microsoft Speech Platform - Runtime (Version 11), x64](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=27225)
segment.target: [Microsoft Speech Platform 语音 - 第 11 版 64 位运行库](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=27225)

segment.source: [Microsoft Speech Platform - Runtime Languages (Version 11)](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=27224)
segment.target: [Microsoft Speech Platform 语音 - 第 11 版语音包](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=27224)

segment.source: This page includes many files for both speech recognition and text-to-speech.
segment.target: 此页面包含了许多用于语音识别和文字转语音的文件。

segment.source: Choose the files containing the TTS data for the desired languages/voices.
segment.target: 选择您需要的语言的对应 TTS 数据文件。

segment.source: For example, the file MSSpeech_TTS_en-US_ZiraPro.msi is a U.S. English voice.
segment.target: 例如，文件 MSSpeech_TTS_en-US_ZiraPro.msi 是一个美国英语的语音包。

segment.source: Windows OneCore Voices
segment.target: Windows OneCore 语音

segment.source: Windows 10 and later includes voices known as "OneCore" or "mobile" voices.
segment.target: Windows 10 及更高版本操作系统内置了新的语音，被称作“OneCore”或“Mobile”。

segment.source: Voices are provided for many languages, and they are more responsive than the Microsoft voices available using Microsoft Speech API version 5.
segment.target: 该语音支持多语言，跟 Microsoft Speech API version 5 系列的语音相比响应更快。

segment.source: NVDA uses Windows OneCore voices by default.
segment.target: NVDA 默认使用 Windows OneCore 语音。

segment.source: To add new Windows OneCore voices, go to "Speech Settings", within Windows system settings.
segment.target: 若想添加新的 Windows OneCore 语音角色，请转到 Windows 系统设置中的“语音设置”。

segment.source: Use the "Add voices" option and search for the desired language.
segment.target: 按下“添加语音”按钮并搜索您所需语言的语音。

segment.source: Many languages include multiple variants.
segment.target: 许多语言包含了多种变体。

segment.source: "United Kingdom" and "Australia" are two of the English variants.
segment.target: “英语（英国）”和“英语（澳大利亚）”就是英语的两种变体。

segment.source: "France", "Canada" and "Switzerland" are French variants available.
segment.target: 而“法语（法国）”，“法语（加拿大）”和“法语（瑞士）”是法语的不同变体。

segment.source: Search for the broader language (such as English or French), then locate the variant in the list.
segment.target: 直接搜索一种语言（例如英语或法语），然后可以在列表中找到该语言的所有语音变体。

segment.source: Select any languages desired and use the "add" button to add them.
segment.target: 选择您所需的任何语言，然后使用“添加”按钮进行添加。

segment.source: Once added, restart NVDA.
segment.target: 添加后，请重新启动 NVDA 以使新添加的语音生效。

segment.source: Please see [Supported languages and voices](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/appendix-a-supported-languages-and-voices-4486e345-7730-53da-fcfe-55cc64300f01) for a list of available voices.
segment.target: 可参考微软发布的[支持的语言和语音](https://support.microsoft.com/zh-cn/windows/appendix-a-supported-languages-and-voices-4486e345-7730-53da-fcfe-55cc64300f01)，获取可用语音列表和安装说明。

segment.source: Supported Braille Displays
segment.target: 支持的点显器

segment.source: This section contains information about the Braille displays supported by NVDA.
segment.target: 本节包含有关 NVDA 支持的点显器的信息。

segment.source: Displays supporting automatic detection in the background
segment.target: 后台自动检测点显器

segment.source: NVDA has the ability to detect many braille displays in the background automatically, either via USB or bluetooth.
segment.target: NVDA 能够通过 USB 或蓝牙自动检测连接许多点显器。

segment.source: This behaviour is achieved by selecting the Automatic option as the preferred braille display from NVDA's [Braille Settings dialog](#BrailleSettings).
segment.target: 通过在 NVDA 的[盲文设置对话框](#BrailleSettings)中选择“自动”选项作为首选盲文显示，可以启用此特性。

segment.source: This option is selected by default.
segment.target: 默认情况下此选项是开启的。

segment.source: The following displays support this automatic detection functionality.
segment.target: 以下点显器支持此自动检测功能。

segment.source: Handy Tech displays
segment.target: Handy Tech 点显器

segment.source: Baum/Humanware/APH/Orbit braille displays
segment.target: Baum/Humanware/APH/Orbit 点显器

segment.source: HumanWare Brailliant BI/B series
segment.target: HumanWare Brailliant BI/B 系列

segment.source: HumanWare BrailleNote
segment.target: HumanWare BrailleNote

segment.source: SuperBraille
segment.target: 超点

segment.source: Optelec ALVA 6 series
segment.target: Optelec ALVA 6 系列

segment.source: HIMS Braille Sense/Braille EDGE/Smart Beetle/Sync Braille Series
segment.target: HIMS Braille Sense/Braille EDGE/Smart Beetle/Sync Braille 系列

segment.source: Eurobraille Esys/Esytime/Iris displays
segment.target: Eurobraille Esys/Esytime/Iris 点显器

segment.source: Nattiq nBraille displays
segment.target: Nattiq nBraille 点显器

segment.source: Seika Notetaker: MiniSeika (16, 24 cells), V6, and V6Pro (40 cells)
segment.target: Seika Notetaker（清华点显器） Mini （16 / 24 方） V6/V6Pro（40 方）

segment.source: Tivomatic Caiku Albatross 46/80 displays
segment.target: Tivomatic Caiku Albatross 46/80 点显器

segment.source: NLS eReader Zoomax
segment.target: NLS eReader Zoomax

segment.source: Any Display that supports the Standard HID Braille protocol
segment.target: 任何支持 HID 协议的点显器

segment.source: Freedom Scientific Focus/PAC Mate Series
segment.target: Freedom Scientific Focus/PAC Mate 系列

segment.source: All Focus and PAC Mate displays from [Freedom Scientific](https://www.freedomscientific.com/) are supported when connected via USB or bluetooth.
segment.target: 通过 USB 或蓝牙连接时，支持 [Freedom Scientific](https://www.freedomscientific.com/) 的所有 Focus 和 PAC Mate 点显器。

segment.source: You will need the Freedom Scientific braille display drivers installed on your system.
segment.target: 您需要在系统上安装 Freedom Scientific 点显器驱动程序。

segment.source: If you do not have them already, you can obtain them from the [Focus Blue Braille Display Driver page](https://support.freedomscientific.com/Downloads/Focus/FocusBlueBrailleDisplayDriver).
segment.target: 可从 [Focus Blue Braille Display Driver 页面](https://support.freedomscientific.com/Downloads/Focus/FocusBlueBrailleDisplayDriver)获取。

segment.source: Although this page only mentions the Focus Blue display, the drivers support all Freedom Scientific Focus and Pacmate displays.
segment.target: 虽然该页面仅提到 Focus Blue 点显器，但驱动程序支持所有 Freedom Scientific Focus 和 Pacmate 点显器。

segment.source: By default, NVDA can automatically detect and connect to these displays either via USB or bluetooth.
segment.target: 默认情况下，NVDA 可以通过 USB 或蓝牙自动检测并连接到这些点显器。

segment.source: However, when configuring the display, you can explicitly select "USB" or "Bluetooth" ports to restrict the connection type to be used.
segment.target: 但是，在配置点显器时，您可以明确选择“USB”或“蓝牙”端口来限制要使用的连接类型。

segment.source: This might be useful if you want to connect the focus display to NVDA using bluetooth, but still be able to charge it using USB power from your computer.
segment.target: 如果您想将 NVDA 通过蓝牙连接到 focus 点显器，同时使用计算机的 USB 电源为点显器充电，这将非常有用。

segment.source: NVDA's automatic braille display detection will also recognize the display on USB or Bluetooth.
segment.target: NVDA 的点显器自动检测将识别通过 USB 或蓝牙连接的点显器。

segment.source: Following are the key assignments for this display with NVDA.
segment.target: 以下是该点显器使用 NVDA 时的按键分配。

segment.source: Please see the display's documentation for descriptions of where these keys can be found.
segment.target: 具体按键位置请参阅点显器随附的文档。

segment.source: Name |Key
segment.target: 名称 | 按键

segment.source: Scroll braille display back |topRouting1 (first cell on display)
segment.target: 向后滚动盲文显示 | topRouting1 (first cell on display)

segment.source: Scroll braille display forward |topRouting20/40/80 (last cell on display)
segment.target: 向前滚动盲文显示 | topRouting20/40/80 (last cell on display)

segment.source: Scroll braille display back |leftAdvanceBar
segment.target: 向后滚动盲文显示 | leftAdvanceBar

segment.source: Scroll braille display forward |rightAdvanceBar
segment.target: 向前滚动盲文显示 | rightAdvanceBar

segment.source: Toggle braille tethered to |leftGDFButton+rightGDFButton
segment.target: 切换盲文显示跟随到 | leftGDFButton+rightGDFButton

segment.source: Toggle left wiz wheel action |leftWizWheelPress
segment.target: Toggle left wiz wheel action | leftWizWheelPress

segment.source: Move back using left wiz wheel action |leftWizWheelUp
segment.target: Move back using left wiz wheel action | leftWizWheelUp

segment.source: Move forward using left wiz wheel action |leftWizWheelDown
segment.target: Move forward using left wiz wheel action | leftWizWheelDown

segment.source: Toggle right wiz wheel action |rightWizWheelPress
segment.target: Toggle right wiz wheel action | rightWizWheelPress

segment.source: Move back using right wiz wheel action |rightWizWheelUp
segment.target: Move back using right wiz wheel action | rightWizWheelUp

segment.source: Move forward using right wiz wheel action |rightWizWheelDown
segment.target: Move forward using right wiz wheel action | rightWizWheelDown

segment.source: Route to braille cell |routing
segment.target: 定位盲文单元 | routing

segment.source: shift+tab key |brailleSpaceBar+dot1+dot2
segment.target: Shift+Tab 键 | brailleSpaceBar+1、2 点

segment.source: tab key |brailleSpaceBar+dot4+dot5
segment.target: Tab 键 | brailleSpaceBar+4、5 点

segment.source: upArrow key |brailleSpaceBar+dot1
segment.target: 上光标键 | brailleSpaceBar+1 点

segment.source: downArrow key |brailleSpaceBar+dot4
segment.target: 下光标键 | brailleSpaceBar+4 点

segment.target: Ctrl+右光标键 | brailleSpaceBar+5 点

segment.source: rightArrow key |brailleSpaceBar+dot6

segment.target: 行尾键 | brailleSpaceBar+4、6 点

segment.target: Ctrl+行首键 | brailleSpaceBar+1、2、3 点

segment.source: control+end key |brailleSpaceBar+dot4+dot5+dot6
segment.target: Ctrl+行尾键 | brailleSpaceBar+4、5、6 点

segment.source: alt key |brailleSpaceBar+dot1+dot3+dot4
segment.target: Alt 键 | brailleSpaceBar+1、3、4 点

segment.source: alt+tab key |brailleSpaceBar+dot2+dot3+dot4+dot5
segment.target: Alt+Tab 键 | brailleSpaceBar+2、3、4、5 点

segment.source: windows+tab key |brailleSpaceBar+dot2+dot3+dot4
segment.target: Windows+Tab 键 | brailleSpaceBar+2、3、4 点

segment.source: escape key |brailleSpaceBar+dot1+dot5
segment.target: ESC 键 | brailleSpaceBar+1、5 点

segment.target: Windows 键 | brailleSpaceBar+2、4、5、6 点

segment.source: space key |brailleSpaceBar
segment.target: 空格键 | brailleSpaceBar

segment.target: 按下或放开 Ctrl 键 | brailleSpaceBar+3、8 点

segment.source: Toggle alt key |brailleSpaceBar+dot6+dot8
segment.target: 按下或放开 Alt 键 | brailleSpaceBar+6、8 点

segment.source: Toggle windows key |brailleSpaceBar+dot4+dot8
segment.target: 按下或放开 Windows 键 | brailleSpaceBar+4、8 点

segment.source: Toggle NVDA key |brailleSpaceBar+dot5+dot8
segment.target: 按下或放开 NVDA 键 | brailleSpaceBar+5、8 点

segment.source: Toggle shift key |brailleSpaceBar+dot7+dot8
segment.target: 按下或放开 Shift 键 | brailleSpaceBar+7、8 点

segment.target: Windows+D 键（最小化所有应用程序） | brailleSpaceBar+1、2、3、4、5、6 点

segment.source: Report Current Line |brailleSpaceBar+dot1+dot4

segment.target: NVDA 菜单 | brailleSpaceBar+1、3、4、5 点

segment.source: For newer Focus models that contain rocker bar keys (focus 40, focus 80 and focus blue):
segment.target: 对于包含 rocker bar 键的较新 Focus 型号（focus 40、focus 80 和 focus blue）：

segment.source: Name |Key
segment.target: 名称 | 按键

segment.source: Move braille display to previous line |leftRockerBarUp, rightRockerBarUp
segment.target: 移动点显器到上一行 | leftRockerBarUp, rightRockerBarUp

segment.source: Move braille display to next line |leftRockerBarDown, rightRockerBarDown
segment.target: 移动点显器到下一行 | leftRockerBarDown, rightRockerBarDown

segment.source: For Focus 80 only:
segment.target: 仅适用于 Focus 80：

segment.source: Name |Key
segment.target: 名称 | 按键

segment.source: Scroll braille display back |leftBumperBarUp, rightBumperBarUp
segment.target: 向后滚动盲文显示 | leftBumperBarUp, rightBumperBarUp

segment.source: Scroll braille display forward |leftBumperBarDown, rightBumperBarDown
segment.target: 向前滚动盲文显示 | leftBumperBarDown, rightBumperBarDown

segment.source: Optelec ALVA 6 series/protocol converter
segment.target: Optelec ALVA 6 系列/协议转换器

segment.source: Both the ALVA BC640 and BC680 displays from [Optelec](https://www.optelec.com/) are supported when connected via USB or bluetooth.
segment.target: 通过 USB 或蓝牙连接时，[Optelec](https://www.optelec.com/) 的 ALVA BC640 和 BC680 点显器均受支持。

segment.source: Alternatively, you can connect an older Optelec display, such as a Braille Voyager, using a protocol converter supplied by Optelec.
segment.target: 或者，您可以使用 Optelec 提供的协议转换器连接较旧的 Optelec 点显器，例如 Braille Voyager。

segment.source: You do not need any specific drivers to be installed to use these displays.
segment.target: 您不需要安装任何特定的驱动程序即可使用这些点显器。

segment.source: Just plug in the display and configure NVDA to use it.
segment.target: 只需插入点显器并配置 NVDA 即可使用。

segment.source: Note: NVDA might be unable to use an ALVA BC6 display over Bluetooth when it is paired using the ALVA Bluetooth utility.
segment.target: 注意：当使用 ALVA 蓝牙实用程序配对时，NVDA 可能无法通过蓝牙使用 ALVA BC6 点显器。

segment.source: When you have paired your device using this utility and NVDA is unable to detect your device, we recommend you to pair your ALVA display the regular way using the Windows Bluetooth settings.
segment.target: 当您使用此实用程序配对设备并且 NVDA 无法检测到您的设备时，我们建议您使用 Windows 蓝牙设置以常规方式配对 ALVA 点显器。

segment.source: Note: while some of these displays do have a braille keyboard, they handle translation from braille to text themselves by default.
segment.target: 注意：虽然其中一些点显器确实具有盲文键盘，但它们默认情况下会自行处理从盲文到文本的翻译。

segment.source: This means that NVDA's braille input system is not in use in the default situation (i.e. the input braille table setting has no effect).
segment.target: 这意味着 NVDA 的盲文输入系统在默认情况下不使用（即盲文设置的输入表选项无效）。

segment.source: For ALVA displays with recent firmware, it is possible to disable this HID keyboard simulation using an input gesture.
segment.target: 对于具有最新固件的 ALVA 点显器，可以使用按键与手势禁用此 HID 键盘模拟。

segment.source: Following are key assignments for this display with NVDA.
segment.target: 以下是该点显器使用 NVDA 时的按键分配。

segment.source: Please see the display's documentation for descriptions of where these keys can be found.
segment.target: 具体按键位置请参阅点显器随附的文档。
